_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/the-jacketed-jester-of-the-fbi?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/256cd181-e9dc-4c45-b18c-8dc7f76359fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/256cd181-e9dc-4c45-b18c-8dc7f76359fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
Amidst the farce and flimflam of the Trump administration, [the American public has been forced to endure some deranged government agency stewardships](https://substack.com/redirect/6b449959-dd7d-4d10-aae3-a2497ae8bdb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). FBI Director Kash Patel, in epic fashion, continues to set himself apart.
According to a recent comprehensive report, Patel runs with the FBI with all the solemnity of a psychotic street artist banging on tin cans. The 115-page report written for Republican led Congressional committees comes from a coalition of current and former FBI agents:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/edfd9534-8db4-4a95-9772-bdea952a120e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is not simply a "management review" as the Trump White House wishes to portray; it is a blistering indictment. And the bill of particulars is lengthy.
On September 10, 2025, as the nation was reeling from the violent assassination of Charlie Kirk, Kash Patel arrived in Utah on a private FBI jet not to uphold justice - but to fuss over a jacket.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d168380-35a6-44e4-90ee-63b34da0befc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to the report, Patel "refused" to leave the plane until somebody fetched a medium-sized FBI raid jacket that fit him. Having no jacket of his own, Patel accepted one belonging to a female agent -- and still balked: the sleeves lacked just the right patches, so members of a SWAT team ripped patches from their own uniforms to satisfy Patel's sartorial demands.
Only then did Patel step out of the airplane.
One could almost admire the chutzpah if it were not so absurd. Here, in the very midst of a murder investigation, law enforcement agents sworn to pursue justice were dragged off their duties to babysit a Kash Patel tantrum.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52450528-b138-4cf4-87cb-73ee98c07589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The spectacle reveals not dignity or decorum, but childish vanity and shallow pretense -- the kind of pettiness unworthy of any serious crime-fighting agency.
The report goes further, painting the bureau under Patel as a "rudderless ship," stricken with fear and disorder. Agents move through their days reluctant to act, haunted by the possibility of getting fired or reassigned. Some agents reportedly judge policy decisions not on law or justice, but on which side spares them from getting yelled at by upper bureau management.
* * *
Stay in the loop with free BAM newsletters in your inbox.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.1j_uvw4wbjn4Vj9n1Ocp_ZDOLrSUWgLXorHhcZoMBIw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180441010)
* * *
Picture that. A law enforcement agency meant to track terrorists, investigate violent crime, and safeguard civil liberties has been reduced to a collection of guppies flinching beneath a captain whose greatest concern is whether he looks tough enough for a photograph. If the FBI is in any shape to serve the public, it is in spite of FBI leadership -- not because of it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c0a0ee1b-a82f-4006-abef-830bd905bd47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And what of professionalism? The agents who spoke out compare Patel and his deputy, Dan Bongino, to a "circus." The agents say Patel and Bongino are preoccupied with their media profiles, not with the FBI's mission.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/57346d08-b7fa-4ae0-8a33-e650e0da2e0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The report rebukes what amounts to PR-first governance: directives delivered via social-media posts rather than internal memos, rash public commentary during ongoing investigations, and an obsession with "personal resumes" more than investigative seriousness.
It is not merely that Patel lacks the gravitas -- he lacks the self-restraint. He treats the FBI not as a temple of public service, but as a platform for self-promotion. And he uses FBI resources, including that aforementioned jet, to help him rendezvous with his country singer girlfriend.
* * *
Subscribe for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.1j_uvw4wbjn4Vj9n1Ocp_ZDOLrSUWgLXorHhcZoMBIw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180441010)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71181a41-b666-41e2-a920-fd9d6643b47c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Patel is a demagogue in uniform seeking mile-high romance, not a dependable or serious lawman of substance.
[When authorities who control surveillance, power, and the means to punish are themselves unhinged by petty vanity](https://substack.com/redirect/3955b78b-602c-4cf8-9a1a-abc243d868fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), what becomes of liberty? What becomes of justice?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b85f7144-b1e7-4734-8ec6-b6e0832fcb0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm going to spare you my typical hope and calls for accountability. Those should be reserved for government leaders who deserve even a modicum of respect. In Patel's case, I offer only this: may every citizen read the report, and may laughter -- that ancient and civilized weapon -- do the rest.
* **[FBI Report](https://substack.com/redirect/8bc00f00-f081-4019-8060-f8ae24c5aa5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Because if there is one thing more destructive than a tyrant, it is a tyrant who thinks the world ought to take him seriously.
Strip away the jacket, the patches, the stitched-on authority, and Kash Patel is a narcissistic clown.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/256cd181-e9dc-4c45-b18c-8dc7f76359fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You're currently a free subscriber to [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/redirect/cd8f88bd-18e1-4f45-ac9b-dba9775b630b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.1j_uvw4wbjn4Vj9n1Ocp_ZDOLrSUWgLXorHhcZoMBIw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.1j_uvw4wbjn4Vj9n1Ocp_ZDOLrSUWgLXorHhcZoMBIw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Team Cooper for Senate HQ
subject: Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE investments in a strong clean energy economy?
body:
Need your opinion >>>
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
| **ONE-QUESTION POLL FOR ROY COOPER SUPPORTERS:** **Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE investing in a strong clean energy economy?** | [SUPPORT](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/Clean_energy_poll?t=6&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE) | [OPPOSE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/Clean_energy_poll?t=7&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
---|---
If you agree with most Americans, you probably don’t think Big Oil should be calling all the shots, Peter.
**In this U.S. Senate race, Big Oil is likely to be all in against Roy Cooper — and it will be a close one.**
Even before becoming the extreme Republican yes-man he is today, our opponent Michael Whatley spent over ten years propping up the worst of climate change as a lobbyist for Big Oil. **_He even advocated for drilling off the coast of North Carolina — endangering the beautiful places we all love._**
As Governor, Roy made North Carolina the epicenter of the clean energy economy. He added over 20,000 new, good-paying jobs and took steps to protect the environment our kids will inherit.
Americans on both sides of the aisle agree that Michael Whatley’s Big Oil agenda is reckless and out of step — **unlike Roy, who’s already proven our economy and our planet can both succeed with clean energy._We need to know where you stand:_**
**Do you SUPPORT or OPPOSE investments in a strong clean energy economy?**
[SUPPORT](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/Clean_energy_poll?t=8&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE) | [OPPOSE](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/Clean_energy_poll?t=9&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
---|---
Thanks for your response,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=88%2E124072%2EeGCaRE)

body:
5X match for reproductive freedom | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/120476811/586403683/2141984067?sourceid=1150990&utm_campaign=26emkge-1206aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=matchtable&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiZDg3MS1kYmNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xKvT0ZJhtsULkYQrShwvJx6SV0vQA_VWtH4NKiUWwb8=&emci=a75d2c55-0bc7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=edbbd871-dbcf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

|
---
Dear Peter,

Our $100,000 Giving Tuesday match is so close—but we're not there yet. I was just reviewing our latest donation report and noticed your gift isn't in... yet.

subject: 50 years of Chuck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawler for Congress, Inc
body:
Look where that’s gotten us...

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/lawler-for-congress/retire-chuck?amount=50&utm_source=acoustic&utm_medium=email&utm_id=campeng)

name: Brianna Shamsuddoha, NDRC
subject: We’re facing unprecedented attacks on fair representation and we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We must remain ready to respond to threats to our democracy — but we can only do that with your support.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120477442/586406618/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiYjQ1YjA4LWRiY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EOm1wEvZPSqimZ_PMZaBJii_K_ispwcul92urPTVnN0=&emci=ab3194eb-afcf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=cbb45b08-dbcf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120477443/586406619/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_GivingTuesday1_email_20251202-NDRC-Tier1-GivingTuesday1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251202-NDRC-Tier1-GivingTuesday1_&utm_campaign=GivingTuesday1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiYjQ1YjA4LWRiY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EOm1wEvZPSqimZ_PMZaBJii_K_ispwcul92urPTVnN0=)
---
Peter,
Today is an important day for fundraising at the NDRC, so let me be direct about [**why your Giving Tuesday donation of any amount is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120477444/586406620/-1027206931?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_GivingTuesday1_email_20251202-NDRC-Tier1-GivingTuesday1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251202-NDRC-Tier1-GivingTuesday1_&utm_campaign=GivingTuesday1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiYjQ1YjA4LWRiY2YtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EOm1wEvZPSqimZ_PMZaBJii_K_ispwcul92urPTVnN0=)
Across the country, fair representation is being threatened. Anti-democracy extremists have passed gerrymanders in Texas and North Carolina that strip minority communities of fair representation. Map manipulators are meddling in Florida, Indiana, and Kansas to try and rig the midterms. A Supreme Court ruling on the constitutionality of the Voting Rights Act could come down any day now.
**The threats to our democracy are happening _right now_. We can’t take any of it lightly.**
With so much at stake, this national day of giving is a chance for our entire community to come together and keep our grassroots fundraising strong, ensuring we have the resources to carry on the fight for a truly representative democracy.

When Attorney General Eric Holder and President Barack Obama founded the NDRC almost a decade ago, it was because Republicans were quietly gerrymandering their way to power in Congress and state legislatures by disenfranchising voters. Put simply, they were cheating.
This past year, we’ve witnessed them cheating their way to power explode out in the open. Donald Trump and his White House are undertaking an unprecedented assault on fair representation, openly coordinating with Republicans nationwide to redraw maps mid-decade — a blatant attempt to unfairly hold on to power.
**The good news is, this is what the NDRC was built for.** Together, with grassroots supporters like you, we’ve been fighting back every step of the way. And we’ve had huge wins with voters passing Proposition 50 in California, establishing a Democratic trifecta in Virginia, defending an independent-minded state Supreme Court in Pennsylvania, and so much more.
**But as the attacks on fair maps get more egregious, every dollar matters in ensuring the NDRC has the resources to fight back. clean_body: We must remain ready to respond to threats to our democracy — but we can only do that with your support. | | = Peter, Today is an important day for fundraising at the NDRC, so let me be direct about = Across the country, fair representation is being threatened. Anti-democracy extremists have passed gerrymanders in Texas and North Carolina that strip minority communities of fair representation. Map manipulators are meddling in Florida, Indiana, and Kansas to try and rig the midterms. A Supreme Court ruling on the constitutionality of the Voting Rights Act could come down any day now. The threats to our democracy are happening right now. We can’t take any of it lightly. With so much at stake, this national day of giving is a chance for our entire community to come together and keep our grassroots fundraising strong, ensuring we have the resources to carry on the fight for a truly representative democracy. Put simply, they were cheating. This past year, we’ve witnessed them cheating their way to power explode out in the open. Donald Trump and his White House are undertaking an unprecedented assault on fair representation, openly coordinating with Republicans nationwide to redraw maps mid-decade — a blatant attempt to unfairly hold on to power. The good news is, this is what the NDRC was built for. Together, with grassroots supporters like you, we’ve been fighting back every step of the way. And we’ve had huge wins with voters passing Proposition 50 in California, establishing a Democratic trifecta in Virginia, defending an independent-minded state Supreme Court in Pennsylvania, and so much more. But as the attacks on fair maps get more egregious, every dollar matters in ensuring the NDRC has the resources to fight back. name: Tim Walz
subject: Trump just attacked me again
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251202-218&t=1&akid=218%2E34582%2EU3SvhD)
Peter, it's Tim.
The President of the United States just can’t seem to keep my name out of his mouth.
Earlier today, he attacked me again from the Oval Office.
**Look, I don’t give a damn what bullies like Donald Trump call me on television.** My singular focus is on defending Minnesota families from the chaos and cruelty currently being inflicted by this administration.
I refuse to be intimidated or distracted by Trump’s name-calling. There’s just too much at stake for our state. And I’m more committed than ever to defending the progress we’ve won together in Minnesota and continuing to do what I’ve always done: serve the people and care for our neighbors.
**[If you’ve got my back, I’m personally asking you to show it today by making a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign for reelection. As Trump attacks me and threatens our state, I need you by my side, Peter.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251202_2.twzIiY&amount=5&refcode=em20251202-218&t=2&akid=218%2E34582%2EU3SvhD)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251202_2.twzIiY&amount=5&refcode=20251202-218&t=21&akid=218%2E34582%2EU3SvhD)**
I’m so grateful to have the backing of this team. Thank you,
Tim

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251202-218&t=22&refcode2=218_34582_U3SvhD&akid=218%2E34582%2EU3SvhD)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Minnesota taxpayers are funding fraud that’s being laundered overseas. I have a plan to stop it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| **Friend,** A bombshell investigation has dropped... and it confirms what many of us have known for years: **Minnesota is drowning in fraud**. Worse, federal investigators now say**millions in stolen taxpayer dollars were funneled overseas with some ultimately reaching the terror group Al-Shabaab.** That’s right: **money intended to feed hungry children and support vulnerable Minnesotans instead helped fund a known terror group.** Meanwhile, under Governor Tim Walz, welfare fraud has exploded into billions of stolen dollars. Scandal after scandal, Feeding Our Future, Housing Stabilization Services, and autism services were all ignored, minimized, or brushed aside while a culture of fraud took root. Enough is enough. That’s why I introduced the **Fraud Accountability and Recovery (FAR) Act** — legislation to shut the door on criminals who steal American tax dollars and then hide overseas. My bill does something Washington should have done years ago:
* **Cuts off foreign aid** to any country harboring someone convicted of defrauding the United States.

* **Blocks U.S. assistance** if they refuse to help recover stolen taxpayer money.

* **Holds fraudsters accountable,** no matter where they run or where they hide their assets.

If you steal from American taxpayers, **you will face consequences**. Period. But here’s the truth: passing bold reforms like this takes political strength, and Democrats in Minnesota and Washington would love nothing more than to bury this story and block accountability. **I need your help to keep up the pressure.** Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to support our fight against fraud and protect Minnesota taxpayers?
---
| | [Donate Here →](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Minnesotans deserve a government that protects their tax dollars — not one that lets criminals siphon them off and ship them across the globe. With your help, we will continue exposing the truth and delivering real reforms. Thank you for standing with me. **— Brad** P.S. The scale of fraud uncovered in this latest report is staggering — and investigators say we’re not even halfway to understanding how deep it goes. Help me keep fighting for transparency, accountability, and justice.**Chip in today.**
---
| | |
---
| Paid for by Finstad for Congress
---

subject: re: Virginia

body:

Derek, it’s Senator Mark Warner, with an important announcement:
Today I am launching my reelection campaign to continue to fight for Virginians and take back the Senate for Democrats. Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Adam Schiff and my campaign? [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-warner25.eXcXGw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251202_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9256%2E5257348%2EB95h-0)
---
There is nothing normal about what’s happening in Washington. We’ve got a president who is more focused on enriching himself and his allies than addressing the pressing problems facing Americans – like rising costs and Republicans’ health care crisis.
And elected Republicans don’t seem to care. In fact, they enable it.
The only way to hold Trump accountable is to flip the Senate, and frankly, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose Virginia.
**[At this critical moment for our campaign and our country, will you split a donation between Adam and my campaign to win in Virginia and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-warner25.eXcXGw&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251202_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9256%2E5257348%2EB95h-0)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Our race just got a whole lot tougher
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120481266/586428956/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRjYzg1MC1lMGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EOQsiYytWV9BkQCa1YzIuL8TCFz1Mi8G6a3uTE3Rrsc=)
This says it all:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120481267/586428957/789508428?refcode=251202_RG_maga-stronghold-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRjYzg1MC1lMGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EOQsiYytWV9BkQCa1YzIuL8TCFz1Mi8G6a3uTE3Rrsc=)
I’m Robert Garcia, and that liberal congressmember is me.
Let me tell you: the moment those new maps dropped, I knew my race got a whole lot tougher.
MAGA extremists are not just going to hand over a district they’ve treated as a personal stronghold. They’re already plotting the attacks.
**That’s why I’m starting early.
That’s why I’m building now.
_And that’s why I’m setting a goal of raising $5,000 before the end of November._**
If we hit that number, it means we’ll have what we need to:
* hire organizers early,
* push back against right-wing misinformation, and
* scale up the movement we need to win this harder, more competitive district.

name: Team Deb
subject: Last chance to sign Deb's birthday card!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Have you wished Deb a Happy Birthday yet?

Quick, Friend – you're running out of time!
---
We're hoping 1,000 more supporters will join us in wishing Deb a happy birthday before midnight, but it looks like we're still missing your name.
**[Will you take 30 seconds to sign the card now and wish Deb a very happy birthday?](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=1&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)**
| | [🎉 SIGN DEB'S BIRTHDAY CARD! 🎉](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=2&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
---
We know it'll mean so much for Deb to see this card filled with signatures and messages of support. Thank you for helping us make this day extra special for her!
– Team Deb
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Deb**
Date: Tues, Dec 2, 2025
Subject: It's Deb's birthday!
| | |
---
Friend, today is an exciting day here at our campaign headquarters ... it's Deb's birthday, and **we want YOU to celebrate with us by signing her birthday card!**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=3&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
| | [🎉 SIGN DEB'S BIRTHDAY CARD! 🎉](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=4&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
---
Here on Team Deb, we’re inspired every day by Deb’s remarkable journey. She raised her child on her own as a single parent, relied on food stamps, overcame homelessness, and went on to become one of the first Native American women elected to Congress and the first Native American cabinet secretary in U.S. history.
**Now, as someone who has experienced and understands the challenges so many New Mexicans are facing, Deb is running for governor to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.**
**[If you believe in Deb’s vision for a better, fairer future for everyone, we hope you’ll take a moment to add your name and wish her a happy birthday._We’re hoping to share thousands of messages with her tonight!_](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=5&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)**
| | [🎉 SIGN DEB'S BIRTHDAY CARD! 🎉](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/haaland-birthdaycard-2025/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&refcode=jtk-32-su-nd&t=6&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
---
Thank you,
Team Deb

|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1361?t=7&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1348?t=8&akid=6024%2E400544%2E-Br2VF)
---

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: We need bold leadership, and that's why Seth is stepping up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, The Massachusetts Senate race is starting to come into focus, and it’s clearer now more than ever: **Seth is THE leader taking a stand and challenging the status quo by entering this race** , and he's stepping up because the challenges we’re facing demand bold leadership **right now. ** **Not six years from now. Right now.** Too many in Washington are comfortable with the way things are. Seth isn’t because working families are not. He’s running to take on a system that rewards caution at a time when our country needs courage. He’s challenging an old playbook that treats politics like a waiting game while families are being priced out of their neighborhoods, Trump is threatening our democracy again, and working people are falling further behind. This campaign isn’t about playing it safe. It’s about stepping up even when it’s hard. clean_body: | | Hi friend, The Massachusetts Senate race is starting to come into focus, and it’s clearer now more than ever: Seth is THE leader taking a stand and challenging the status quo by entering this race , and he's stepping up because the challenges we’re facing demand bold leadership right now. Not six years from now. Right now. Too many in Washington are comfortable with the way things are. Seth isn’t because working families are not. He’s running to take on a system that rewards caution at a time when our country needs courage. He’s challenging an old playbook that treats politics like a waiting game while families are being priced out of their neighborhoods, Trump is threatening our democracy again, and working people are falling further behind. This campaign isn’t about playing it safe. It’s about stepping up even when it’s hard. And we can’t do it without you. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thanks for taking a chance and challenging the status quo with us. — Seth for Massachusetts | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
---
Derek, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: [**Split a donation between the DNC and me. It would mean a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20251202_5434_fr&refcode2=5434_22930333_viHksM&akid=5434%2E22930333%2EviHksM) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Mark Kelly and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20251202_5434_fr&refcode2=5434_22930333_viHksM&akid=5434%2E22930333%2EviHksM)**

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Everyone should be recognized!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBDT1bmjWuZsD1PuR6RrNBoojqHYntN-ZPDc8ao2dAoYL28ui-2d5ZEBcIzpbhchh54Kx5lQQNWDlflrlRIRDcSA/4m4/b7bwJ3xkRfint0JucCBzQw/h0/h001.6wjddq2R0BheL90fycoXaAlpOYhqC5c1kdTkKNKLkRQ)
---
Peter,

On Saturday, I had the unique opportunity to attend the premiere of "Guardians of the Waters" by Chinook Justice. This documentary highlighted their persistent fight and ongoing work to obtain the Chinook Nation's federal recognition-calling attention to their ongoing fight for justice. Congressional approval remains the most straightforward path to recognition. Congresswoman Marie Gluesenkamp Perez pledged to support their cause in 2022 to secure the recognition they deserve, making this statement. "Federal recognition of the Chinook Indian Nation will have a positive impact on the local economy, health care, housing availability, and public safety of rural Southwest Washington. But federal recognition of the Chinook Indian Nation is also a simple matter of right and wrong." Shocker-earlier this year, she went back on that statement.
---
[ **Help Me, Help The Chinook** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHeZHBqGFh4tc7f9T-34F5TJyuETybTur8nSJRU2wrODu8TBsWlwf-Tw74HtVlvc13KWWtAfdNK5R5ao6rzIQ3GdHSPbyz744VWD4tsj3fr05eZyfoPDBAkmBG7q7Xkndmp9mKTOCg7JYkbLevMw2GeHzAK2OEQEldeL4LApsTH7tj-y3g9D4LtGHpDeewaPhDEdX4NO7i3ivWEMImYJ7CtYn-Uq5FmlljCawBIMhWjOXvgkN3mwSL4_VXOGBBd8F6Q/4m4/b7bwJ3xkRfint0JucCBzQw/h1/h001.UTH86BzwDFL9bl0alqyc5Pw3pRoUP_hX1D7QNlHfrvA)
---
What Congresswoman Marie Gluesenkamp Perez attempted to deliver was a slap in the face. What **she offered the Chinook Nation** was a form of federal recognition,**but without the essential water or land rights that accompany it.** This deal was a non-starter for the Chinook. Apparently, she thought it would be perfectly fine to separate this community from its land and ancestors'. **We need to move beyond land acknowledgements: Take real action now!** I encourage you to **identify** Native Nations in your region fighting for federal recognition. **Learn** about what they have done for your community and their fight to be recognized. **Contact your elected officials** and tell them to actively champion recognition. **Make your demands impossible to ignore!** I need you to **DONATE****** to **my campaign today** so I can be your Congressman and **help fight to** **get the Chinook the federal recognition they deserve! Every dollar matters, and your support is needed now.** We are building a campaign to defeat MGP and her disastrous voting record. Let's seat a representative who will honestly and truly support the Chinook Nation and the entire district. [**Can you rush $10, $25, or $50 right now to help send a regular working dad to Congress?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUARDmKlcjrATb9Tw3-x5kLiSYzClRxXyTksyZtvRqavGQeravcya-_xz2yX4yBe5ziBAECWxUwZ_gzlCqAePwjOuqilmO0LbNSRXRvNfEblnswd9RpAwV7wLBV15_Lv7OUUcKYF6Uz1dGjIEqOhTuBuiEV7hwnc_RaAORtdJApY87YtL9DVE0Q1B5a41xXOSDosJRI2_n7qKHRFchHiXL4UrR3nZAzp6jDFApGXZdcDPEDIoS6hflOQrlOVpu59xiGi_hWtoQUSVIypLJljaVmbbm1VlzrJwLPwZpge3blL2w/4m4/b7bwJ3xkRfint0JucCBzQw/h2/h001.BRMoVNd3Daa9lGVoMGGDJIdD9OnBs99ArfcCIW446hI) Remember to Vote Blue, BUT IT MATTERS WHO!
Let's Heal Washington!

Brent Hennrich
---

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: This Supreme Court case shouldn't be under the radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
While the media has been hyper-focused on the redistricting fights, this case has seemingly flown under the radar -- even though its impact on voting and representation would be a larger swing than all the current redistricting efforts combined.
This decision could knock the last leg out from the Voting Rights Act (VRA), functionally ending a historic piece of legislation and setting our fight for fair representation back decades.
RUSH $25 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During the oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=120225_3&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120225_3&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=120225_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120225_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=120225_3&amount=20]

Portland, OR 97280

name: Your Petition Follow-Up [VPP]
subject: URGENT: USPS in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump wants to completely destroy the Postal Service.
| The Postal Service is in URGENT danger of thousands of layoffs and even Post Office closures all over the country — your local office could be next.

**So we were STUNNED to see you haven’t signed our petition standing with the Postal Service against Trump’s threats. Is this correct?**

If Trump gets away with his cuts, we can say GOODBYE to mail-in voting and reliable mail delivery that millions of Americans depend on. [**_SIGN NOW »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=6&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje) | [CORRECT THE RECORD: ADD MY SIGNATURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
---
You only have 30 more minutes to confirm!
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
This news should terrify all of us:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
Trump KNOWS that mail-in voters helped secure President Biden’s 2020 victory and Democratic victories across the country this year.

**He’ll do anything to DISENFRANCHISE millions of blue voters even if it means DESTROYING USPS entirely! We MUST fight back.**

[**Sign on to STAND WITH THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje) | [SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND WITH THE POSTAL SERVICE AND SAVE VOTE-BY-MAIL »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
---
People DEPEND on our Post Office -- but Trump is running it to the ground. **_NO!!_**

**We know good Democrats like you care about preserving this amazing institution. So we’re _pleading with you_ to act:**
[**Sign on to stand with the Postal Service against MAGA cuts »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
[2,000 LOCAL RESPONSES DUE TONIGHT: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251202_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
---
Please, we need 2,000 responses from your state by MIDNIGHT tonight!

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22101%2E878179%2EtwKgje)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Now that the polls have closed…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Polls have officially closed in Tennessee’s 7th District, and before the result comes in, we need you to hear this from us directly: Thank you.
Over the past few weeks, you helped fuel one of the most ambitious last-minute voter turnout operations we’ve ever attempted. A special election this tight, this fast, and this important doesn’t come around often, but when it did, you showed up.
No matter what the final margin is tonight, we’re proud of the work we put in together, and we’re excited to dig into the numbers as they roll in. Once the dust settles, we’ll follow up with a full analysis of what we learned and where this movement goes next.
For now: thank you for believing in this work, and for proving once again that when voters hear from someone who actually sees them, things can change.
Talk soon,
GOTV PAC
P.S. If you’re able, consider chipping in to help us prepare for the next race we jump into! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12022025]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12022025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=4ERzyjkmWi1SfqggzS2d6KxQKdr1fb4BY0mQlVGMDphCJHE26itAwEXo4gaVUn5%2B49odhtHH%2FrKIN6vlFge%2BfsP5wTAICcPizVwTqaeqxH78a9YCaJQp%2FmaSBbPmNIyveHCWFgeh1KQZTRIRnnR16BAAovYZs%2B%2Ft1bQYc80mpwF7ih8vYBRk1lQk%2FTPuRZxFZc86A8zg4VXvX3hrvViNJhd0TpOO%2B2HDxBaksbvAXHCQHI%2BDjadY3cLfTNR%2BKJmgixsmfu%2BDDvx9u1s9IMwAMOi05fyq7UA8OgXqTXnJ5Il%2BuSvOFyp3BjDRAvqVQJYOrHOKLvfht8IrMnGevrogW6KPttu%2B7W7X1zz2TyH8kym%2Fr7kuwqs2rU%2FXIWD3nbRjPtEiYGt7UtN0heIKRHU5OVza6ZthtBixlWZ%2Bm2xrsOI%3D .

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7e6eb8a00d5d49dfa07d00b1187fbb72&_e=XSYhZJwhnLtaWZOhB7QfMUT0QCkGBImmxvPk3NZUPjkvHQ4YJc-HTZAWvjLl9g-ZEUg2AvSaESiGmvq399n1IAlLPRHtIo-HylMxmFt2xYMTmDNwDx1oLqiypibxFe5bfJA-EIsAd3HjK_Bu3w7lDEvyyJQrtdo-N88kAeo2YvM2RFiKPxWv0UEEgOFVtykHSYoiUW7_N2yekMAXAMF9g1Z9CMVdsY1MjeE8-kqawx3nGW2iWpdZeZLoScxm39ngR8oNmS9L7EvwbjpQC88yKRF4YCdjsb0EIv4VvcGYl9Jfdyk-iUeT8WNm6J4U192xuE21_OS-Qm9SiA5a20Fcok6jRck7lN9Nz_ZS8VNIrKdZXcIgJWT2cgTUb1TRq7g2ta5oF59rYdanLdiXqmv2wf63pmZ3PEu15RCXNuF7OEMQjElaS8arXCjCCFj13wE0hn5MCt-XLIPXWMuKkW9K__iV-hr8sJf3BdMNE6qN4cBeeVKfiN8KcVKWR-hDQJzNS1C4x4XoM1IGfeC-2IVUBaUar0IaQgv7KxpQLm79YPTHLiz3YUxx9h0jLYcS4H_a4yAjWnoIhBppe2hHCOktNFh03Uw0b7GCx_KGK2oGC8AHMCCzg40PEwGX-yPXcg2t7M_1o9gDixSSaPJrKIsq446WJ6l5rkHGI7BEs7bAvToc-dFgMvPxc5yLHG7aNk45bCaLqxBNKpQEqpDxp1nNKg%3D%3D) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because BRAVE Books is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... Friend, BRAVE Books has introduced Mouse in the House as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends atBRAVE Books knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created Mouse in the House to help parents emphasize the joy of giving more than getting in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,Mouse in the House sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand. | | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | You understand that BRAVE Books is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse: " So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. " I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan " I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F. Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture. And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it. Your gift helps BRAVE Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that's why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the Mouse in the House Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. BRAVE Books is working round the clock to get enough Mouse in the House Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. BRAVE Books would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. You're bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America, | | Sincerely, Kirk Cameron P.S. Friend, it's only November and we're already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle to counter the Left's secular interpretation of this most blessed season. And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own Mouse in the House for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|---

Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. =** | | | Paid for by Lofgren for Congress Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please .

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: An announcement from me
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251202-1672-foote&t=1001&akid=1672%2E342411%2EZ2SXAR ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, I wanted to
reach out to you all directly to share an update.

Hearing from so many people throughout Massachusetts encouraging me to run
for the United States Senate was deeply humbling and a testament to the
strength of our movement.

I feel heartened and encouraged by the coalition that has emerged
encouraging me to take a look at this, and seeing the strong path to
victory, I spent deliberate time giving a statewide run the careful
consideration it deserves.

Ultimately, at this moment, I feel called to my community and my family.
Our district, the Massachusetts 7th, is squarely in the crosshairs of the
Trump White House. The fear and trauma felt in our communities and across
the country right now is all too real — and I am resolved to continue
fighting for my district.

So I’m proud to formally share that I’m running for re-election to the
House of Representatives in 2026. And as a reminder, this movement doesn’t
organize for the sake of a single electoral cycle — but with an eye on
generations to come.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251202-pressley-split-movement.3rb2u1&refcode=em20251202-1672&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1672%2E342411%2EZ2SXAR ]So if you’re able, will you please split a contribution between The
Squad Victory Fund and our campaign to kick off the next phase of our work
with the strongest possible momentum behind us?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251202-pressley-split-movement.3rb2u1&refcode=em20251202-1672&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1672%2E342411%2EZ2SXAR ]Contribute ››

In this next term, I plan to continue standing in the gap and holding the
line against this hostile White House that means harm to everyone in our
district and country. That means:

* Fighting back against the White House’s attacks on the LGBTQ+
community, Black and brown folks, federal workers, and our immigrant
neighbors.
* Continuing to use my committee roles to conduct oversight and make
progress on everything from housing affordability, AI and crypto
oversight, to accountability for survivors of Epstein’s abuse.
* Leading the Reproductive Freedom Caucus to protect and expand abortion
access with a House majority.
* Continuing to advance bold, comprehensive policies that meet the
moment and address the affordability crisis — like lowering the cost
of housing, investing in affordable childcare, ending the pushout of
Black women from the workforce, closing the racial wealth gap, and
more.

These are not nice-to-haves, these are must-haves for the people I
represent in Massachusetts and folks across the country.

Now, more than ever, is the time to dig deep, to lean into mutual aid, and
to use every tool available to stand in the gap in defense of our
neighbors and our democracy. That’s exactly what this campaign is going to
do — and we’re going to keep powering our work like we always have: with
small-dollar, grassroots support.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251202-pressley-split-movement.3rb2u1&refcode=em20251202-1672&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1672%2E342411%2EZ2SXAR ]So if you can today, please split a donation to support The Squad
Victory Fund and our campaign to help kick off our 2026 campaign fighting
for bold action and transformative policies in Massachusetts and across
the country.

I am incredibly honored to have your support. Thank you for everything.

In solidarity,

Ayanna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1672%2E342411%2EZ2SXAR

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Coast Redwood & Giant Sequioa Ranges
subject: A message from the redwood ranges you love
body:
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Dear Peter,
We’ve invited you onto our trails and into the parks, but this is the first time we’ve come together to draft you an email. That’s how important this Giving TREESday triple-match is to us, your coast redwood and giant sequoia ranges.
DONATE NOW: ALL GIFTS MATCHED 2:1 [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
For centuries, we have stood witness to fire and flood, the ebb and flow of wildlife populations, human development and restoration, all the shifting seasons of the Earth. But these past several years have tested us like never before.
We’ve felt the heat of megafires, the thirst of drought, and the silence of disappearing species.
We have a long history, and we hope for a long future, but we need the work of Save the Redwoods League, and supporters like you, to make it a reality.
That’s why we’re so grateful to the League for launching the Redwood Resilience Fund and to the generous match donors who are tripling all gifts through midnight tonight.
Will you make your first gift to our friends at Save the Redwood League today?
Give now: Will you help heal us, the coast redwood and giant sequoia ranges, by making a triple-matched gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund? [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Your gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund will restore our burned sequoia groves and nurture young coast forests along the Pacific Coast. You will build corridors for wildlife to return, revive Indigenous stewardship that brings balance to the land, and redesign parks so everyone can find health and peace beneath our canopies.
Make a gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund this Giving TREESday, and your gift will go three times as far! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
Your care reaches into our root networks, up into the canopy, nurturing all the wildlife that lives in between. We want to thank you with a voice that moves from the ocean fog to the snow of the Sierras. Thank you, Peter.
Thanks for your support to heal us!
The Coast Redwood and Giant Sequioa ranges
Help restore and protect the redwoods
DONATE NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf-1]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
Save the Redwoods League
111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94104
United States

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Why would a candidate say stop giving me money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Want fewer fundraising emails and more progressive, young leaders? Here’s how we get there.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251202-1&t=1&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)
Hi Peter,
After Zohran Mamdani’s history-making win in New York City, every pundit, podcaster, and party gatekeeper has been scrambling for answers. How did a young progressive with no name ID, no establishment backing, and no corporate PAC money beat a former governor bankrolled by billionaires and become mayor of the nation’s largest city?
We _could_ just tell you. But what’s the fun in that? So here’s a quick pop quiz for you:
**Can you guess what _really_ powered Zohran Mamdani’s win? Was it...**
A. His charisma?
B. His laser focus on affordability?
C. A multigenerational beef against Andrew Cuomo?
D. A historic alliance with Curtis Sliwa’s cats?
E. **Or the public financing system that amplified small-dollar donations?**
If you guessed the last one — bingo. That’s right Peter! ⭐️
We’re not denying that Zohran’s charisma, message, and organizing mattered. But the reason he had a real shot — the reason voters even heard his message — is that New York City has **a public financing system that matches small donations and gives ordinary people, not billionaires, the power to fund campaigns.**
Zohran even had to make a video asking people to _stop sending him money_. That is UNHEARD OF in politics — but it was possible because of public financing.
That’s what helped level the playing field. That’s what allowed a young, unbought candidate to win the mayoral race — in the financial capital of the world and home to more billionaires than anywhere else — while running on an aggressively progressive platform with zero corporate PAC money. And it’s why national public financing would mean **far fewer emails like this one.**
Because here’s the truth: **without public financing, grassroots campaigns have no choice but to fundraise constantly.** Not because they want to — but because the alternative is letting corporate PACs, mega donors, and political machines decide who gets to run.
For young, community-rooted, working-class candidates, asking supporters like you for $5 isn’t optional. It’s _survival_. It’s the only way they can afford to run at all without selling out their communities or values. That’s why we email you so often, Peter: outside the few places with public financing, supporters like you are the _only_ path outsiders have into public service.
Now for your final pop quiz question: **How do we make wins like Zohran the norm, not a miracle?**
If you guessed:
_**“By electing more unbought progressive leaders who will fight for public financing and a government that works for people, not corporations,”...**_
**🎉 ding ding ding! 🎉**
**This is _exactly_ why Leaders We Deserve exists:** to help young, working-class leaders win power now, so they can fight for a better system and open doors for more leaders like themselves in the future.
But we can’t build that future without you, Peter. Until we win national public financing, this work happens one race — and one email — at a time.
**[Chip in $5 or whatever you can to elect the next generation of unbought progressive leaders and help build a democracy where regular people can actually afford to run for office.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251202_1_mamdani.Jq4P3c&refcode=em20251202-2899&amount=5&t=2&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251202_1_mamdani.Jq4P3c&amount=5&refcode=em20251202-2899&t=21&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)**
If you want more leaders like Zohran — and fewer emails like this — it starts here.
Thank you for your continued support.
— Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251202-1&t=22&refcode2=2899_587540_8b6ZPz&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2899%2E587540%2E8b6ZPz)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: From the bottom of my heart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I will never take your sacrifice for granted.
[](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=c4d427e5c2c3415680c95afc1949ac59&_e=Hw_uRf0HZlqYSl92wutw1hz4PnAqSSilnwyuArHarJahCL3W1xjzjfYYJgfRNAPiG-Lncb6TD4G4q-C4w_V0bV67s-r3dI_C77n4QQo_SBCiJiMh4jDF9hG54ZQhc81v9UU0WZPcI2TnYLbfICnil5P9F61ZLgMG0w9tWvKghARiuwBIs1u8XNMK_5mdNtHBF0Oxw_md10MF1dXXGsgIUNEeQKnne_hUVXFswFsG0e6nydiBOf1HTcgjKYYXnPtCrs0TBxk7rYv1lGgLEjiwvXIQTenrIi8OsBgQLZXlga9IyHGKf5RcUtrEq0QCnuJUjuqiLiJ4-pB_-SNnscI5gQhsHkdtqoWdJkqBlFQxNK4lQ0lg5hCkfcFBS8TUpj1dT6YbViMCnlHGiJGLzrLemmiV-3Me_NHAmEMOAW0HvQFm9Ee5FpyLsmglGbyYSHX-gEWVL76eBI-PV7NlV2frnuaq3srPhhrcbza54yeloS70MfgXmYLJQ0_FzHv1aJGlGSjEWeZU2ekQNs0Fn9WVn8TAPw82EJUGdOh8b2SGQlknxcSCOzIspnD1TeKvLbMG7ijUYYO4TPW2lhsKqqfiko3APDWaGOvu-Ubmop5ZcU0Y7xkdol3TD6L_xqxPJPHwswy0BLOs9SDRNUfJt46gDZCsz-oQdlSxHO9AUcTSG3IrqLnVbPE-9_Z7-bMg7RElJ8VVIWsHimPZyR8_APRMIYwbeK4xZ7ixeU84tZNr-g06M7Fcjgwb5ZPznjyI34u0) Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks.
But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=c4d427e5c2c3415680c95afc1949ac59&_e=Hw_uRf0HZlqYSl92wutw1hz4PnAqSSilnwyuArHarJahCL3W1xjzjfYYJgfRNAPiG-Lncb6TD4G4q-C4w_V0bV67s-r3dI_C77n4QQo_SBCiJiMh4jDF9hG54ZQhc81v9UU0WZPcI2TnYLbfICnil5P9F61ZLgMG0w9tWvKghARiuwBIs1u8XNMK_5mdNtHBF0Oxw_md10MF1dXXGsgIUNEeQKnne_hUVXFswFsG0e6nydiBOf1HTcgjKYYXnPtCrs0TBxk7rYv1lGgLEjiwvTmdQPg1MX5RpKoSM5PSf1R590HyAqHLWZw8VpiOU1E2yRC5WIABoa2fQMFu-Xrvz54iJofWXffdjC0SDdEndZuHB_eLrp6yZpwZiT1AXTMhuF3GUxTtG-Lnpx56CsOa6PJOouMlfzqdd_UPn7qnPHgJbLwdxxVtBJFhEk4XaLEYScBePoq5sOV9h4laotrA_DjETzscUCKVW4Od12Q3ncYleyUCl-jfISWz58afR7px9Rp_PNEtRZfUSVY_oqTJdepSqwtAQ8BEd6VyK2qKcnRZpsoAo6fu9gcKNPNinpFFd7RIbO_LQFBQaGC8QVg3LWKz9BtMWxttlguZZtQFOlEdmvEgFsLpuQrbBSOD2EcKktibWjD1GXIZcelkFCcIwlnSFvkUaeuFLJImN_Z1-DHHZa7Qp0Y0HRIdxVEvH5EEIBkT7ifktHIg0OX6wkON8AW2E3aqD2qLdqF31Oake0OPMCQ0W4bGvrxQxFZcHqgR)

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That's why this race means so much. So if you've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. Always grateful, Vivek Ramaswamy If the election were held today, we 'd come up just short. We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.
