name: LCV MIDNIGHT DEADLINE
subject: 🆘 Giving Tuesday is almost over — and there are just hours left to help stop Trump’s attacks on the environment
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMyNTE1MDYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDAzMzQ1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv. We’re running out of time, Peter. Hundreds of people from around the country have stepped up today for Giving Tuesday, but we’re still running short of the 1,000 members we need to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work before midnight tonight. And with the Trump administration accelerating some of the most extreme anti-environment, pro-polluter attacks in modern history,falling short is simply not an option. We’re asking you, Peter: will you renew your LCV membership right now while membership is only $5 to help us unlock an additional $100,000 to oppose the Trump administration’s attempts to exploit our public lands and roll back climate progress? https://links.messages.lcv. This isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about having the resources we need to challenge these increasingly reckless orders and attempts to shred environmental safeguards — and stop the polluter handouts that Trump and his allies are fast-tracking. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Every single person who steps up today is critical to our efforts — here’s why this Giving Tuesday is so important: Trump is trying to erase the scientific and legal foundation of climate action. By dismantling the Endangerment Finding, which affirms that greenhouse gas emissions harm our health and welfare, Trump’s EPA would hand fossil fuel companies a free pass to spew climate pollution into our air. He’s also ending the program that required big polluters to report their pollution, making it nearly impossible to track what they’re spewing or hold them accountable.
Decades of established pollution protections are being peeled away. More than a dozen rules that keep toxic pollution out of the air we breathe and water we drink to protect our health are on the chopping block, tossed aside to allow fossil fueled power plants to cut corners and shift the burden of their damage onto our communities.
The Trump administration is giving away the Arctic to corporate polluters, working to allow more drilling in one of the planet’s last intact ecosystems. Mining roads carved through national parks and preserves. Fire-sale auctions in critical ecosystems. Hundreds of millions of acres of U.S. waters off Alaska potentially opened to drilling. It could do irreparable damage to wildlife, our climate, and Alaska Native communities. We’re working every day with our 30 state affiliates, organizing on the ground, exposing backroom deals and corruption, rallying voters, and defending the treasured and unique places that define our country. But meeting this moment requires resources — especially as we go up against big polluters and fossil fuel opponents. This $100,000 match challenge, and how many people step up this Giving Tuesday, will determine how hard we can push back. Peter, your renewal right now powers our work to protect people and the planet. Will you renew before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep this movement strong when it matters most? $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrBz6~ Every contribution brings us closer. And the clock is ticking. Thanks for standing with us, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13251506&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDAzMzQ1MAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDAzMzQ1MAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13251506&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDAzMzQ1MAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDAzMzQ1MAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

clean_body: Peter- I had to photocopy this old, grainy photo so I could email it to you. I have lots of stories about a veteran, his flag, and his dog. After 20 years of defending America in the US Air Force, from training Military Working Dogs in the K9 unit, to patrolling the border, to leading intelligence teams in war zones, I'm now answering a new call to serve. district, currently held by a liberal Democrat, is now the biggest GOP pick-up opportunity nationwide after our newly redrawn congressional maps. President Trump won it, and I'm confident that as a MAGA veteran, I can flip this seat with your help. The Democrats are desperate to win back the House, and holding TX-35 is virtually their only path. They can't afford to lose this seat. If we can hold the line in Texas, their path to House control practically EVAPORATES INTO THIN AIR! That's why the Democrats... Raised nearly a billion dollars online Spent $10 million to turn Texas blue * Deployed 30,000 operatives to destroy Texas Republicans Listen- I'm not a career politician; I'm a humble warfighter who's answered the call to serve. I don't have a donor network or an army of fundraisers. I have a servant's heart and a soldier's spirit. I'm a political newcomer, so every dollar you can spare would mean a great deal to me personally. I promise to spend your gift wisely. that I've formally announced my candidacy, I ask that you join this campaign and become one of my first donors. I'll always remember the good patriots who support me from the very beginning. Will you stand with me today and help flip TX-35 to the Republican column? I'll be forever grateful for your support. God bless you. God bless Texas. God bless America. Aim High... Fly-Fight-Win, Carlos De La CruzMAGA Conservative for Congress, TX-35 | | Paid for by Carlos for Congress Carlos De La Cruz is a former member of the United States Air Force. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of War or its particular military departments. 830 North Blvd, Unit 2072 Universal City, Texas 78148 To unsubscribe from Carlos for Congress |

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Coming together for our community
body:
| | Peter,

First, I want to thank you for pitching in ahead of our end-of-month deadline. I know it’s a tough time of year for a lot of hardworking families, and your support means more than you know.

Budgets are tight for so many people right now. Groceries, childcare, housing, you name it – let alone the holiday season that can stretch families thin. But Giving Tuesday is one of those rare chances for us to come together in the spirit of kindness and generosity and make a real difference close to home.

Just a couple dollars, or an hour of your time, can go a long way for the organizations keeping our communities strong, especially the most vulnerable among us.

Here are a few in Southwest Washington I hope you’ll consider supporting:

**FISH Vancouver**
They help ensure families don’t go hungry. Last year they served over 45,000 households and distributed more than 2.1 million pounds of food. You can donate funds online, drop off food at 906 Harney in Vancouver, or sign up to volunteer.
👉 [**fishvancouver.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120488061/586468808/-105584436?refcode=MGP_EM_EN_90DO_251202_1_1&refcode2=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjdhNTVhNC1mOGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjj0Zu-3U0PAelpgI1UAMUDcPFEgG-ZzoWB274K9oig=&emci=a4e1df2e-f7cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)

**SELF WA (Support for Early Learning and Families)**
Childcare shouldn’t be a crisis, but it is. SELF WA is tackling it head-on. They recruit and support new childcare providers and help strengthen early learning programs across Southwest Washington.
👉 [**selfwa.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120488062/586468809/-1345713032?refcode=MGP_EM_EN_90DO_251202_1_1&refcode2=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjdhNTVhNC1mOGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjj0Zu-3U0PAelpgI1UAMUDcPFEgG-ZzoWB274K9oig=&emci=a4e1df2e-f7cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)

**EOCF (Educational Opportunities for Children and Families)**
EOCF provides nutrition, early learning, and family resources so kids can grow and families can thrive.
👉 [**eocfwa.org**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120488063/586468810/-184316205?refcode=MGP_EM_EN_90DO_251202_1_1&refcode2=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjdhNTVhNC1mOGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjj0Zu-3U0PAelpgI1UAMUDcPFEgG-ZzoWB274K9oig=&emci=a4e1df2e-f7cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)

**Cascadia Tech Academy Foundation**
They provide essential tools, equipment, and scholarships so students can train with up-to-date, industry-ready technology. This is a huge boost for young people preparing for high-demand and high-skill careers.
👉 [**cascadiatechfoundation.org/o/ctaf**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120488064/586468811/-373197770?refcode=MGP_EM_EN_90DO_251202_1_1&refcode2=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjdhNTVhNC1mOGNmLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hjj0Zu-3U0PAelpgI1UAMUDcPFEgG-ZzoWB274K9oig=&emci=a4e1df2e-f7cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=267a55a4-f8cf-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31138575)

Southwest Washingtonians show up for their neighbors. Today’s a good reminder of how powerful that simple act can be.

If you’re able to give a few dollars or volunteer your time, it truly makes a difference.

Thanks for everything you do to keep our community strong, Peter. I’m grateful to be in this with you.

– Marie

clean_body: | | Peter, First, I want to thank you for pitching in ahead of our end-of-month deadline. I know it’s a tough time of year for a lot of hardworking families, and your support means more than you know. Budgets are tight for so many people right now. Groceries, childcare, housing, you name it – let alone the holiday season that can stretch families thin. But Giving Tuesday is one of those rare chances for us to come together in the spirit of kindness and generosity and make a real difference close to home. Just a couple dollars, or an hour of your time, can go a long way for the organizations keeping our communities strong, especially the most vulnerable among us. Here are a few in Southwest Washington I hope you’ll consider supporting: FISH Vancouver They help ensure families don’t go hungry. Last year they served over 45,000 households and distributed more than 2.1 million pounds of food. You can donate funds online, drop off food at 906 Harney in Vancouver, or sign up to volunteer. 👉 SELF WA (Support for Early Learning and Families) Childcare shouldn’t be a crisis, but it is. SELF WA is tackling it head-on. They recruit and support new childcare providers and help strengthen early learning programs across Southwest Washington. 👉 EOCF (Educational Opportunities for Children and Families) EOCF provides nutrition, early learning, and family resources so kids can grow and families can thrive. 👉 Cascadia Tech Academy Foundation They provide essential tools, equipment, and scholarships so students can train with up-to-date, industry-ready technology. This is a huge boost for young people preparing for high-demand and high-skill careers. 👉 Southwest Washingtonians show up for their neighbors. Today’s a good reminder of how powerful that simple act can be. If you’re able to give a few dollars or volunteer your time, it truly makes a difference. Thanks for everything you do to keep our community strong, Peter. I’m grateful to be in this with you. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. MGP Victory Fund PO Box 1164 Washougal, WA 98671 United States

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97hn77al25mlvpgktrmr3j6rfnk0vbvv7etiedo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhbl6v9n0ueiq441j68qd7okt0llqqnd17ihr9sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkg3oof4ibt2j8aetb77n068gabkr1i0pt8hbne0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.”
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1cfj3aa2auo9bcj9no4rt1piluhb7vgoghn598_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0mug11f1qsb4sqghubkoqurk4676bga4as7ek8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsa77s4f8s5l7lcjh25q57u762fncu1fq7o17f0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqp5fnddh89aonj41shrd48en3fn6t8h7765nl0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqe6238oumqn9s1rc55pmor9j8mrobtbo1rj4qg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfh7gu0sbir53ta15602bigocv63mb1oo1qo1f50_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb6jtu9ojfjg71quqjpv98cmi9cuqn172lfins30_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmc07ql1cq4ek5j0gqlma72aif3u24c712d94sr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2i9gv1ng720ba8lhqn6m6ocmjovmu7s8dn6aadg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztk4h80v1245dehm4i7f7sqf5ujucu6kk1tc0o40_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znh1kdvhsvsk9g9cnrhooo64aanknbfveju2ng20_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cthm0pb2clh2bs)

Thank you,

James

clean_body: I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. | | | Friend, I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers.” Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.” Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O’Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **[Indiana GOP reveals redistricting map that may flip seats in the House](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Republicans in Indiana have developed a redistricting map that could lead to two more seats for their party in the U.S. House if they are able to pass it into law.President Donald Trump has called on state Republicans to redistrict congressional maps in order to strengthen the party's position ahead of the midterm elections in 2026. If passed, the proposed map could mean Indiana has nine Republican representatives in Congress and zero Democrats, instead of the current seven Republicans and two Democrats.

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_FLB6a6ESQ-lUrjDnxzM7FxMulgpLmwAQpeZAgjIElZxWifI-8tpj9yb-Kd5cDzreXH7kz74lBUqmKexsLG1gXl5PH9MclX-NNh1n6LWYyIXttiXwh9HWwIp4fJTwGB7_v6UbO8cTwO3bALhHxsWzAEDTJqS3qQvW5GljzRqOu4zErEb_c_wXfYKjxXToApZ3JrIVo2und9UX1ub8fUfD4iJTpSicNw&c=z8n8Ntc7rbn-o9zPdtquNinkfwWYeLsK6A26G8rd--XgQ6OWkoYjkA==&ch=AIFVOqbG7VbHj9JZkXoS_ebUy3fIZt4x3o1fC6R1u7KcNd_BuZq5pA==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_FLB6a6ESQ-lUrjDnxzM7FxMulgpLmwAQpeZAgjIElZxWifI-8tpj9yb-Kd5cDzreXH7kz74lBUqmKexsLG1gXl5PH9MclX-NNh1n6LWYyIXttiXwh9HWwIp4fJTwGB7_v6UbO8cTwO3bALhHxsWzAEDTJqS3qQvW5GljzRqOu4zErEb_c_wXfYKjxXToApZ3JrIVo2une1N9lkKBEXzj4gkYWJn7P6&c=z8n8Ntc7rbn-o9zPdtquNinkfwWYeLsK6A26G8rd--XgQ6OWkoYjkA==&ch=AIFVOqbG7VbHj9JZkXoS_ebUy3fIZt4x3o1fC6R1u7KcNd_BuZq5pA==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_FLB6a6ESQ-lUrjDnxzM7FxMulgpLmwAQpeZAgjIElZxWifI-8tpj9yb-Kd5cDzreXH7kz74lBUqmKexsLG1gXl5PH9MclX-NNh1n6LWYyIXttiXwh9HWwIp4fJTwGB7_v6UbO8cTwO3bALhHxsWzAEDTJqS3qQvW5GljzRqOu4zErEb_c_wXfYKjxXToApZ3JrIVo2und1BNME1bAm_9T_dj2VrPpC&c=z8n8Ntc7rbn-o9zPdtquNinkfwWYeLsK6A26G8rd--XgQ6OWkoYjkA==&ch=AIFVOqbG7VbHj9JZkXoS_ebUy3fIZt4x3o1fC6R1u7KcNd_BuZq5pA==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_FLB6a6ESQ-lUrjDnxzM7FxMulgpLmwAQpeZAgjIElZxWifI-8tpj9yb-Kd5cDzuo3sCoVdgCz2FzZWQL6pJ6BRr95kG4Hf47dKCqzXEZLJOI0W8H2pHXDlL19-elGdki0iHB-d59uB7f_Le5smJnb4v_v5DZkKvWrQ3-Xn0I8b5VQa_F8ySa2urvAqJIVzbQpSBSogC3r3FQ1K9SawoQ18NT6_y6X7AIwSI1LU7BQ=&c=z8n8Ntc7rbn-o9zPdtquNinkfwWYeLsK6A26G8rd--XgQ6OWkoYjkA==&ch=AIFVOqbG7VbHj9JZkXoS_ebUy3fIZt4x3o1fC6R1u7KcNd_BuZq5pA==)

clean_body: Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test. | | | | | == | Peter, My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury. He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English. | == After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream. When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into. | | == | From him, I learned three important lessons: Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance. Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.) * The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it. That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday. With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Gratefully, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Team Downing
subject: Elon Musk Calls for National Voter ID. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to wait for our elections to fix themselves.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-d50CD66-heQA)Peter,
The integrity of our electoral process is fundamental to the survival of our democracy. Now, one of the world's most influential voices is demanding immediate, commonsense action to ensure every legal vote is counted and election results are trusted.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._jDLnhosQiY4C5jN7g3yGQ)In his recent statements, the world's richest man laid out four essential safeguards that every American should be able to agree on to ensure election transparency and security:
1. Voter ID to stop fraud before it starts
2. Paper ballots to verify every vote
3. Same-day voting to keep the process secure
4. Proof of citizenship to protect the integrity of every election

These aren’t radical or partisan ideas. They’re simple, commonsense protections that are standard practice in developed democracies worldwide.**
**Now more than ever, securing our elections must be Congress’s top priority. Our majority, the integrity of our democracy, and President Trump’s America First agenda ALL DEPEND on delivering on this urgent voter ID mandate.
Peter, we’re begging you: [Please add your name today if you agree it's time to lock down our elections, restore trust in the vote, and support Elon Musk's call for mandatory national election standards:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-laQ)[PROTECT OUR ELECT – SIGN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-KJf0OcbDy0-igpgg)The integrity of every future election cycle rests in the hands of Patriots who are unwilling to compromise on the fundamental principles of our Republic.

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Downing | |

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-aljtuut-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Apparently, losing to Senator Ron Johnson wasn't enough to send radical Mandela packing; now he's taking a run at governor.That's right: after Wisconsin voters soundly rejected him in 2022, Mandela Barnes still didn't get the message. Here's just a taste of the extreme agenda Mandela Barnes will bring to the Governor's mansion:
* Proudly campaigned for Bernie Sanders' government-takeover Medicare for All and the job-killing Green New Deal that would crush Wisconsin farmers, manufacturers, and small businesses.
* Pushed to eliminate cash bail, the same dangerous policy that put the Waukesha Christmas parade killer back on the streets, and repeatedly flirted with "defund the police" rhetoric while crime exploded in Democrat-run cities.
* Wore "Abolish ICE" T-shirts and supported redirecting money away from law enforcement, putting the safety of illegal immigrants and criminals ahead of Wisconsin families.
* Helped incite the violent 2020 Kenosha riots with reckless statements, siding with rioters and chaos instead of law enforcement and order.
* Attacked President Trump for "tax cuts for billionaires" while refusing to answer questions about his own delinquent property taxes and literally walking out of interviews when pressed on it.

Wisconsin families can't afford four years of this extremism in Madison.We need a Governor who puts hardworking Wisconsinites first, not far-left donors, rioters, and open-borders activists. [SEND MANDELA PACKING](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-aljtuut-didthutlhu-y/) That's why we're counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to help us stop Mandela Barnes and the radical Left before they destroy everything we love about our state.Can you [chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-aljtuut-didthutlhu-j/) right now to help us fight back and keep Wisconsin red?Every dollar you give today will go directly toward exposing Mandela Barnes' dangerous record and making sure Wisconsin never has a far-left governor.Thank you for standing with us,-Team WisGOPP.S. name: The Flyover
subject: Russia Meeting, Hallmark Christmas Towns, and a Backyard Elk Herd
body:

# Wednesday, December 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1910, the world’s first neon lights were turned on for public display at the Paris Motor Show by French inventor Georges Claude. [Take a look at the video here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQfXeEMHioVGVLhy4dkYMv4VoDkX0E5e0r-gpdv0_6Df-vS38JkmS-f4SJvd6WfuatJFbl3Oe1FAkTs8p8H0NKU8g_w5ilBwvNwcHBYh-DpFdPVfQ3ZmCs2Lv2SG3TdUDV6CkGiwCBI7nWnVpkitgMga4dXwNiJX7XHFh0zjaANXGH0DiyZC0Np86Q5Si65Pp7kVlHvqXX8uRcD8tUJT-qPorBNwNnA-dt2-rXsup65f3fl6DDaPD8NPj-WQq51q4qpco-PjZJScqxNWTvU5D0R-q_Ojw9_AYAAP__t5pwgg) We’re inviting you to make our Christmas edition extra special! What are your favorite Christmas memories or traditions? Reply to this email and share your festive moments with us. Please include your first name and city so we can give you credit when we publish some of your replies on Christmas. If you believe in second chances and the power of true redemption, this story from today's sponsor, [Prison Fellowship International](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7HgAXZcUKwUucu2W1oYnu23A8YCnCh_P8oofzDt0dXR1fl3n-6WAu3rXxvR1CVNOz5LwFoxT_kshWxErLSvmw0h2vzltkwTcNAXARcuJ28pvCbVeLMgAsoGjeg71ethANVsph-gE4NexFV3Mzh1dZrrTnTaAcoZ-obM2yaASyG4BtkqHCRoobjiXLnrwBRHTzXl9n-ivW64hFd6YG5dik0wW61HYfIPg5HBeCzUprwyGH3abUUGY7DxCLRuFfN7I8ezxqmkMztk8vaRMejeOKKnMzJ5Oyz5D3M2HpbWncnbc57LEl7Wc9Vk448nhUCl65nia7QUfi7VX3V8GPgOAAD__7dfhqg), shows how your support can transform lives even in the darkest places.

## Putin Meets Trump Envoys in Moscow
U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and [President Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE8DmZFpmh8HDjaZbDbdEHlMM_RibGSbQezpV7x3hJd-JZXqqz_P8WnYsX__NhvpPIfR05kc5UxxjEdKbDaizP69GOc2E1e7RB5BQitqELIZJ8PuGrGc9EwE1JSk677DvlUKsFz0a5rBdKrrqZmHFtRg4aU6xB7Bouxkyfpuq0E2dS1baCok1UBbo0Qp0Q6qQEkT5xCrv4F9Xmh2V_hQrGzYSqeXnPdUNL8KeBTwOM-z8i97W9z5TUJ0UwGPb5sbcF7DPIstJBtOsR-ZvTjWaNiT2MlYEtm4NYkcj20X_8iRT-t1iWi9AewUDGXU036yc5y6vkD53gy7rz35Ryd-NPwPAAD__4-6h28) met with Russian President Vladimir Putin at the Kremlin on Tuesday to present a revised 19-point peace plan that Ukrainian officials tentatively agreed to after weekend talks in Florida. The White House said it was "very optimistic" about the high-stakes meeting, which comes after two weeks of intense diplomacy around President Trump's proposal to end the nearly four-year war. Prior to the meeting, Putin [warned that Russia is](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOnDAQBNCvMTcju20WfPAhUoSUw-aaI_JAA501NrJ7Bs3fR-QX9lxSqV79-Zw-A0VK2-9woOc1TwmvGpEZy1SetVI4EJnStocYj1C-5r3QBAo6qUEqMy2B4nuyzeJXREDToNf9h-0758A2uwfTQ--W4dHPajardv3DIXZKB6eHYIaG_N2mQRmtVQemtegMdNoqq5SdByeswoU4l_ZvpsQ7rvGdX1jaOR9N9DvzWYX5IWAUMIbHfAvaLd-xgPFXYiwpMOUUooDxfDIleRF_5XWVZ8EzFJQ3Ul47Mco9PyvKfDIdVJlmAWPlXN7CjLQI81PDoKAbuqEpfjkvipHqRy-s2o5A8f8o_taTLw__AgAA___F2YfU) "ready right now" to fight if Europe seeks war, accusing European leaders of trying to sabotage peace talks by demanding changes to President Trump's proposal. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky [said he expects to](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO3CAQRk-DO1Yw4PXvgmKjyEWkP4qSIqXFwtieGIMFeK29feRcIdUUTxp97_3-HD8tBYrzd7uhqVMaI54lYK2Yx3yUQnZDrBTnxYaw2by6JdMIAlougQs1ekvhPerGmwkRUDVoZHfXXdv3oJvFyKfT6um9sM5NbXuHZ29d36newoeeQDVkrm8ShJJStKBuGnsFrdRCC6HdR8-0QE815dufRLEuOIV3emG-ubQ1wSy17oWpB4OBwXCe520r8WIMBoz8KAyGS-qCKQd_XaprmiZuo-frUZaImV-afD8qRV4T91TcUQo_1mwpIt_ROuR7sJHBYDN_POTP94_5G1NDcuSZ-vrliohn-YV5b7Lx-0khULl3TIt5sxT-za3_1fhl4G8AAAD__6mBkdU) hear from Witkoff and Kushner immediately after their Putin meeting, with the U.S. envoys expected to brief him in Europe on Wednesday.
## Dells Pledge $6.25B to Kid Savings Accounts
Michael Dell and his wife, Susan Dell, [pledged $6.25 billion to seed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMRmoaRsYBw4uIZtLL0Qe04x92zYj2wyav1-xv7BJJSW9kurffbnbwCE9_9pIpm77kugsTLVSXvJRSrCRqIb09JY52vzlfA4LAg5tjy3IZbWBP4tqVrMRIcmGTD-Nahq0RtV446TVo9Mb4LRND6c0DfYmAQY5gh7HoQnm0noE2fcwoOwUaYlDr0ABKHfTQgGtoe65-7-HVD1t_NnflDu3x4aNr_VVhPwjcBY4n-fZufRwVylwvmiBc48CZ7giBuctcVuOYlO7EnNb8xFfrXVuP1Itna-Rm2zW1xmYQxknoeAZbeCfvfqrk94GvwMAAP__pjd5DA) new investment accounts, known as Trump Accounts, for roughly 25 million American children. Under the plan, Treasury will deposit $1,000 into accounts for children born between 2025 and 2028. The Dells’ donation provides [$250 for ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u9CAUAE9jd1jwwD8UFF_jbr82pcXC8_olGCzA6-zto80V0o9mpPm4LTdLgeLjv93R1DUtEa8SsFbMSz5LIbsjVoqPzYaw2_zltkwLcOiZAMbl4i2F16Jab1ZEQNmiEeOgxl5rUO1m3DSJYZJ64OidVgKsswPnSmqvAfnYknnbBHApBO9Bdgq1hF4orjhXbtKN4uipptx9Jop1wzW80hNz59LeBrPVepRG_mtgbmC-rqtb0_f9LBSxlDfTwHykQJVcaWDeyW0WAytnsZF5DIH5FG1FNjDo72w9o2c1n_vBrHPpjLW02fjjohCoDGOj-GO3FH7r9U_LngZ-AgAA__8RgIC-)[children 10 and under](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u9CAUAE9jd1jwwD8UFF_jbr82pcXC8_olGCzA6-zto80V0o9mpPm4LTdLgeLjv93R1DUtEa8SsFbMSz5LIbsjVoqPzYaw2_zltkwLcOiZAMbl4i2F16Jab1ZEQNmiEeOgxl5rUO1m3DSJYZJ64OidVgKsswPnSmqvAfnYknnbBHApBO9Bdgq1hF4orjhXbtKN4uipptx9Jop1wzW80hNz59LeBrPVepRG_mtgbmC-rqtb0_f9LBSxlDfTwHykQJVcaWDeyW0WAytnsZF5DIH5FG1FNjDo72w9o2c1n_vBrHPpjLW02fjjohCoDGOj-GO3FH7r9U_LngZ-AgAA__8RgIC-), targeting those who won’t receive government seed money, especially in ZIP codes with a median family income of $150,000 or less. Parents, relatives, employers, or nonprofits can contribute up to $5,000 per year starting July 2026, with money invested in index funds. When beneficiaries turn 18, funds can be used for education, buying a home, or starting a business. The Dells called the move “a simple yet very powerful idea,” encouraging other donors and businesses to join in as well. [See who qualifies here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvO2yAYxvGrwRsRJyf2wJCq8vZ1aIeOFoGX8LYcXMCx0quv3Fv45kf669Hv58f6YTBifn4zCXT3Zc1wtAi9Q13r3hqaBNAxP4OJMZn624aKq2BipFxQJldnML5XNTjtAQTIATS_XdVtnGehhqCZtZNxV8seSjFlHtIDGx9-8tME3NzmAfVZ44JJztko5EXBLMXIFVOMKTvNRDFw2Eu9_CqYewAf3-UF9WJLGqIOvW-NyDsRCxHLcRyX1PK5EbFApnsjYkklw5uIZYPaSjbRYzbZAhFLgAq00SMU-mc3ET1Co75U2gNQBzFSv2cHjva6p40aa8ue-9k0ld7v_Pvf9z0QuRSLjsivX05KONoPqNtQtdsOjBHb9UYUeyaD8f_p_inplxb_AgAA__-J05SC).
## Solar Flare Triggers US Storm Watch
A strong [solar flare erupted](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuhDAURL_GdEbGDx6FizR0mzYlujEXuBs_VrZ30f59RH4h3Ugjzeicr9tyA_IU908IaOuWlohn8Vgr5iU_SyEIiJXifoD3AfKPOzItUkjDO8mFWlYg_150s9oNUaJq0HZDrwczTVI3hx1hBGUcjMYM6LYeFPY4mGGaRm0GtTZkr7VOCtV1wkjVapyUNJ0WWgjtxolpgSvVlNt7olgP3Pw7vTC3LoXG26PWR2Hqg8mZyfk8z9Z9l4vi6pmcr8jkvGMKsEes5HipKQd-QnUHdymnCJ4HKIXjHV2lFHl5Rh6hAJNzk-36OMl7Kv3AtNgDkP_7rv8S9rLyNwAA__-kd4Cb) from a newly formed massive sunspot last Sunday, prompting the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) to issue a geomagnetic storm watch for Thursday. The flare [disrupted radio communications](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8Guj2ZxXBQuEhz3Z82JVqZBZxbbOQ1R-7to0se4W-mGWk03_fra_qiICGuP2lnV5Y0Rb5UuBTOUz5VA-3MJcR1I5Gd8tNvOUxosIMGwbTTTEHek61ntzAjtzW75t7bezeOaOvNDfehQ7IDWt-bYfT90GA7zL5vGe3Yd3Vwn7UGTds0psP2ZnlssWusscZYP4yVNTyHkvLtdwqxbLzIO70433zaa3FbKYdW7Y8KHxU-ruu66UGeP22FD9KSU0z7u8KHnvF_whmFSTdWONLFeTkF_oAXUgVNQhkWoczwjMk_Q1whnQUyzSGBhjWSKJDPSRXo1JJJAsHMHhr4oNTZzccVRIL298qadacg_86Wbxl-OfwbAAD__-SpkVg) across Australia and parts of Southeast Asia and was accompanied by a coronal mass ejection that could impact power grids, navigation signals, and radio systems. The agency says the timing of the disruption remains uncertain, and the storm could arrive as early as today, with additional activity possible as sunspot AR4299 rotates to face Earth this week.

**➤****President Trump** and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth revealed new details Tuesday about a strike on an alleged drug boat, with Hegseth saying he didn't see survivors after the first strike and wasn't watching when the second strike was ordered. The White House said it was "very optimistic" about the high-stakes meeting, which comes after two weeks of intense diplomacy around President Trump's proposal to end the nearly four-year war. Prior to the meeting, Putin "ready right now" to fight if Europe seeks war, accusing European leaders of trying to sabotage peace talks by demanding changes to President Trump's proposal. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky hear from Witkoff and Kushner immediately after their Putin meeting, with the U.S. envoys expected to brief him in Europe on Wednesday. Dells Pledge $6.25B to Kid Savings Accounts Michael Dell and his wife, Susan Dell, new investment accounts, known as Trump Accounts, for roughly 25 million American children. Under the plan, Treasury will deposit $1,000 into accounts for children born between 2025 and 2028. The Dells’ donation provides -, targeting those who won’t receive government seed money, especially in ZIP codes with a median family income of $150,000 or less. Parents, relatives, employers, or nonprofits can contribute up to $5,000 per year starting July 2026, with money invested in index funds. When beneficiaries turn 18, funds can be used for education, buying a home, or starting a business. The Dells called the move “a simple yet very powerful idea,” encouraging other donors and businesses to join in as well. . Solar Flare Triggers US Storm Watch A strong from a newly formed massive sunspot last Sunday, prompting the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) to issue a geomagnetic storm watch for Thursday. The flare across Australia and parts of Southeast Asia and was accompanied by a coronal mass ejection that could impact power grids, navigation signals, and radio systems. The agency says the timing of the disruption remains uncertain, and the storm could arrive as early as today, with additional activity possible as sunspot AR4299 rotates to face Earth this week. subject: Help me empower young people
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQRp8m7pQkFaO9yOJC467vdpZSE6s1kD9MtOm3H2yYB5hdQR0Oh-_rMT_QeRfX_xjI2NPNe5k38jkQhZxetL_TEddMKXuaJZd9K2TL4cJEsxi7aJANGTFoNWihhGo2g6MY-nFUQN8WR7yNeoBn3ys9LKDGvm-cuUxCchACuJAdLnC7PUmDksSBS6b4kResVDqbYqH9xOpOcjGm60qxsyk03my15sLgH5MTk1Mhe-zUYaQl1YtgcqobtVg9lrYk66i-mZwytmgvC4PpqGG2GDK6NTK4_3YxqT-fFCvFyuBuT9fsZskv570remCKrwGd_4TUPy93GvkTAAD__7pBfGA) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQRp8m7pQkFaO9yOJC467vdpZSE6s1kD9MtOm3H2yYB5hdQR0Oh-_rMT_QeRfX_xjI2NPNe5k38jkQhZxetL_TEddMKXuaJZd9K2TL4cJEsxi7aJANGTFoNWihhGo2g6MY-nFUQN8WR7yNeoBn3ys9LKDGvm-cuUxCchACuJAdLnC7PUmDksSBS6b4kResVDqbYqH9xOpOcjGm60qxsyk03my15sLgH5MTk1Mhe-zUYaQl1YtgcqobtVg9lrYk66i-mZwytmgvC4PpqGG2GDK6NTK4_3YxqT-fFCvFyuBuT9fsZskv570remCKrwGd_4TUPy93GvkTAAD__7pBfGA)
[Donate >>](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQRp8m7pQkFaO9yOJC467vdpZSE6s1kD9MtOm3H2yYB5hdQR0Oh-_rMT_QeRfX_xjI2NPNe5k38jkQhZxetL_TEddMKXuaJZd9K2TL4cJEsxi7aJANGTFoNWihhGo2g6MY-nFUQN8WR7yNeoBn3ys9LKDGvm-cuUxCchACuJAdLnC7PUmDksSBS6b4kResVDqbYqH9xOpOcjGm60qxsyk03my15sLgH5MTk1Mhe-zUYaQl1YtgcqobtVg9lrYk66i-mZwytmgvC4PpqGG2GDK6NTK4_3YxqT-fFCvFyuBuT9fsZskv570remCKrwGd_4TUPy93GvkTAAD__7pBfGA)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:

clean_body: I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo | | | Friend, I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

---
| Peter,
Soldiers are in our streets. ICE is kidnapping our neighbors from their homes. Grocery prices are skyrocketing, healthcare costs have spiraled out of control, and our economy sits at the brink of collapse.
The first year of Trump's presidency has been a disaster and Americans are pissed.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eAdBd9jKZ6A3TXKRJIZyPiNh2wLzfNerGvsZcE36nNTQpYfvG6DUpM2ALGJVkA2XbygPJk1QvwPrsXZuWXShzL3EG48y98W53CHVqNjmfqhKacdF2acNbk_M1hMSJljKWuC4_BV2u0v_Typ6QzHPgqbYUbRv1-CtHbJmSKVK6CWKkb3-GBP6rxKvu8fm0g6F1-q-DbRSTCUYmrkpV7v-jk89QGqjf20_&c=dzZv7-hJTOyICXuIBa8JuwcS6q12B9G9Efy6Bz0ecevlghxbjhBJxw==&ch=blsVS1XkwjsQj0UaT3MxHMjdRgwFOadTQ_6IPQmQiu3D-Oe7dj0xnw==)
---
Meanwhile, Trump couldn't care less--he's throwing lavish Great Gatsby-themed parties for the elite at Mar-a-Lago, demolishing the East Wing to erect a ballroom in his name, and even remodeling the White House in gaudy, gold-plated decor.
Despite historic unpopularity and massive losses in elections across the country in November, Trump continues to practically mock Americans.
He sees the polls. He hears the backlash. But he isn't fazed. That's because Trump and MAGA are planning to cheat to keep their stranglehold on power, the will of the people be damned.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eAdBd9jKZ6A3TXKRJIZyPiNh2wLzfNerGvsZcE36nNTQpYfvG6DUpM2ALGJVkA2XbygPJk1QvwPrsXZuWXShzL3EG48y98W53CHVqNjmfqhKacdF2acNbk_M1hMSJljKWuC4_BV2u0v_Typ6QzHPgqbYUbRv1-CtHbJmSKVK6CWKkb3-GBP6rxKvu8fm0g6F1-q-DbRSTCWb78tRk_5tweu3fr4-rZQE&c=dzZv7-hJTOyICXuIBa8JuwcS6q12B9G9Efy6Bz0ecevlghxbjhBJxw==&ch=blsVS1XkwjsQj0UaT3MxHMjdRgwFOadTQ_6IPQmQiu3D-Oe7dj0xnw==)
---

Trump's plot to rig 2026 is already in motion. Gerrymandered maps have now passed in Texas, North Carolina, and Missouri to lock in GOP control, and a push for redistricting is currently underway in Indiana and Florida with more red states soon to follow.
Last month, California voters approved a ballot measure to fight fire with fire, countering the GOP's schemes. But that math alone isn't enough to overcome the red-state onslaught.
That is where Fair Fight Colorado comes in: we are launching the ballot measure that will give every Coloradan a chance to vote on a new Congressional map to level the playing field and protect our democracy.
We have the power to stop Trump's power grab, but we need to move fast.
Getting this on the ballot requires an astronomically expensive push for signatures and a statewide campaign to combat the lies MAGA is about to spew. They will throw everything they have at stopping us because they know this map is the firewall against their permanent majority.
[We need you in this fight with us: will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us fight fire with fire?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eAdBd9jKZ6A3TXKRJIZyPiNh2wLzfNerGvsZcE36nNTQpYfvG6DUpM2ALGJVkA2Xwc_9B3Gct5Fp0xd49SujhaUBVVsr4fjEtbjm6sWT05m7KhOjyIuZ3a9tSDXQxImkKXuLzcl76tsLT3vvTLH15hKUY-lvIzWjB9Gr7QeE3hJlVXtD-SqMsSJWknVHL0ZI6Nc9N_g6ZvhqPIMbq3ftS7vV8-dpZtLjYIR7cVII01Q=&c=dzZv7-hJTOyICXuIBa8JuwcS6q12B9G9Efy6Bz0ecevlghxbjhBJxw==&ch=blsVS1XkwjsQj0UaT3MxHMjdRgwFOadTQ_6IPQmQiu3D-Oe7dj0xnw==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Soldiers are in our streets. ICE is kidnapping our neighbors from their homes. Grocery prices are skyrocketing, healthcare costs have spiraled out of control, and our economy sits at the brink of collapse. The first year of Trump's presidency has been a disaster and Americans are pissed. | == Meanwhile, Trump couldn't care less--he's throwing lavish Great Gatsby-themed parties for the elite at Mar-a-Lago, demolishing the East Wing to erect a ballroom in his name, and even remodeling the White House in gaudy, gold-plated decor. Despite historic unpopularity and massive losses in elections across the country in November, Trump continues to practically mock Americans. He sees the polls. He hears the backlash. But he isn't fazed. That's because Trump and MAGA are planning to cheat to keep their stranglehold on power, the will of the people be damned. | == Trump's plot to rig 2026 is already in motion. Gerrymandered maps have now passed in Texas, North Carolina, and Missouri to lock in GOP control, and a push for redistricting is currently underway in Indiana and Florida with more red states soon to follow. Last month, California voters approved a ballot measure to fight fire with fire, countering the GOP's schemes. But that math alone isn't enough to overcome the red-state onslaught. That is where Fair Fight Colorado comes in: we are launching the ballot measure that will give every Coloradan a chance to vote on a new Congressional map to level the playing field and protect our democracy. We have the power to stop Trump's power grab, but we need to move fast. Getting this on the ballot requires an astronomically expensive push for signatures and a statewide campaign to combat the lies MAGA is about to spew. They will throw everything they have at stopping us because they know this map is the firewall against their permanent majority. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == | | | | Let's save our Democracy while we still have a chance. -- Team Fair Fight Colorado | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | | | Donate by mail: Fair Fight Colorado 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 Denver, Colorado 80202 | | | Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado. # Wednesday, December 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1885, the _Dallas Morning News_ purchased its older rival, the _Dallas Herald_ , less than two months after it began publication. ([More](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOgzAQRb_GdKBhMK_CxTZ02XZL5McAIzk4wrMh_P0q-YWtTnWPrs7Pbb5Zjryv3_ZORl5Lmnc6cyQROuYOW7fyIkIvm93vlR2LT7zbGQHbssYSmjlYjtesi2AchLEuyNR9p_uuwQ6Kzeih7WEc0HvnqekHct56Iot-GXVwY8HmLasRmhoB2qHyoEE3ugvoLMIwKg0UWNJRyUafK0u80pOOyqd7Ec0m8siq-VI4KZzO86wkbzbtkXeq0rEqnD6rMtirdNcbCifa5XhzgOIw4XFyjJy7XmlY75bjxy3_K_I0-BcAAP__70R0wg)) If you've ever wanted to visit a castle, you can do that in Bellville, where local bakery owner Mike Newman labored for more than a decade to build a cinderblock-and-stucco fortress with a moat and drawbridge. Get the details [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEbD2Bhe4WIbumy7JbJhCJaMjfAQwt-vkl949b06Ojr_HuPDhRjS86_byPJ7yWOiq0RipmM02PpnWJjp7Yo_7-IDTzkkNyJgKxuUoMbZhXiPupqth_mnqcg2ndGdUWigWq1e2qlrPDndI_QKtJsapUFjtxhy4KtgP7AGQTUI0Pb1BBq00mZG7xD6H6GB5sD5qHmlr8oS7_yio57yVkW7Mu9FqD8CB4HDdV01vfeYD_rsAgcEZVrdCRwSXZtLRU6ucCT5ZUlPfBEl6c7CIck1n4VzknQeeSeXZOH7883nUQQO1WHn_QoxhmI6oeG5uRC_Ivy7fC-L_wMAAP__1E2EbQ). If you’re fascinated by the future of entertainment and love spotting big opportunities early, this glimpse into today's sponsor, [Elf Labs'](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2upCAQhZ8GdxooEHHBYpKb3t3ZzpKUgFoJ_kSw7X77iT2TeYHZnq9S5-T79e2-kRKt009coi2vcXNrvHKKpcTDaWiHicZS4gvzcL7zQMVvtKIDDm0toObSBaT0dqoKduChF1W0otOq0xI0r2aL7WhaDEKD92PQASSiAG-M7IXgUlVk72cCuBTAeWsazxVXUukAAwI3PVM8Birb0ZQ5fqaM6b0949H4bamSnUvZM5M_GDwYPK7ramIaEw755ncoH2dZXN7Ow0cmv-KClBjoO1xioHNh8mtHCvWOR1njkWfa_3KPy440rZ-Lf1AYXiveuT8CzpUKOtkbrTSoFkx12LBflBJl3THFp7vwM7b8n-Knhd8BAAD__5Ogjoc) groundbreaking princess franchises, is one you won’t want to miss.

## Universities Reviewing Course Content
Several Texas universities are [reviewing course content](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdBOZwQFeQZGG7m2x0mpLZOwBRnLMkz3B4e9X4Re2mpGudHTu_fs9fVsOHNdf9kmDvJd9ilRyIBFKU4v3eeVFhN42z68zzyxu52gn1HiHGkE3k7cczslUfpi1_6orGuquNV3bYKurbXBm6XC5-6ZrZ-Ncs7SdM_0yN3O_-M71FQ8fWI26qVHre39z2mjTmNbjbFH3X8po8ix7uslGl8oSzv2gdHP7swrDJvKTVfNQOCocSym3Z46fTOFIEV5Z4fgppXC8_gsBr8gHpczClMEmgkQHU-G4QrKOwEYPK0VPCdhTFJYT3B6FosBGiSBDua5sdEIWG73C0SZ4POrfZ9n-VGnwP4VD4Nx2yuj1aTlcyvJ_Qx8D_gsAAP__U8WUpg) that pertains to race and gender identity after a viral video of a classroom discussion led to the termination of a Texas A&M professor and the resignation of its president. Last month, Texas A&M University System regents announced that courses cannot "advocate race or gender ideology" without a campus president's approval. On Monday, Texas Tech University System Chancellor Brandon Creighton [announced](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGypCAQRb8GM6baFtEJDDYhe5tuaIG0Si0Db6FnHP9-y_mFl3f1Oafun6_5y4YY0vbbPmji95rnREeNxExl1ti7LazM9LbVPc_qAi85JDsjYC9blNDN3oZ4zqrxkwN_bxua2kGrQXeoodkn68ZVdYoGaLXG0TsPWq1Kr103WrqrJkzXsxahaxGgH28LKFCd0h6dRRjvQgH5wLnceKePyhrP_KJyW_KjidPO_F1F90ugEWiO47jFp3N5-ZtTDImuK4Gmci6nQHPlCTTkn4vlkJNAc_EFmhYFGmgFmg9EMi27rGdleshCkWylKpf8LJXkkhNTYnlp1LDtLAu9Ah2ysk3eFl-lpyDjxu6fQDMOfd_eYQQYBJqmTP77CDGGqgehYHvYED8x_LMJXhP-DwAA__8O9Znv) that instructors cannot promote "activism on issues related to race or sex." The UT System and the UNT System are currently reviewing course content to ensure "compliance and alignment" with state and federal directives. TCU will roll its [women and gender studies](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpTAQhE9jMqOm-XsEDjYhm003RP5pwJKxkd0M826_4l1hsiqpVPWp_n0tX9oHH7e_-iDFP2taIt0lEDPlZcDebH5lph9dzPUuxrNNPuoFAXvZoIR2cdqH99JVThlwU1ORasahG4cWB6h2NfYrmcEYGM1kyViNLbwma7AHa-2ElVdPWYPQNgjQv2oLHXRtNzg0GuE1iQ7IeU655p0-KGt4p2_KtU1HFdTOfBbR_hE4C5zXlPlOmfdMZ8pcp7wJnJ8JgXMDj0aBM9tLcpIUnSyso5M6pEjS0akzHxS5yDXZq5CTKco7HRTlE9soOsoya0sfT7xHb2Xhy3kqAucqK3fePgRfhlF0sB3ahw8p_-7fb4X_AwAA__8ipY_2) department into its English department. SMU suspended its requirement for students to take a course on "human diversity" in March. Under a new state law, the authority to determine curriculum offerings and course content is [transferred](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3OpDAMQE8TuowcJ0AoUmxDN9tuiRJihkgBRsTzw-1XoO8GX2fJT35P_ncf7j7ltD7--oUcf6dtWOlTMjHTPjRYh0eamOnrS3gdJSQet7T6AQFrqVCCHqJP-RhMFV2A2KmKnGob0zYaG6hmp7D20dZWmxhRK9uOSqNX0IGq7Yhdldx5TCFohQC1vY1gwGjTRAwewXbCAMXE237jma6UKR_bm_bbuC1VdjPzswj9R2AvsOeZrqITXE9CYH8KBPZgz1kJ7F8sy1GYFklrLHLy4yvzIQutnqlI3qQPKZIMh7yEPxsZUs5StwL7anfx-Uk5p9K0wsBj8SlfQfy7N74d_g8AAP__7_uEFg) from faculty councils to politically appointed regents.
## Another Cockfight Busted
The Collin County Sheriff's Office arrested eight people Friday during a sting of a [cockfighting operation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3O2yAUxvGrwRsRPoA_BoYsXqp06NLRwnBso2KI4Pj1m159ldxC50f666fn92N-2BBD2n7aAw19r3lOeNWIRFjmDvSyhZUIv21dzlddArkckp1BgOYtcCFnb0N8zarxZhF-bBs0bd-pvpPQiWY34zCOq0SrFhwGDUpqr50f2070znqpm2DesRaEbEEIPdycUEJJ1XlYLIhhZEqgD5TLjXb8UNb4yl9Ybi4fTTQ70bMyeWcwMZiu67odNb03BhMmflYGkyvhQAbThgmLjQymd4BrwUvOlbBUXrC6Ez0feD3rEx1VbkvBSuj5mgt32f1Zw7ZTSBsPiadcaOcfD4PJFn6_t7_-_nCPphj_vEKMoXY9U2I7bIgfK_3fw18G_gUAAP__0jSQjw) in Farmersville. Similar raids were made during the past week in Alvarado and Houston. Cockfighting "season" starts in late November—usually on Thanksgiving—and lasts through July, following the period when roosters shed and regrow their feathers and are the [most aggressive](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSrCAQQE-jmRY2KBoQ_GSy-emGFkiLXYswJT3jePutnSvsBd579b7u891SpBT-2x0Nv9c8JzxLRGY85gF6F2hlxrct7nkVR7xkSnYGAX3TQSPk7C3Fa1a1N074qavRdHpQepAwiHozSo-T1v0qvROT1KiddGpA8P2I69L1NZlfWAdCdiBEP7aLUEJJNXhwFsQ4VUqgJ85Hyxt-UtZ45Rce7ZL3OpqN-VEq-a-CWwW38zzb1S6UQslP3tp8hApu4SBubPJNYcTY2GQ571ez5OV7pbAxpVAfxj9OipHKoCslwm4pfhT8tzEvAz8BAAD__9ead-E). Animal Wellness Action has labeled the corridor between Tulsa and Dallas as the "primary hub of illegal cockfighting" in the country. In Texas, organizing a cockfight and putting money on the contest are felonies. It's a misdemeanor to attend a cockfight, allow property to be used for that purpose, or train a rooster for fighting. Fifty-seven roosters were recovered during the Friday raid, and [ICE detainers were lodged](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPnDAUhH-N6byyHwaWwsU2dJciTZQKGfvBPsVrn-zHceTXR-xfSDfSaEbfzK-P-cNRpLT9cC-0_L3mOeFRIzJjmXvolo1WZvx2ddnPuhD7TMnNoKCTGqRq5-AonrNpgl1UGHWDVg-9GfoWetU8rXItgPZu8ODGFUdcR4NBhTsOCmDoGrJXmQbValCqu9-8Msq0pg-wOFD3URiFgTiXGz_xjbLGM39hufn8aqJ9Mn9W0T4ETAKm4zhur5ouT8CESe5VwHSNEjC9NdL2ZOlKwcoYZDfIknNlLFVWpL8YJCXpYsQNg_Q5RkrS5z3xKX32f9YrTmmTy15ZwOSKfDz0z0P_Xptiw-dBMVLtB2HU9nIU35T8f99-WfgXAAD__8x6jq8) on three of those arrested. "_The Collin County Sheriff's Office remains committed to enforcing animal cruelty laws and dismantling illegal animal fighting operations_ ," read a news release.
## Dells Give $6.25 Billion to U.S. Children
Michael Dell, the founder of Round Rock's Dell Technologies, and his wife, Susan, are [donating $6.25 billion](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uqzAQhJ_GdKD12pikcHEbutz2lMg_S7BkIMJLCG9_RF7hNNOM9M3o-3kMD5dyWp7_3UyWP-M6LHSUTMy0DQZb_0wjM31c8ftZfOKwpsUNCNjWEmtQQ3Qpn4OuovUQ77IiKzujO6PQQDVZb8bOURdRIhkITuoIqOmmFLWoTaiSvWASQUkEaG9NAA1aaRPRO4TbXWigmHjdGp7oe2XM5_qmrQnrXGU7Mb-KUP8E9gL74ziasPhwlQL7iy2wlyiwhyvmFCZHuS57cUsdKeeat31-1S6EdV-4NBPPudpsfB0p51RMJzQ8Z5fyd4__Zult8TcAAP__Xs15bQ) to U.S. children aged 10 and under who live in ZIP codes with a median household income of $150,000 or less. The $250 donations [target 25 million children](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUDvOozAQPo3pjMbjB_yFi23osu2WyNhDsGRwBJOQ3H5FrvB3I833_ncbbyGXvN3_hpU8v-c6bnQehZhpHx3a6Z5nZnqHY3p-jilzrHkLIwJaqVCCHlPI5TOaJvkJ0o9qyKvOmc5pdNAsnmY1x2QxBhWjJYJZd04bB32fMCE12V9iCkErBLB9G8GA0cYlnAJC_yMMUMpc95YX-kaZy6e-aG9jXZviF-bHIfQfgYPA4TzPNk7H1eL6CxyuU-Cw5rgEKjJRKRKtXHMpuW4yLrmknTaJFiSFuEjen-tDhhjrc-OL2uw-Pc4Lf7hOGLivIZevO_9us5fH_wEAAP__3ZKAag) who aren't eligible to receive $1,000 from the federal government in accounts authorized by the One Big Beautiful Bill. Only children born between January 1, 2025, and December 31, 2028, are eligible to receive those federal funds. At a White House ceremony to announce the gift, President Trump called it "truly one of the most generous acts in the history of our country." The Dells said it is the largest single private commitment to U.S. children. "_We believe that if every child can see a future worth saving for, this program will build something far greater than an account. It will build hope and opportunity and prosperity for generations to come_ ," [said Michael Dell](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO3DAQRE8jZRw0mx-NAgZOJlunDoUW2ZohlvpYbO2ubm9oruCwUMDDq_rzMXxQLnl5_qaZg_xM67Dwdy0swvvg0Y3PPInwD9XxOOuYJa55oQEBndKowAyJcjkH26YwQup1y0F33nbeoIf2FTpGRt1Ptr87JmOILE2j05ysJ9thm8MF0whGI4C73yJYsMb6hCMh3PvGAqcs636TF79VpnKuX7zf4jq3JbxEttqYXw0-GnzQdg24qivskmPhBh9zji_iohKXoupRaVGyH_OmKMb1WKSqKmv8VDPtnyxqu_hyqrzw34NKllN1jF675IDMFMF5o6HnBMyjjVazbveQtu9cSq6-ayw8Z8rlrSj_d-xXwH8BAAD__y8rjN0).

Last month, Texas A&M University System regents announced that courses cannot "advocate race or gender ideology" without a campus president's approval. On Monday, Texas Tech University System Chancellor Brandon Creighton that instructors cannot promote "activism on issues related to race or sex." The UT System and the UNT System are currently reviewing course content to ensure "compliance and alignment" with state and federal directives. TCU will roll its department into its English department. SMU suspended its requirement for students to take a course on "human diversity" in March. Under a new state law, the authority to determine curriculum offerings and course content is from faculty councils to politically appointed regents. Another Cockfight Busted The Collin County Sheriff's Office arrested eight people Friday during a sting of a in Farmersville. Similar raids were made during the past week in Alvarado and Houston. Cockfighting "season" starts in late November—usually on Thanksgiving—and lasts through July, following the period when roosters shed and regrow their feathers and are the . Animal Wellness Action has labeled the corridor between Tulsa and Dallas as the "primary hub of illegal cockfighting" in the country. In Texas, organizing a cockfight and putting money on the contest are felonies. It's a misdemeanor to attend a cockfight, allow property to be used for that purpose, or train a rooster for fighting. Fifty-seven roosters were recovered during the Friday raid, and on three of those arrested. "The Collin County Sheriff's Office remains committed to enforcing animal cruelty laws and dismantling illegal animal fighting operations ," read a news release. Dells Give $6.25 Billion to U.S. Children Michael Dell, the founder of Round Rock's Dell Technologies, and his wife, Susan, are to U.S. children aged 10 and under who live in ZIP codes with a median household income of $150,000 or less. The $250 donations who aren't eligible to receive $1,000 from the federal government in accounts authorized by the One Big Beautiful Bill. Only children born between January 1, 2025, and December 31, 2028, are eligible to receive those federal funds. At a White House ceremony to announce the gift, President Trump called it "truly one of the most generous acts in the history of our country." The Dells said it is the largest single private commitment to U.S. children. "We believe that if every child can see a future worth saving for, this program will build something far greater than an account. subject: Trump’s Comments on Somali Immigrants Coincide with Planned Federal Enforcement Operation in Minnesota
body:

------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Dec 02, 2025 07:37 pm
Federal authorities are preparing a large-scale immigration enforcement operation in Minnesota aimed at Somali immigrants living unlawfully in the United States, a development announced just as President Donald Trump delivered his strongest public criticism yet of Somali migrants during a Cabinet meeting Tuesday. The planned operation, confirmed by a person familiar with the federal strategy, [...]

| | | There's one nutrient that doesn't get nearly enough attention even though it's been proven to reduce hospitalization for a heart problem by a whopping 21 percent based on a recent study. I like to call it [**Nature's Artery Opener**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7dba68026ddaeeb1cd7d62356bf23755e49c7efc174d31cbca788799e7ff711c6c1cebd1c8e22834cc7ace7d3cacdc89a5c662763055ca299346112468a68e0e) [
](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7dba68026ddaeeb1cd7d62356bf23755e49c7efc174d31cbca788799e7ff711c6c1cebd1c8e22834cc7ace7d3cacdc89a5c662763055ca299346112468a68e0e)And with Nature's Artery Opener you get, [a stronger, healthier heart in 4 easy steps...](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7dba68026ddaeeb1cd7d62356bf23755e49c7efc174d31cbca788799e7ff711c6c1cebd1c8e22834cc7ace7d3cacdc89a5c662763055ca299346112468a68e0e)
**#1 --** Opened blood vessels for healthy circulation...
**#2 -- **Arteries cleared of calcium deposits to help keep blood vessels and arteries from hardening...
**#3 -- **Blood clots naturally dissolved to keep blood thin...
**#4 -- **Heart cells energized... for a healthy, strong, beating heart! Impressive, right? [**Nature's Artery Opener**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7dba68026ddaeeb1cd7d62356bf23755e49c7efc174d31cbca788799e7ff711c6c1cebd1c8e22834cc7ace7d3cacdc89a5c662763055ca299346112468a68e0e) is easy to implement AND its artery opening ability is based on a Nobel prize-winning scientific discovery!
So, what is this nutrient?

[**Click here**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7dba68026ddaeeb1cd7d62356bf23755e49c7efc174d31cbca788799e7ff711c6c1cebd1c8e22834cc7ace7d3cacdc89a5c662763055ca299346112468a68e0e) and I'll tell you about it right now.

subject: The Most Un-American Thing Trump Has Done So Far… ∕ Wednesday, December 3, 2025
body:
But just recently, Donald Trump signed something that could change everything about how America — and your financial freedom — will look moving forward.| | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=9951965ce258474cbeeb445d80a05522&_e=4jofhknbE5AMr5u8G9xb3ksNuIJFgoOZkz3uOh8aENE_W9rFyb-T1G5-t-JVDv_C-N9tV3uoAMDhP67ugn9HgAj-ItTHQsU1cgAQgAX6velGmT7yHgKSAPJ7_vPvlEtFMDoR014UBOAjGwR-y-qmAQxl8HRYZWI_AKU03LSnN3iNzdBJ19xX7rohPIKiE6Bi-oUvHTjENAZvS38DnkAjm0oRnuGtvcy4PmF73g9NEbLHXfwelHnMlewf6rY4c4IhV7S-QCOOXFXLSOqRWWx30bkMHLu1pbk9qQZ4d0jL7Gm7dWUwEAABZAz6wRh2dUu3eb7AyFdRbI-_puxH-Mj7V1V0Ltoot8i7hUAtorP8deJ4F8Lu5DMlAJFpJaWDQmN4)
