clean_body: News + editorial | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Wednesday Weekly Reads! As always, to stay up to date on late-breaking stories and analysis, and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd If the Russians or the Chinese Communist Party wanted to take over or weaken America without firing a shot, they could focus on our children to slowly undermine and weaken our society. Then, we couldn’t compete economically, and wouldn’t think America is worth defending. A frightening number of our students aren’t proficient in reading, writing or math, with science scores so bad they sometimes aren’t reported. And their knowledge of American history is so demonstrably bad that their ignorance and misunderstanding of our history would be embarrassing even if they were foreigners. Their appreciation of America is even lower than their understanding of our history and Constitution. So many students and Gen Z are anxious, easily rattled, and lonely that colleges have “safe spaces,” and even Harvard and the New York Times have studied and written about the rising anxiety among younger Americans. And a shocking number of Americans under 30 prefer socialism to capitalism — some studies suggest a clear majority. Why It Matters. For decades, the education swamp — the teachers’ unions, their allies on school boards, and higher education who “prepares” them to teach — has tossed-aside common sense, de-emphasized academics, divided and frightened our children, and taught them to have contempt for America. The “modern” education establishment failed our students and our nation. Intentionally at each step. With little to no concern with what it did to our students or our nation — which many of them were taught to dislike, or despise. | | 2. By Jeff Cole The news tip was unlike anything we’d ever received. A visitor to an East Falls cemetery in Philadelphia complained vandals had broken into a crypt on the property exposing human remains inside. The tip detailed how the visitor was outraged by the scene and worried others coming to mourn loved ones would also be startled and offended. The cemetery gates were wide open when we entered, and no one responded to a knock at the office door for us to question. We decided to do what reporters often do in situations like these, find an out-of-the-way spot, sit, and watch. What we saw was a stunning example of illegal dumping of trash, often called short dumping, in a city long plagued by the practice. Why It Matters. Illegal dumping has long plagued Philadelphia. In twenty-five years of reporting here, I've done dozens of stories and spoken with many residents disheartened, often livid, at the tires, old furniture, construction debris and foul-smelling trash dumped in their communities often overnight along side streets, dead ends even main roads hit repeatedly. Sometimes we’d pick through the trash looking for an address or an indicator of where it had come from and who did it. Often, the piles were filled with wood, drywall, broken glass, and window frames short-dumped on a city street by work crews cutting corners and ducking disposal fees. But there may be yet another way to slow the scourge of illegal dumping in Philadelphia: embarrassment. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading. Guy Ciarrocchi, Beth Ann Rosica, and others have been writing at Broad + Liberty for years now about the general decline in public education. Test scores that began to decline even before Covid, then dropped sharply and have not rebounded. Now, in 2025, the mainstream media has begun to take notice. Better late than never! Meanwhile in the Atlantic, applies to math. "Five years ago, about 30 incoming freshmen at UC San Diego arrived with math skills below high-school level. Now, according to a recent report from UC San Diego faculty and administrators, that number is more than 900—and most of those students don’t fully meet middle -school math standards." Most shockingly, neither of these authors place the blame on Donald Trump. The rest of the country is waking up to what Broad + Liberty readers have known for years: the public education system is in serious need of repair. | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Earlier this year, Donald Trump signed an executive order to end public funding of NPR and PBS – slashing nearly $1.1 billion.

This, compiled with his increasing attacks on journalists and media organizations that publish information that doesn’t align with his MAGA agenda,**puts public broadcasting at an existential threat.**

But with Trump’s public broadcasting cuts still under legal review, we still have a chance to save it.

| Friend, As Christmas approaches and we gather with loved ones, we're reminded of what truly matters -- faith, family, freedom, and the future we're building for the next generation.
This season is also a powerful reminder that great things happen when patriots come together and give generously.
Right now, Team Imer PAC is counting on supporters like you to help us finish the year strong.
While the political establishment spends millions propping up candidates who forget the people they're supposed to serve, we're fighting to recruit and elect America First conservatives who will put our country -- and our communities -- first.
But we can't do it without the generosity of grassroots supporters who believe in the mission.
Your Christmas-season contribution helps us: 🎄 Train and support new America First candidates who will fight for secure borders, parents' rights, energy independence, and an end to human trafficking. 🎄 Register and turn out voters in battleground communities the establishment ignores. 🎄 Engage young conservatives and Gen Z activists who want a future rooted in freedom and opportunity. 🎄 Stand up to establishment Super PACs pouring endless cash into stopping grassroots candidates. 🎄 Educate voters on the issues that matter most heading into 2025.
This movement is powered not by corporate special interests -- but by patriots like you, giving what they can to defend the values that make Christmas so meaningful: hope, generosity, and the promise of a brighter future.
👉 Will you make a special Christmas or year-end donation today -- $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can give -- to help Team Imer PAC continue this mission?

name: DemsGive
subject: Housing costs are too high for Tennessee families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
More units. More affordable. More opportunity.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KBJ7V7YH6E4MX0ETD3Q2C6VW_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KBJ7V7YH6E4MX0ETD3Q2C6VW_1)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, Too many Tennesseans are being pushed out of their own communities as rents climb and affordable homes vanish. Democrats in Tennessee are fighting back with a plan to increase housing supply, expand affordability, and hold corporate landlords accountable. Read their message below and, if you can, support this work for stability and dignity. — Jesse, DemsGive
---
|
---
| Hi Peter, In Tennessee, affordable housing is in short supply. Rents continue to climb, housing units are in short supply, and home ownership is increasingly out of reach for too many Tennesseans.
When you can’t afford an apartment to rent or a home to purchase, you don’t just lose stability—you lose hope. We believe Tennesseans deserve affordable housing that strengthens families, builds communities, and facilitates opportunity for economic prosperity.
---
| | [ Chip in to fight for housing opportunity ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KBJ7V7YH6E4MX0ETD3Q2C6VW_2)
---
| Our Caucus is fighting to increase the housing supply, expand affordable housing and hold corporate landlords accountable.

name: Elizabeth
subject: 🌈 Virginia chose love — nowlet’s finish the job!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
Virginians deserve better than uncertainty. | | | Friend — When Virginians elected us this past November, they didn’t just choose new leadership, **they chose a new direction rooted in dignity, equality, and belonging.** And now, for the first time in years, we have the power to do something historic: **✅****Remove Virginia’s ban on same-sex marriage from our state constitution
✅ Enshrine marriage equality permanently — ****_no matter who sits in the Governor’s mansion or on the Supreme Court_** Right now, this horrific ban is still on the books — a painful reminder of a different era and a dangerous loophole if federal protections are ever weakened. **_But_** _**Virginians deserv**_ _**e be**_** _tter than uncertainty._** However, in the upcoming session, Democrats will finally move to repeal the ban and send a constitutional amendment forward to the voters. **_This is the second to last step required before it goes to the ballot for Virginia voters to finally strike discrimination from our state laws_**** _for good._**__ But here’s the thing: _we already know what’s_ _coming.__National right-wing groups are preparing to pour in money, misinformation, and fear to stop us._ So before January, I need to build the strongest grassroots support possible — fueled by people who believe that love should never be up for debate. **[If you’re ready to make marriage equality permanent in Virginia, will you chip in whatever you can today — $10, $20, or anything that feels right?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6Ga_--4zVWj6DqJv8SzKwqBoirSvKxJVdo2VMbjlv7T9nr6tywr5f-Yss8PxjA0fOQU4fz-Y6npQVddUkEP0OjhLdxfoxyiAurURbuhTKqx1ZjyBQaM2YoM5F93jGFdYW4QWRAdPILkhzw6TBrsPs_io8_g1hOdlTrgq9TbcjxoC2KilJCNLaydEE1nGONu_EKIZMH13f5h47Xp5S_yGSPUFfr_4MG-HbmrVPNh_kEC45KQNVB5wxAQWcBYhlN3GSg/4m4/x_RGt3QnTgimfGUvK5RW_g/h0/h001.gENIXtVY7qj6CwBq6FyBjFWFIaENicGln2h_4QtUNcY)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: Virginians deserve better than uncertainty. | | | Friend — When Virginians elected us this past November, they didn’t just choose new leadership, they chose a new direction rooted in dignity, equality, and belonging. And now, for the first time in years, we have the power to do something historic: ✅Remove Virginia’s ban on same-sex marriage from our state constitution ✅ Enshrine marriage equality permanently — no matter who sits in the Governor’s mansion or on the Supreme Court Right now, this horrific ban is still on the books — a painful reminder of a different era and a dangerous loophole if federal protections are ever weakened. But Virginians deserv e be tter than uncertainty. However, in the upcoming session, Democrats will finally move to repeal the ban and send a constitutional amendment forward to the voters. This is the second to last step required before it goes to the ballot for Virginia voters to finally strike discrimination from our state laws for good. But here’s the thing: we already know what’s coming.National right-wing groups are preparing to pour in money, misinformation, and fear to stop us. So before January, I need to build the strongest grassroots support possible — fueled by people who believe that love should never be up for debate. We have a once-in-a-generation chance to make sure no family in Virginia ever has to wonder if their rights can be taken away. | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=180596052&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNTk2MDUyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3NzE1NTcsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM2MzU1NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J_3_zPa4hAX1esSQYv8Lab1X2A4Uc-wRZcPxwTlku7A)
---
| | [](https://substack..SoApGF5_2t8N6tQ6IIFOAwiG0XUGEtkz7hkNsJv22w4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/how-to-thrive-in-the-ai-job-market?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

America has faced plenty of volatility this year. We have seen a cooling job market with U.S. companies announcing [one million job cuts](https://substack.com/redirect/22c0c463-e691-4afd-8f8c-278dd3dbf317?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (the highest rate since Covid), a new presidential administration, tariff uncertainty, and supply chain disruptions that continue to ripple across industries. [Consumer confidence has fallen significantly](https://substack.com/redirect/94fa140d-04f5-4a72-bf78-8367ca2bc877?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), brutal considering [68% of our GDP is tied to consumer spending.](https://substack.com/redirect/d1314fb2-188a-4877-a35b-0464ca4283ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) But beneath all of that is a deeper and more existential fear: that AI is coming for your job.
Every week brings new predictions about which roles will vanish next.
Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei has [warned](https://substack.com/redirect/cccc24a9-456e-498a-8d08-69d741c50118?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that AI will eliminate half of all entry-level white-collar jobs within one to five years, potentially pushing unemployment toward 20 percent. He reiterated those concerns to a visibly stunned Anderson Cooper on a recent episode of _[60 Minutes.](https://substack.com/redirect/24d137f1-f0b0-4b30-a408-9fcf5ba2f4eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
A Louisville computer science professor went even further, predicting that [AI will eliminate 99% of all jobs by 2030.](https://substack.com/redirect/51b93fa7-e049-4cc0-a6bf-c245b322aeb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Whether this is hyperbole or prophecy almost does not matter. What matters is that Americans are deeply unsettled.
[Seventy-one percent of people fear AI causing permanent job loss.](https://substack.com/redirect/2b2cae33-6332-43fe-8c4d-04d5e986587a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We need a new way of defining value in the workforce. My prediction is simple. The jobs that last will be the jobs AI cannot replicate. These are leadership roles built on judgment, trust, empathy, communication, and the ability to move people, not just information.
AI can automate execution. But there are many things it can't do.
AI cannot negotiate with stakeholders in conflict.
AI also cannot read a room or inspire a team when the stakes are real.
Simply put, AI can't carry a team.
This era needs operators, not just executors.
If my work resonates with you, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4URYp0F79laFt0BYV7A2RKIy2di458tqt2q4s2NDCg4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180596052)
### **The Leadership Vacuum Created by the Silver Tsunami**
While AI is hollowing out early-career roles that once taught people how to lead, another challenge is unfolding at the same time: the **[Silver Tsunami](https://substack.com/redirect/cbd80b6b-6905-4551-86f3-ed1a4c2fa05c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
As tens of millions of Americans retire, the country is losing more than headcount. We are losing the people who know how to run the systems that keep this economy functioning.
By 2035, older adults will outnumber Americans under 18 for the first time.
The manufacturing sector is already feeling the shock. Deloitte and The Manufacturing Institute estimate that from 2020 to 2030, the industry will need to fill roughly **[4 million jobs](https://substack.com/redirect/db5a7b46-fd81-4705-9c92-56e3ef78f065?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with 2.5 million driven entirely by retirements. They project that 2.1 million of those positions may go unfilled because younger workers simply do not have the experience to replace the generation that is leaving. Additionally, there will be 500K fewer high school graduates in the next 15 years (3.9 million in 2025 to 3.4 million in 2040, a 13% decrease)
We are staring at the largest leadership gap in modern American history.
AI can eliminate tasks, but it cannot close the gap in leadership. The operators who thrive today are people who know how to build trust, interpret nuance, de-escalate conflict, and inspire teams under pressure.
### **The Rise of the Operator Economy**
Every era elevates a different archetype of leadership.
The industrial era elevated the manager who was disciplined, procedural, and built for scale.

The information era elevated the technologist who was analytical, optimized, and built for speed.
The AI era requires something different. It requires leaders who can work alongside machine intelligence with the human skills no algorithm can replicate.
**So what do these operators look like?**
Operators are not defined by pedigree or job titles. They are defined by judgment and by the ability to lead people through pressure, ambiguity, and real-world consequences. In 2025, we saw operators in every corner of American life.
At the intersection of national security and entrepreneurship, former service members stepped into critical digital and physical defense roles and managed hybrid warfare threats no algorithm can fully anticipate. I think of people like Craig Cummings, a decorated Army intelligence officer turned co-founder of Moonshots Capital. He was named one of Inc. Magazine's Top 20 Military Veteran Entrepreneurs.
Then there are operators like Blake Hall, the co-founder and CEO of ID.me -- the verified digital identity network used by more than 150 million Americans to securely access government services, healthcare portals, financial accounts, and other high-trust online transactions.
In finance, you have skilled operators like Ben Moe, Managing Partner at Osceola. He oversees the firm's investment strategy end-to-end and has completed more than 125 M&A transactions**** across**** industries.
We're seeing this trend increasingly in private equity, where the operator-first model accelerated faster than anyone expected. For years, PE firms prioritized financial engineering. In 2025, the advantage shifted to firms that put operators, many of them veterans, into portfolio companies. These leaders were selected not because they held shiny degrees but because they knew how to build teams, manage scarcity, steady culture, and make decisions when the data was incomplete. Veteran-led search funds, operator-focused platforms, and hands-on ownership models surged because the market recognized their unique leadership skillset.
I'll never forget the best operator I ever served with.
It was a blistering, 120-degree day in Al Rashid, Baghdad, back in 2003. I was leading paratroopers in a convoy north through a stretch of road known as "Ambush Alley" -- the main artery in the largest city in Iraq, and the place where most of our troops had been killed by roadside bombs (IEDs - Improvised Explosive Devices).
We drove up the six-lane highway in our Humvee with no doors (let alone armor). I had my M4 rifle at the ready, with our gunner in the open turret with his SAW (Squad Automatic Weapon), as we each scanned the roadside shoulders for these hidden weapons in the brutal heat. Cool as a cucumber in the front seat of the lead vehicle was our driver, 19-year-old Texan & Army Specialist Juan "RV" Arevalo, who suddenly said matter-of-factly, "Sir, I think I just saw an IED!" My heart sank and raced as I yelled over the roar of the engine, "What did it look like?"
"It was a concrete cylinder-like thingy with wires sticking out," RV said.
Driving 50 miles an hour, there was no way to be sure. But I trusted RV with my life many times. "OK, we're shutting it down before it kills someone," I said, ordering the team to follow our SOP (Standard Operating Procedure).

We radioed back to the other vehicle, warning them of the danger and ordering them to initiate our protocol. We then radioed our Scania Forward Operating Base miles away, calling for a bomb squad/Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team, giving them the six-digit grid coordinate that I quickly plotted on my map. (We didn't have GPS then.)

As you can imagine, shutting down a six-lane highway in the middle of rush hour made us the least popular Americans in Iraq. In a country where gun control meant _only_ one AK-47 per home, their anger manifested with fist-waving and curses in Arabic as we fanned out across the highway and locked it down.

This moment felt like it lasted forever. While it would have been easier to keep driving as we had already passed the IED's blast radius, that wasn't the right answer. When the bomb squad came soon after, it turned out RV was right; they found an IED comprised of two artillery shells, enough explosives to tear apart a couple Humvees. That's why RV will always be the best operator I've ever worked with. It was no surprise to any of us when he was named to the 82nd Airborne All-American Paratrooper of the quarter and eventually made his way to the United States Military Academy at West Point.
***
Fast forward to today, and we are moving toward a workforce defined not by how efficiently someone completes tasks but by the strength of their leadership. And that shift puts a premium on the traits at the heart of the Warrior Ethos: discipline, integrity, accountability, service, and the ability to stay steady when everything around you is not.
These are the traits we will highlight at this year's [Warrior Class Conference](https://substack.com/redirect/f3eb3b8b-7269-4ebc-829e-7ec3cd182c0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where operators from across the country will gather to discuss what veteran leadership looks like in the AI era.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/617d8a4a-5e6d-4d4b-9665-88447eac7c41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **The 2025 Warrior Class Conference**
This year's speakers represent the full spectrum of operational excellence:
* Governor Wes Moore
* Representative Chris Deluzio (PA-17)
* Medal of Honor recipient Florent "Flo" Groberg
* Blake Hall, CEO of [ID.me](https://substack.com/redirect/c07c9ef4-661d-4cd5-b8ea-7d13f20d24d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Craig Cummings and Kelly Perdew, Moonshots Capital
* Frank Finelli, Partner, The Carlyle Group
* David Kurtz, CEO of Professional Services, Hilco Global

📅 December 12, 2025
🕒 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM EST
📍 Johns Hopkins Carey School of Business -- Baltimore, MD
**[Register Here](https://substack.com/redirect/f3eb3b8b-7269-4ebc-829e-7ec3cd182c0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
***
While it may seem like the future belongs to machines, the truth is that the more technology accelerates, the more we will need people who can do what technology can't. People who can lead. People who can make decisions when the answers aren't obvious.

This is exactly why operators, especially those forged through military service, will be indispensable in the years ahead.

It's time to double down on the skills machines can't replicate. Become indispensable by building the muscles of leadership, responsibility, and judgment that will define the next decade of work.
Thank you for reading. If my work resonates with you, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4URYp0F79laFt0BYV7A2RKIy2di458tqt2q4s2NDCg4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=180596052)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: It’s official: Mark Warner is running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and I’m counting on you to help him kick off his campaign strong

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120511275/586509092/186742633?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KaineRelaunch_251203_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjYzOGI5Yi01MmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=97oyaB5DTiu_uK9_-KYTxv7TOzW0p_xktnHfoKrl2so=) Derek,

My good friend Mark Warner has officially launched his reelection campaign, and he’s got an important grassroots fundraising goal to hit before Friday. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9127944/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVm1QYzd4Um5jZw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDM/LbmNscExCU2cxZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNaMU50UDNOc1FLeDlscw/gaTBHhg/s7ub68268d1)
| |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9127944/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMDM/LbmNscExCU2cxZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNaMU50UDNOc1FLeDlscw/gaTBHhg/sdt84a5fafc)

name: Tennessee aftermath
subject: Trisha wins - Defeats Lauren Boebert by 3 points
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lZo62V9b1MtTkehBu3sj8MeOAIAw7qoMIPeEYz9ZZrj3-wLFDRv890pnVftX7jag-T08RypqTs5TtR3AQT1nF8JXWTX1_qxjltpi2bCDLiX3lBO4L9ayi-LpttcR9Y3DS4PT7-ht0r0XhQ7LEFSscJtCLb2FaSJY4IsTom57eGr_HrWZYXg_gk1t6D09IHGmyqdzPLhk7-X2JKhTy54FsgWFln4dW1I4TuhSD2JIvSo=&c=yXYmCHV3DiRnMolh5YDDGeoiN7SgYht-AOuecYtix8sIL7-9uhIpLA==&ch=mXg_WKd0d6Y3RUBS7m89wzj1ND66OWAYtna63DPLnLa21DXZZG__gA==)
---
|

Peter,
Trisha Calvarese beats Lauren Boebert by 3 points.
If the trends that we saw last night, and in nearly every election over the past year, continue, this is the headline you'll be reading on November 5th 2026.
Aftyn Behn's performance last night in TN-7 proves what we've been seeing across the country: Democrats are closing gaps and swinging deep-red districts by double digits.
A 15 point shift like we saw in Tennessee, or a 16 pt swing like the one Democrat Josh Weil accomplished in deep-red FL-06, puts Lauren Boebert's district (which is markedly less red than TN-07 and FL-16) firmly in Democratic hands next year.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lZo62V9b1MtTkehBu3sj8MeOAIAw7qoMIPeEYz9ZZrj3-wLFDRv890pnVftX7jag-T08RypqTs5TtR3AQT1nF8JXWTX1_qxjltpi2bCDLiX3lBO4L9ayi-LpttcR9Y3DS4PT7-ht0r0XhQ7LEFSscJtCLb2FaSJY4IsTom57eGr_HrWZYXg_gk1t6D09IHGmyqdzPLhk7-X2JKhTy54FsmT-fU8aDA-rlnKgGAj-JF0=&c=yXYmCHV3DiRnMolh5YDDGeoiN7SgYht-AOuecYtix8sIL7-9uhIpLA==&ch=mXg_WKd0d6Y3RUBS7m89wzj1ND66OWAYtna63DPLnLa21DXZZG__gA==)
---

Powering Aftyn Behn and Josh Weil's colossal overperformances this year wasn't just disapproval of the administration, it was their politics.
Weil and Behn are economic populists who ran on platforms that included: fighting MAGA tooth and nail with no compromise, universal healthcare, and ending America's blood soaked foreign policy.
The age of running unrepentant former Republicans, right-wing Dems, and corporate funded AIPAC groupies that sell us out at the drop of a hat, is over. Having real values is what it takes to win in the world of 2025 and the voters won't stop telling us this.
If every House district in the country shifted left by the amount that Aftyn and Josh accomplished we would be looking at a blue wave so massive that it would blow 2018's Democratic midterm sweep out of the water.
This is why when Trisha Calvarese, a labor leader and unabashed populist, took on Boebert in 2024 she overperformed VP Harris by 6 points whereas Boebert trailed Trump in every district. She cut the margin in 2024 so dramatically that national observers now see CO-4 as a top-tier pickup opportunity.
[This is our best chance in a generation to flip CO-4 and beat Boebert but we are going to need a tidal wave of grassroots support to beat Boebert and the tens of millions she's raked in from her massive corporate backers. Please can you make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us elect a leader with values, reclaim the House, and defeat Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lZo62V9b1MtTkehBu3sj8MeOAIAw7qoMIPeEYz9ZZrj3-wLFDRv890pnVftX7jag6lB7VSfHhbj25OHt7DRTzMhfhhQchL8WNeSkCG8yIHkdr-3ceI0XePfjVsl2Ak1NwixJg-h4vLHDV_lDyfxcVOWfS8OKGnp3i1IFP9ReQPozvFcsYHooLTqRjDglayNH-Mem7-Xeov32zcWSxDdVkWBWCYD6ATY5JJnoqkjmlDv1Tf4eBDDlbg==&c=yXYmCHV3DiRnMolh5YDDGeoiN7SgYht-AOuecYtix8sIL7-9uhIpLA==&ch=mXg_WKd0d6Y3RUBS7m89wzj1ND66OWAYtna63DPLnLa21DXZZG__gA==)
---

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

**Washington didn’t expect this footage to go public.**

Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line.

This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers.
| [ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c994a6a8ed6f44069c49cd51d09cf30e&_e=GXhNvW7CZUdtLaICZTsY4iN2xyJoSzS8nkk8CZe2_UJKW6aJtpvR385yQRsx-ZtR0cDvlhUaK4dkKKscZVnq4iXclkTXQwuq5cX-wUiAVy5L5rcPx2jFAuqjSm6pSMhqV4O-k1oAKQ1HhvKdu6Dr0PN1P8nNJM4czfqBBe_UBxNGseymniNH6_BzZUIAQqxC7F_TSmH2K8IgaC_MqpA-VH9NQdclJwcCDywA5Qc7LvYjDz_1GAUp6BN04qy2WgulKLBtRdQ3Kt_TPVLMPudLyjDntqz4Z3PzFpdoWpKn3mFDOWh9g5UUjBYIU7O_oLJB0Pn4xNDg_bI4ss_m6_8XWCNLt5vzkF46XOmdzvhRH6kbLbirZEvvJVY2Xt2ERZmZYRAZ9Z1J_lALOMZM_udjatUpdNAFfRtJEkvW6KtZNB-rLUoJuWfPJU0kI2WBjt279BAFJTlJ5wDG7ZpSupgcEVIzt2M0OURNL1IwyXb-LmJgQIMhdPR5hdnmt7Ix6R_qvbbzYtlDSUBD7PHmcHk48bos9rm5YCQ5qEay98iq7EMZysQ61aapVOAcEkqtZGOGeP6PCUbO1S0R0C5JbfwjPw%3D%3D)
---
Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts.

The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship.

If you wait for mainstream coverage, you’ll be too late.
[See Which 3 Stocks Power America’s AI Factory](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c994a6a8ed6f44069c49cd51d09cf30e&_e=GXhNvW7CZUdtLaICZTsY4iN2xyJoSzS8nkk8CZe2_UJKW6aJtpvR385yQRsx-ZtR0cDvlhUaK4dkKKscZVnq4iXclkTXQwuq5cX-wUiAVy5L5rcPx2jFAuqjSm6pSMhqV4O-k1oAKQ1HhvKdu6Dr0PN1P8nNJM4czfqBBe_UBxNGseymniNH6_BzZUIAQqxCdVixcN-mJg8q47JPkmGBqE3HNohUMTghg_obP25kdJnjeAP9yDlT3dXaGfu6Wmd6AyeNDgvlyo2eXcLrTmhLLg1S8qS9aPCWJRAbgMhj7q6-79EMbGUxShIrJ4C1tZ8PgjoJqvx4P5zA0OJABfWwKA-uoAD6h6hMhw55w9U9EwHihJrctWUn3QdOSVrLKIxssnfLD2HN8-VouFH31ej9zvpCkH7QPQ80hL_ULwrQ_VWv_RVBaJHL9lWHKYZysnTgA0578uraGVC9g68fFoxv3PD7OaaFEnWTLETZ-ShyUb-wP0n04ENrC8q_-l6yDc7F0RlFjRx-K0wNF79o-ZIDwp3g5GuNqzw73LGGqcTZfWoWUok7_VgM1oOBE6P1lpgzimF9hl6wst8z3UiUpRro8g%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: ⏰Just One Month Until the 2026 General Assembly Session!⏰
body:
Friends- 2026 is quickly approaching, and we need your help now more than ever as we prepare for the upcoming General Assembly session.
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
2026 is quickly approaching, and we need your help now more than ever as we prepare for the upcoming General Assembly session. We are continuing to fight for tax fairness, affordable housing, Paid Family & Medical Leave, and a Prescription Drug Affordability Board to help combat the rising cost of living.

clean_body: Friends, I need to be brutally honest about what we're up against. I have been sounding the alarm about Zohran Mamdani and his radical communist agenda because it mirrors the same socialist policies that helped collapse Venezuela: higher taxes, reckless spending, and government control of everything from energy to policing. | Friends, I need to be brutally honest about what we're up against. | I have been sounding the alarm about Zohran Mamdani and his radical communist agenda because it mirrors the same socialist policies that helped collapse Venezuela: higher taxes, reckless spending, and government control of everything from energy to policing. | | Venezuela collapsed because politicians like him got their way. Now those same ideas are seeping into New York and Washington. And because I refuse to stay quiet, Democrats are trying once again to redraw my district and erase the only Republican seat in New York City. Friends, this is why your support is so crucial. | We need to show strength with our fundraising, both to fight their legal games and to keep this seat secure. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

body:

This will be quick, null.

We’re in your inbox today to share **[three reasons why you should chip in $3](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9457?t=3&akid=1485%2E49239%2Ehni4UR) **to Haley Stevens’ Senate campaign:
**1.** Haley is running for Michigan’s working families – not billionaire donors.

**2.** Experts say Michigan is one of the most likely Senate seats to flip in 2026.

**3.** A far-right GOP megadonor has already poured $5 million into this race to help elect Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.
**Haley is building a people-centered grassroots campaign, and we depend on folks like you to power our movement.**
**[Will you chip in just $3 today to help Haley keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9457?t=4&akid=1485%2E49239%2Ehni4UR)**

Team Haley

* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9461?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=1485%2E49239%2Ehni4UR) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9456?t=10&akid=1485%2E49239%2Ehni4UR)

Haley

name: Captain Mike Bouchard
subject: Can you confirm?
body:
I just want to make sure everything is buttoned up | | | [](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=bc2a5670cecc46ab87b7a957631f8583&_e=B7UuJRHK63TqHeMZSWDbX-7CK98xvwk7BhriLSTCNIsAUbVH4mgfQNg8ay2WMAglgL6sphXKlyKOl3E_MLW1pHfXEzlGRDWsJOqN1ssi99ZdVwZE5xpMuFJ3n-uCfLRWjqEyYp8CNKv_YwS3QYsossgncOM3NwHgAOoDNaIwFq1x_ka_hn7usjkHxxAV5B_iuZAKW0TtSR8cjGf7oDbFE7Fo8f2FujhDH0XnLMbnVSu-JLQfkWHh0TMnkN2RPnIQ-6cgLZF3lR8BFpvhkfX_Qrt7w06XT-56v09_-Iha01BtMycepr3QXMa0mY97zZdXtPfGc5kxhClEK7NUFLhCbQUKoGE6dTsZwr2q2ix0kEhixyFwarMNId3VBEkPUNw0lBO2zrHmc9sHAXx9XlBI9p9FmdrzTgIsihDCFl-6hyS0A11JtnQT3OJx9PJ1ORQj4MCf7AN8BMY5p1b-Bv8u4zb5RveJEFmW_8iSAp4dI32tbJeLuEOcurnvvGU6WkwhoYWf-mWQGTNBj80AcQj-7D_OkRt_w-YuWaAvUEPd250%3D)
---
Peter,
You probably don’t know me yet, but I’d like to share my story.
I was born and raised in Michigan. My dad served as a police officer, my grandfather worked on the GM factory floor, and my family taught me that _**service isn’t a slogan - it’s a duty.**_
I joined ROTC at Michigan State and earned my commission in the US Army as an Infantry Officer. From there, I served with the 101st Airborne Division — leading soldiers on missions at our southern border. Later, **I joined the 82nd Airborne Division as an Intelligence Officer and most recently joined the Michigan Army National Guard where I deployed to Iraq, leading the mission to defeat ISIS.**
I’ve spent most of my adult life defending this country. I’ve seen what happens when America leads with strength and what happens when Washington fails.
Under Joe Biden, I saw a nation struggling under weak leadership, open borders, and a government more focused on politics than people. That’s when I knew my next mission wasn’t over — it had just changed.
**Now, I’m running for Congress to defend Michigan’s families, protect our borders, and restore peace through strength to the nation I love.**
_**[I’m not asking for money today — I’m simply asking you to add your name to stand with me in this fight.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=bc2a5670cecc46ab87b7a957631f8583&_e=B7UuJRHK63TqHeMZSWDbX-7CK98xvwk7BhriLSTCNIsAUbVH4mgfQNg8ay2WMAglgL6sphXKlyKOl3E_MLW1pHfXEzlGRDWsJOqN1ssi99ZdVwZE5xpMuFJ3n-uCfLRWjqEyYp8CNKv_YwS3QYsossgncOM3NwHgAOoDNaIwFq1x_ka_hn7usjkHxxAV5B_iuZAKW0TtSR8cjGf7oDbFE0Rc3kSV8l8g6H0kdHuSwiWw7L253t7Dp_obKSPXRhHQsoXN_OQP9CoNPvurFYvXBaVZyj3YDaPezzuvRdYUrlM1gUKDZ95HYqQVbibdcFUXBhoMtmdLeni03Dc9ZXc2CTVq4rBecdh-xIbk7KNtpkwlVQXglAEmqo_CMj4NlJnpO4aIbG6eTsNh-6ycfkX6hSKQ9uvOCcwRuuPKrs6LISqng-DspaiEgbYSZ5ml8fKi6ykrL5E3o4OtBezS4SXj_e1_Li2rL_ctSLQgTdHCdK6b3L6hDAQCMf9FvNggqVX7h9527Ivl_jwa8ZQe_aMwMpAEU13UIF0R_DP-q0AkirI%3D)**_ Unlike the career politicians in D.C., I’m not afraid to tell you exactly where I stand:

🇺🇸 Pro-Law Enforcement
🇺🇸 Pro-Border Security
🇺🇸 Pro-Military
🇺🇸 Pro-America
🇺🇸 Pro-God
**[If you believe in those values — if you still believe this country is worth fighting for — I hope you’ll join me today.](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=bc2a5670cecc46ab87b7a957631f8583&_e=B7UuJRHK63TqHeMZSWDbX-7CK98xvwk7BhriLSTCNIsAUbVH4mgfQNg8ay2WMAglgL6sphXKlyKOl3E_MLW1pHfXEzlGRDWsJOqN1ssi99ZdVwZE5xpMuFJ3n-uCfLRWjqEyYp8CNKv_YwS3QYsossgncOM3NwHgAOoDNaIwFq1x_ka_hn7usjkHxxAV5B_iuZAKW0TtSR8cjGf7oDbFE-57erMOAYvRI1oEaLDeuhQ71irVAW3YSPzF37TKgZfJnv9SG4vGYGVj_cZpaUnH6h-beq8z2n1Jqvblty6h00t1dxKagbe0vDNz4Q0eP-BVbECGIkDzdOk3THXKCuf4k9COzoeA_C1MCJEEUaErwNg1ivcV-ZEw5rSN7xFye6zKnLx7IC_jNw9tOn29WaN5F1rjeuX4qTvDw865sJsRgXCaE4PgogbroL0_VKKwRB132fFGCfJ9aW9jlMI1rCmV_5VrHH_S6UXAwBV-kpM_xqmR7xbz_6J3iPwz56AF-r0NIIUZySWJ0mp7KZ1g7jnCJDRmgI5Rd8S5UdHwUyxx110%3D)**
---
[ **CLICK HERE TO CONFIRM YOUR ENDORSEMENT** ](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=bc2a5670cecc46ab87b7a957631f8583&_e=B7UuJRHK63TqHeMZSWDbX-7CK98xvwk7BhriLSTCNIsAUbVH4mgfQNg8ay2WMAglgL6sphXKlyKOl3E_MLW1pHfXEzlGRDWsJOqN1ssi99ZdVwZE5xpMuFJ3n-uCfLRWjqEyYp8CNKv_YwS3QYsossgncOM3NwHgAOoDNaIwFq1x_ka_hn7usjkHxxAV5B_iuZAKW0TtSR8cjGf7oDbFE5NU7MbsffNuORA6M0_y0vdD43NObWdFQb991pS0OLyJytmGb-ObjfW0oUFQSZjgeUXUCYtk-mOY9bJ-iqTkK2roglR_8-897bANKcEVfrrLYVZaWT-vsArdqeOa7W9XTaNvExcri3FPZCuTfy-j0fEK-ImzjYyt8OJXBeJdKJrgRP8ns3HOdLgGX_DpsJlxHOQYCvjwleAyXT2SPE-mc6FiVgA-H_pM_HYk33Urskdqo8AjWB4f6CTpRymIoCHupQRIeEardrx8BjYgD5dLo_pUbceZ99n1x_56IN7NUGSHEcfQxqmt-8Ao6I2jz3N7YG_yM0MVzRAy0X3jRwWLVDY%3D)

Your support means the world to me, and I promise — I won’t let you down.
For God and Country,
Captain Mike Bouchard
U.S. Army | Bronze Star Recipient

subject: I couldn’t be more honored or excited.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120518757/586531472/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251203Diana_DB_NO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5YjlkN2MxLTU4ZDAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oK_NcpLE2YrC7P33XxTBID40Vx8-q3FgYkj5n5vdLDg=)
---
Hi Peter,

My name is Diana Bula, and, as the newest Her Bold Move team member, I am writing to introduce myself! I’m thrilled to announce that I will officially be serving as Political Manager at this incredible organization – and I couldn’t be more honored or excited.

Women and girls everywhere deserve to see themselves reflected on the ballot and in positions of power. **Joining Her Bold Move enables me to contribute to the effort to ensure women’s voices are heard and protected.**

Here’s a little about me:

I am a Latina immigrant who believes that every woman deserves unrestricted access to reproductive health care. I grew up in Texas, which has given me a firsthand perspective into how difficult it has been for women, especially those in my community, to access basic, fundamental reproductive healthcare.

**As I set my vision for Her Bold Move’s endorsement roster, I want us to make sure we’re uplifting women who often go overlooked. These are the changemakers who step up not because it’s easy, but because their communities deserve a voice.**

I will be searching for trailblazers from communities that have long been underrepresented; women stepping into races where support is scarce but the need for leadership is greatest. Her Bold Move candidates have been shattering ceilings, making history, and becoming the first to hold positions where women, and particularly women of color, have never been represented before.

**These are the kinds of candidates who don’t just want to win an election; they want to change the world. And together, Her Bold Move will help them do just that.**

[**We have already started meeting with candidates for the 2026 elections, but we won’t be able to offer them the game-changing support they’ll need without your help. Will you donate $20.26 to help us fund our programs and elevate some of the most courageous women in the nation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120518759/586531477/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251203Diana_DB_NO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5YjlkN2MxLTU4ZDAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oK_NcpLE2YrC7P33XxTBID40Vx8-q3FgYkj5n5vdLDg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_ | | [**$20.26 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120518762/586531479/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251203Diana_DB_NO_8_G_N_EB20.26&express_lane=true&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5YjlkN2MxLTU4ZDAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oK_NcpLE2YrC7P33XxTBID40Vx8-q3FgYkj5n5vdLDg=)

name: Team Walz
subject: An attack on our basic rights
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251203-220&t=1&akid=220%2E34582%2EOnUKiD)
Peter,
The attack on blue states from the federal government has arrived in Minnesota. We’ve seen it in Illinois, we’ve seen it in California, and now it’s arrived at our home.
Just recently, one of Donald Trump’s cabinet members tweeted “MINNESOTA: You’re on notice.”
They’re coming after us, Peter. Not only that, they’re coming after the progress we’ve made, and the basic rights that we celebrate here in Minnesota.
Together we’ve built one of the best states to raise a family, expanded opportunity, and increased public safety — but in Donald Trump’s eyes, it all needs to be torn down, just because we have a Democratic governor.
**Governor Walz knows that together, we can protect the progress that we’ve made here in Minnesota, but it’s going to take all of us.**
**[Help stand up to the Trump administration's attacks on Minnesota by rushing a $5 to our campaign so we can fight back and protect our progress.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251203.LfUHLa&amount=5&refcode=em20251203-220&t=2&akid=220%2E34582%2EOnUKiD)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251203.LfUHLa&amount=5&refcode=20251203-220&t=21&akid=220%2E34582%2EOnUKiD)**

Together we’ve built one of the best states to raise a family, expanded opportunity, and increased public safety — but in Donald Trump’s eyes, it all needs to be torn down, just because we have a Democratic governor. Governor Walz knows that together, we can protect the progress that we’ve made here in Minnesota, but it’s going to take all of us. — Team Walz Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23686%2E4449941%2E6B-Oxj) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23686%2E4449941%2E6B-Oxj) [**BREAKING FROM _NEWSWEEK:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70508?t=3&akid=23686%2E4449941%2E6B-Oxj)

subject: One month to go…here's what comes next:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I just wanted to say **thank you** to this team for stepping up ahead of November's end-of-month deadline.

Every time you chip in, share a message, and stay engaged, it helps my campaign build and maintain the momentum we need to counter attacks from Republicans and the extremists who want to keep Trump in power.

Now, we have one month left until our end-of-year deadline. How we show up before then will set the tone for everything that comes next as we prepare for 2026. It's more clear than ever that the midterm is our chance to take back the House from Trump's grip and build a Congress that actually reflects the values of the American people.

We've got our work cut out for us, but I could not be more grateful to be in this fight with you by my side. As we head into these next few months, I'm going to be counting on you more than ever, so again: **Thank you for all that you do.**

In solidarity,

name: Sen. Mark Kelly
subject: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Gabby and I both knew we couldn’t just sit on the sidelines as our country went further and further down the wrong path. We had to do something.
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Mark Kelly.
I want to talk through a difficult decision I had to make about six years ago.
We were a few years into Donald Trump’s first term, and Mitch McConnell was the Senate Majority Leader. Gabby and I both knew we couldn’t just sit on the sidelines as our country went further and further down the wrong path. We had to do something.
So, together, we decided to launch a campaign for Arizona’s seat in the U.S. Senate. I didn’t know if I could win, or if anyone would support me, and I had no idea if my team would be able to raise the resources we’d need to win.
But one by one, people came on board. $5 here, $10 there. More than a million people donated and volunteered to help me, and in November of 2020, we won that campaign.
Around that same time, Jon Ossoff was making a similar decision. He went on to win one of the closest, toughest, most expensive races in the country down in Georgia. Over the last several years, it’s been an honor to work beside him in the Senate. Jon’s been a constant ally, and I’m proud to call him a friend.
He’s up for reelection next year, he’s in for an incredibly tough fight, and it’s absolutely critical that he wins. To do it, we all need to help.
[**So, I’m humbly asking you: Can you make a donation to help Jon raise the resources it’ll take to win?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=1&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.UdqSSd&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=20&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.3llSsh&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=21&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.bGqFYH&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=22&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.IZ7DFn&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=23&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.pWvP31&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=24&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.PyZHDd&refcode=em251203-1-f&t=25&akid=1160%2E5691347%2E-HcCRQ)**
---
****
We need more Jon Ossoffs in the Senate, not less.
Thank you in advance for chipping in.
Mark

name: Redistricting Alert
subject: Math no longer adds up for Dems to reclaim House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Colorado
body:
They already rigged the maps in Texas, North Carolina, and Missouri to silence Democrats. Now, they are coming for Florida.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016OCqw0LjkIadaL7egS88CNRrAFqpAmwnEhAa7AMtUIhDy03o8OUsgFKDAj71NodILczYxLe0xIznG7HhBQrDYlZrLga-rX41AkhO_Obq0jIptb8v735c9G6JZ8VsPyoP3EU-Gue-ir8LEqSMhZK45yhjAIRWjaimRdvSm3m3YJPGxKpPJ1qE5K7FDa1LK2spvKzjDdCDL1XDmX7g2Gw1HrocCx14ge6L&c=T4PB2qV2Gl1oYwaOzPZ9wr_vL0qcEVUad_KJFLBMAiUYEo91epoJbA==&ch=BzxMXOEkumhyhLN_sBy1-Kl0kRp5WAUeiQ5AforJq_Uk0wn23aLXHQ==)
---
| Peter,
Last night in Tennessee, the earth didn't just shake--it cracked wide open.
In a district Donald Trump carried by 22 points just a year ago, Democrat Aftyn Behn shifted it blue by more than 12 percentage points.
The blue wave isn't just coming; the tide is already rising.
If Democrats replicate this swing in 2026, we wouldn't just take back the House--we would wipe the floor with MAGA.
---

Dear Peter,

This Giving Tuesday was a powerful reminder of what we can accomplish together. Because of you, we not only met—we exceeded—our $100,000 match goal.

At a time when reproductive rights are under relentless attack, your support sends a clear message: **we will not back down.**

Every dollar raised will help us:
* Challenge abortion bans in the courts
* Defend access to essential reproductive health care
* Protect providers and patients through shield laws
* Fight for a future where everyone, no matter where they live, can get the care they need

clean_body: Your support sends a powerful message | | | | ---|--- | Dear Peter, This Giving Tuesday was a powerful reminder of what we can accomplish together. Because of you, we not only met—we exceeded—our $100,000 match goal. At a time when reproductive rights are under relentless attack, your support sends a clear message: we will not back down. Every dollar raised will help us: Challenge abortion bans in the courts Defend access to essential reproductive health care Protect providers and patients through shield laws Fight for a future where everyone, no matter where they live, can get the care they need If you weren't able to give on Giving Tuesday, there is still time to make an impact. Every gift matters—and fuels this fight for reproductive freedom. | From all of us at the Center, thank you for your commitment, your voice, and your belief in a better future. Your partnership gives us strength and hope. With gratitude, Gabriella Morris Chief Development Officer | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

I’m proud to share some incredible news. One hundred fifteen Texas Democratic leaders have endorsed my campaign for Attorney General. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14191260?e=5d8d80652b)

| | , I’m proud to share some incredible news. **Over one hundred Texas Democratic leaders have endorsed my campaign for Attorney General.** **[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=9a2ad7cd37&e=5d8d80652b)**[**You can see the full list here.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=870d07e1ba&e=5d8d80652b) This is powerful support from courageous Texas House members, Texas Democratic Party leadership, mayors, and locally elected community leaders who know what it takes to serve. They understand the needs of our cities, counties, and schools because they meet those needs every day. And they believe I’m the candidate ready to restore honesty, integrity, and professionalism to the Office of the Attorney General. With just over ten weeks until early voting begins in the Texas Democratic Primary, I am ready. I am unafraid. And I am running to be your next Attorney General. This is our race to win together. Let’s go show Texas, and the nation, what real Democratic leadership looks like. It looks like this:
**I’ll never lie to you.
I can’t be bought.
And I have your back.**

[**Are you ready to join these great Texan leaders and stand with Team Joe? Donate today to keep this campaign moving forward.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=a912864427&e=5d8d80652b) Onward!

**

# [Republicans Should Be Very Worried After Winning TN-07 by Single Digits](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=180612278&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNjEyMjc4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3Nzc5NzcsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM2OTk3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._ec7CoyAa9aZj1yK-wXnewV8rTk_qL5J2LEnFkV3mtc)
### Spending $4 million to win a Trump +22 district is not great.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Dec 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=180612278&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNjEyMjc4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NDc3Nzk3NywiZXhwIjoxNzY3MzY5OTc3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bM2fZxfMK3aI1FRA6RSJcFGCw17463z3j7xdKcsGZ3Q&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=180612278&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNjEyMjc4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3Nzc5NzcsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM2OTk3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._ec7CoyAa9aZj1yK-wXnewV8rTk_qL5J2LEnFkV3mtc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=180612278&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNjEyMjc4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3Nzc5NzcsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM2OTk3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._ec7CoyAa9aZj1yK-wXnewV8rTk_qL5J2LEnFkV3mtc)

---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/440beda3-003a-463f-b006-39831f57401f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/440beda3-003a-463f-b006-39831f57401f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I had a good laugh last night watching MAGA influencers scramble to celebrate what they called a win in Tennessee's 7th Congressional District. They were acting like it was some kind of triumph, when in reality, it was anything but.
National Republicans had to dump more than $4 million into defending a Trump +22 district. That is not a victory. Aftyn Behn, who ran a strong campaign, lost by about 9 points--that's a 13-point overperformance for Democrats.
Yes, it's true that we've seen stronger overperformances in other House specials. But here's the thing: Republicans went all in. Full-court press. They juiced turnout to midterm levels. This wasn't a sleepy, low-turnout race. It was a high-turnout race--exactly the kind of environment that's supposed to benefit Republicans in a deep-red district.
And even in that environment, all they managed to do was hold on--by single digits. That should set off alarm bells.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/440beda3-003a-463f-b006-39831f57401f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/440beda3-003a-463f-b006-39831f57401f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
If Democrats overperform in next year's midterms by even close to that margin, states like Iowa, Alaska, and Texas come into play--if we run strong candidates. And a whole swath of Republican House seats will suddenly be vulnerable, especially in Texas, where their gerrymandered map may backfire.
I wouldn't be surprised if we start seeing a bunch of Republican retirements in the coming weeks. That'll throw gasoline on the dumpster fire already burning inside the GOP and the broader MAGA movement. More primaries, more chaos. And I'm not convinced the best Republican candidates are going to run this cycle.
What is likely is that MAGA candidates will flood the primaries--and historically, MAGA candidates do well in primaries but underperform in the general. That's how you end up with a 2018-style blue wave, where Democrats are netting 8 to 13-point swings. And when we run the right candidates--and they run absolute clowns--you can squeeze out another 2 or 3 points on top of that.
So if you're the kind of person who likes betting the prediction markets (I hate them personally), I'd start putting money on Democrats taking back the House. And I'd say the Senate is in play. It's not easy--it's a steep climb--but we're landing recruits, building campaigns, raising money, and consistently overperforming.
Republicans should be terrified by what just happened in TN-07. This was a deep-red district with midterm-level turnout and a MAGA swarm behind it. Every influencer on the right zeroed in on this race. They treated beating Aftyn Behn like it was existential. But they can't do that for every race in 2026. And Trump won't be on the ballot to carry the dead weight.
Democrats need to cast the widest net possible this cycle. We need candidates who are well-funded, who fit their district, who can actually run good campaigns--and we need to do it everywhere. Compete everywhere.
Too often, Democrats play small ball--targeting a handful of battleground states and districts. And yeah, gerrymandering and structural stuff makes it hard in some places. But I don't believe there's a single place in America where it's impossible for a Democrat to win. Not one.
So if you're thinking about running for office? This is the time. Even if you lose--so what? We need people to fight. Make Republicans sweat. Make them earn their seats, even in deep-red districts. Especially in deep-red districts. Mike Johnson types shouldn't just skate by. Force them to work for it, maybe for the first time in their careers.
And the more races we contest, the better candidates we run, the more shots we take--the more surprises we'll see in 2026 up and down the ballot.
If we want the Senate back, if we want to actually govern and improve people's lives, we've got to win races people don't think are winnable.
Remember: this time in 2020, nobody thought we'd flip two Senate seats in Georgia. But we did. Strange things happen.
I always joke that when it comes to Texas and North Carolina, I'm Charlie Brown and the football keeps getting yanked away. But one of these days, it's gonna connect. And if it's going to happen, it'll be when candidates like Roy Cooper and James Talarico are running, when Republicans are unpopular, and when voters are pissed about the economy.
We've got the makings of that now.
So sure--let Republicans gloat online. Let them channel Trump's bullshit bravado. But Trump is in free fall. The GOP is in trouble. And the Democratic Party--flawed as it is--is on the rise heading into the midterms.
We still have work to do: building a better party, elevating stronger candidates, delivering more for working people. But heading into 2026, I'm feeling pretty damn good about our chances.

_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._
