clean_body: $4 million to win a Trump +22 district should set off alarm bells. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Spending $4 million to win a Trump +22 district is not great. | | | Dec 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | I had a good laugh last night watching MAGA influencers scramble to celebrate what they called a win in Tennessee's 7th Congressional District. They were acting like it was some kind of triumph, when in reality, it was anything but. National Republicans had to dump more than $4 million into defending a Trump +22 district. That is not a victory. Aftyn Behn, who ran a strong campaign, lost by about 9 points--that's a 13-point overperformance for Democrats. Yes, it's true that we've seen stronger overperformances in other House specials. But here's the thing: Republicans went all in. Full-court press. They juiced turnout to midterm levels. This wasn't a sleepy, low-turnout race. It was a high-turnout race--exactly the kind of environment that's supposed to benefit Republicans in a deep-red district. And even in that environment, all they managed to do was hold on--by single digits. That should set off alarm bells. * If Democrats overperform in next year's midterms by even close to that margin, states like Iowa, Alaska, and Texas come into play--if we run strong candidates. And a whole swath of Republican House seats will suddenly be vulnerable, especially in Texas, where their gerrymandered map may backfire. I wouldn't be surprised if we start seeing a bunch of Republican retirements in the coming weeks. That'll throw gasoline on the dumpster fire already burning inside the GOP and the broader MAGA movement. More primaries, more chaos. And I'm not convinced the best Republican candidates are going to run this cycle. What is likely is that MAGA candidates will flood the primaries--and historically, MAGA candidates do well in primaries but underperform in the general. That's how you end up with a 2018-style blue wave, where Democrats are netting 8 to 13-point swings. And when we run the right candidates--and they run absolute clowns--you can squeeze out another 2 or 3 points on top of that. So if you're the kind of person who likes betting the prediction markets (I hate them personally), I'd start putting money on Democrats taking back the House. And I'd say the Senate is in play. It's not easy--it's a steep climb--but we're landing recruits, building campaigns, raising money, and consistently overperforming. Republicans should be terrified by what just happened in TN-07. This was a deep-red district with midterm-level turnout and a MAGA swarm behind it. Every influencer on the right zeroed in on this race. They treated beating Aftyn Behn like it was existential. But they can't do that for every race in 2026. And Trump won't be on the ballot to carry the dead weight. Democrats need to cast the widest net possible this cycle. We need candidates who are well-funded, who fit their district, who can actually run good campaigns--and we need to do it everywhere. Compete everywhere. Too often, Democrats play small ball--targeting a handful of battleground states and districts. And yeah, gerrymandering and structural stuff makes it hard in some places. But I don't believe there's a single place in America where it's impossible for a Democrat to win. Not one. So if you're thinking about running for office? This is the time. Even if you lose--so what? We need people to fight. Make Republicans sweat. Make them earn their seats, even in deep-red districts. Especially in deep-red districts. Mike Johnson types shouldn't just skate by. Force them to work for it, maybe for the first time in their careers. And the more races we contest, the better candidates we run, the more shots we take--the more surprises we'll see in 2026 up and down the ballot. If we want the Senate back, if we want to actually govern and improve people's lives, we've got to win races people don't think are winnable. Remember: this time in 2020, nobody thought we'd flip two Senate seats in Georgia. But we did. Strange things happen. I always joke that when it comes to Texas and North Carolina, I'm Charlie Brown and the football keeps getting yanked away. But one of these days, it's gonna connect. And if it's going to happen, it'll be when candidates like Roy Cooper and James Talarico are running, when Republicans are unpopular, and when voters are pissed about the economy. We've got the makings of that now. So sure--let Republicans gloat online. Let them channel Trump's bullshit bravado. But Trump is in free fall. The GOP is in trouble. And the Democratic Party--flawed as it is--is on the rise heading into the midterms. We still have work to do: building a better party, elevating stronger candidates, delivering more for working people. But heading into 2026, I'm feeling pretty damn good about our chances. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. Special Episode of The Mom View!

Featuring Second Lady Usha Vance and Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins

Second Lady Usha Vance and Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins sat down with The Mom View to share their parenting secrets,
how they balance motherhood with two of the most demanding roles in the Trump administration, and what it really takes to raise
kids while serving America.

In this exclusive interview, Usha Vance opens up about keeping her three young children's lives "normal and boring," why her kids
do chores and wear hand-me-downs, and her passion for literacy through the Summer Reading Challenge. Secretary Brooke Rollins
shares her inspiring journey from a small Texas farm to leading the USDA, how her faith guides her work, and why she believes
every mom can answer God's call while putting family first.

Whether you're a mom juggling career and family or just want an inside look at how these two influential women navigate motherhood
in Washington, this episode is packed with practical wisdom and encouragement.

Watch the show TODAY!

clean_body: Second Lady Usha Vance and Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins sat down with Moms for America on The Mom View for an exclusive interview about juggling kids and career, the inside story on Washington, and much more. [] [] [] [] Special Episode of The Mom View! Featuring Second Lady Usha Vance and Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins Second Lady Usha Vance and Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins sat down with The Mom View to share their parenting secrets, how they balance motherhood with two of the most demanding roles in the Trump administration, and what it really takes to raise kids while serving America. In this exclusive interview, Usha Vance opens up about keeping her three young children's lives "normal and boring," why her kids do chores and wear hand-me-downs, and her passion for literacy through the Summer Reading Challenge. Secretary Brooke Rollins shares her inspiring journey from a small Texas farm to leading the USDA, how her faith guides her work, and why she believes every mom can answer God's call while putting family first. Whether you're a mom juggling career and family or just want an inside look at how these two influential women navigate motherhood in Washington, this episode is packed with practical wisdom and encouragement. Watch the show TODAY! CLICK TO WATCH NOW! [] [] [] [] [] The MomView is more than just a show – it's a movement. We’re bringing the voices of conservative mothers to the forefront, addressing parenting insights, societal issues, the principles of the Constitution, public policy, heritage, and current events with the powerful role of mothers in shaping the future. The Mom View is produced by Moms for America and sponsored by the Herzog Foundation. [] With gratitude, Kimberly Fletcher President & Founder Moms for America The Mom View An Exciting New Show That's Shaking Up the Conversation! P.S. **Trump may be running our country on a memory-enhancing serum.** It's now available to every older American who wants an 88% stronger memory. **[See the details here.](https://substack.com/redirect/2e4191a2-975e-4252-9fe8-fa4e3cbc522f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# Trump pauses immigration from 19 countries
The Trump administration implemented an **[immediate immigration pause](https://substack.com/redirect/a647b99c-1175-4c96-8f62-5f2cff0426fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** targeting 19 countries already under travel restrictions, affecting green card applications, citizenship processes, and requiring re-vetting of arrivals since Biden's 2021 inauguration.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a647b99c-1175-4c96-8f62-5f2cff0426fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Restrictions enacted:** The pause covers Afghanistan, Burma, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Libya, Somalia, Sudan, Yemen, Burundi, Cuba, Laos, Sierra Leone, Togo, Turkmenistan, and Venezuela, subjecting nationals who entered after January 20, 2021 to re-screening interviews for security and public safety threats.
* **Citizenship ceremonies halted:** All green card and naturalization applications from the 19 nations are frozen, with individuals who already passed citizenship tests unable to participate in swearing-in ceremonies until restrictions lift, prompting confused Reddit posts from applicants like a Portland man whose wife's December 3 ceremony was abruptly canceled without explanation.
* **Biden accused of enabling terrorists:** Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem justified the measures during Trump's Cabinet meeting by accusing Biden of using DHS to "invade the country with terrorists," claiming he deliberately transported arrivals on airplanes and through airports, with USCIS citing the D.C. National Guard shooting by Afghan national Rahmanullah Lakanwal.

The restrictions apply to anyone from the listed countries who arrived in the United States during the Biden presidency.
* * *
# **Republicans hold Tennessee seat with Van Epps victory**
Republican Matt Van Epps **[secured victory](https://substack.com/redirect/9348beae-6710-45a6-a730-3b6684da3fdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Tennessee's tight special congressional election Tuesday, defeating Democratic Aftyn Behn by nine percentage points in a district President Trump carried by 22 points last year.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4f9aa487-2c04-48ab-a87f-c34b9d609447?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **GOP maintains majority buffer:** Van Epps' win prevents further erosion of the razor-thin Republican House majority, though Democrats celebrated Behn's stronger-than-expected showing as a "flashing warning sign" heading into midterms.
* **Heavy artillery deployed:** House Speaker Mike Johnson spent Election Eve campaigning across the district with Van Epps, while Trump called into a rally urging supporters to deliver a "sweeping victory" since "the whole world is watching," with the president later joining a tele-rally and crediting his endorsement as the difference-maker.
* **Controversial past statements resurface:** Republicans hammered Behn over resurfaced comments from a 2020 podcast where she said "I hate Nashville" and "country music," plus a 2019 op-ed calling Tennessee a "racist state" and deleted social media posts critical of police, though the self-described "AOC of Tennessee" dismissed attacks saying she was "living rent-free in President Trump's mind."

Van Epps declared the outcome "a defining moment for Tennessee," vowing to support Trump's agenda in Congress while Behn told supporters the campaign represents "the beginning of something so powerful" across the South.
* * *
# **DHS targets New Orleans for illegal immigrant sweep**
The Department of Homeland Security announced Wednesday that New Orleans will undergo a **[massive immigration enforcement](https://substack.com/redirect/39b7d5c4-275e-40ef-9769-7419a046f16b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** operation targeting criminal illegal aliens.
* **" Operation Catahoula Crunch" details:** DHS released a list of 10 illegal migrants from countries including El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Jordan, Mexico, and Vietnam who were freed from local jails despite arrests for violent crimes such as home invasion, armed robbery, grand theft auto, rape, aggravated assault, and sexual battery, with approximately 200 Border Patrol agents expected to execute the sweep.
* **Sanctuary city:** DHS spokesperson Tricia McLaughlin blasted sanctuary policies for releasing "criminal illegal aliens" back onto streets and forcing law enforcement to risk their lives recapturing offenders who "should have never been put back on the streets," calling it "asinine that these monsters were released...to COMMIT MORE CRIMES"
* **National Guard reinforcements:** President Trump announced during Tuesday's Cabinet meeting that Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry requested up to 1,000 National Guard troops to combat crime, with deployment expected by Christmas--placing visible military presence during peak tourism season including the Sugar Bowl and Mardi Gras.

The announcement follows a New York Times report revealing ICE plans a separate operation targeting Somali illegal immigrants in Minnesota's Twin Cities.

"You guys are trying to rig elections!!!" | | | Dec 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. and former Navy SEAL Eli Crane during a heated hearing on the U.S. census screening for legal immigration status. "You know that if the American people find out exactly how many illegal aliens are in this country they will be appalled!!" Crane told the Democrat. More Headlines Below! | | ---|---|--- Dear truth-seeking American, A quietly slipped into President Trump's 2020 "medical cocktail" is now being called the closest thing to legal brain-age reversal. Doctors say this substance made aging brains 88% younger in just 10 days. It was given to Trump at Walter Reed hospital... Now the public is just beginning to learn why. To your younger brain, Dr. Allan Spreen, MD Chief Medical Advisor, Health Sciences Institute P.S. Trump may be running our country on a memory-enhancing serum. It's now available to every older American who wants an 88% stronger memory. Trump pauses immigration from 19 countries The Trump administration implemented an targeting 19 countries already under travel restrictions, affecting green card applications, citizenship processes, and requiring re-vetting of arrivals since Biden's 2021 inauguration. | | ---|---|--- Restrictions enacted: The pause covers Afghanistan, Burma, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Libya, Somalia, Sudan, Yemen, Burundi, Cuba, Laos, Sierra Leone, Togo, Turkmenistan, and Venezuela, subjecting nationals who entered after January 20, 2021 to re-screening interviews for security and public safety threats. Citizenship ceremonies halted: All green card and naturalization applications from the 19 nations are frozen, with individuals who already passed citizenship tests unable to participate in swearing-in ceremonies until restrictions lift, prompting confused Reddit posts from applicants like a Portland man whose wife's December 3 ceremony was abruptly canceled without explanation. Biden accused of enabling terrorists: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem justified the measures during Trump's Cabinet meeting by accusing Biden of using DHS to "invade the country with terrorists," claiming he deliberately transported arrivals on airplanes and through airports, with USCIS citing the D.C. National Guard shooting by Afghan national Rahmanullah Lakanwal. The restrictions apply to anyone from the listed countries who arrived in the United States during the Biden presidency. Republicans hold Tennessee seat with Van Epps victory Republican Matt Van Epps in Tennessee's tight special congressional election Tuesday, defeating Democratic Aftyn Behn by nine percentage points in a district President Trump carried by 22 points last year. GOP maintains majority buffer: Van Epps' win prevents further erosion of the razor-thin Republican House majority, though Democrats celebrated Behn's stronger-than-expected showing as a "flashing warning sign" heading into midterms. Heavy artillery deployed: House Speaker Mike Johnson spent Election Eve campaigning across the district with Van Epps, while Trump called into a rally urging supporters to deliver a "sweeping victory" since "the whole world is watching," with the president later joining a tele-rally and crediting his endorsement as the difference-maker. Controversial past statements resurface: Republicans hammered Behn over resurfaced comments from a 2020 podcast where she said "I hate Nashville" and "country music," plus a 2019 op-ed calling Tennessee a "racist state" and deleted social media posts critical of police, though the self-described "AOC of Tennessee" dismissed attacks saying she was "living rent-free in President Trump's mind." Van Epps declared the outcome "a defining moment for Tennessee," vowing to support Trump's agenda in Congress while Behn told supporters the campaign represents "the beginning of something so powerful" across the South. DHS targets New Orleans for illegal immigrant sweep The Department of Homeland Security announced Wednesday that New Orleans will undergo a operation targeting criminal illegal aliens. " Operation Catahoula Crunch" details: DHS released a list of 10 illegal migrants from countries including El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Jordan, Mexico, and Vietnam who were freed from local jails despite arrests for violent crimes such as home invasion, armed robbery, grand theft auto, rape, aggravated assault, and sexual battery, with approximately 200 Border Patrol agents expected to execute the sweep. Sanctuary city: DHS spokesperson Tricia McLaughlin blasted sanctuary policies for releasing "criminal illegal aliens" back onto streets and forcing law enforcement to risk their lives recapturing offenders who "should have never been put back on the streets," calling it "asinine that these monsters were released...to COMMIT MORE CRIMES" National Guard reinforcements: President Trump announced during Tuesday's Cabinet meeting that Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry requested up to 1,000 National Guard troops to combat crime, with deployment expected by Christmas--placing visible military presence during peak tourism season including the Sugar Bowl and Mardi Gras. The announcement follows a New York Times report revealing ICE plans a separate operation targeting Somali illegal immigrants in Minnesota's Twin Cities. You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: A brief explanation
body:
---
Derek, Today, we are going to ask you to make your first donation of 2025 directly to the DNC — but first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we need your support right now. Here’s what’s going on: Less than a year into Trump’s presidency, he’s:
* Started building his $300 million White House ballroom while cutting food assistance for people nationwide.
* Threatened to end voting by mail and asked Republicans to redraw congressional maps across the country in their favor.
* Repeatedly talked about arresting his political opponents, while threatening to pull the television licenses of news agencies that have accurately covered his disastrous second term in office.

Trump wants people to be too demoralized to oppose him. He wants to intimidate us into silence. He and his allies are counting on Democrats throwing in the towel and completely giving up. But we won’t — and neither should you. That’s why this month is so important. December has just begun, but in just a few weeks, we face our most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since the 2024 election. At the end of the year, we will be required to report how much we’ve raised over the last few months. Those numbers will tell a story: A lot of contributions will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda heading into next year’s midterms. _They’ll show we aren’t done fighting_. [**So, Derek, we’re asking: Can you join thousands of your fellow Democrats in making a contribution to the DNC today? It will add up fast when we all come together to do our part:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251202_5431_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5431_22930333_y11cW8&akid=5431%2E22930333%2Ey11cW8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251202_5431_fr&refcode2=5431_22930333_y11cW8&akid=5431%2E22930333%2Ey11cW8)**

body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville. I just looked over some polling numbers, and **if you're Trump, this is really bad news.**

His approval rating is crashing and burning, he's underwater in EVERY swing state, and now his numbers are even flatlining with his own supporters!**The wheels are comin' right off, and there's not a damn thing he can do about it.**

I'll just say it: **Trump is _screwed._**

**Now here's the juicy bit, y'all:** If Trump's numbers keep tailspinning (and I'd bet good money they will), _he could drag down the entire GOP with him._ Now, we gotta confirm these numbers _immediately._

**We're launching my _exclusive_ 12/3 Trump approval poll TODAY to prove that his numbers are circling the drain.** We need as many responses as possible to get an accurate reading, so please, tell us now:

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to make it to the top .
body:
I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.
But I have to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $25 between Real Texas PAC and my Senate campaign in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning?
What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?
What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?
This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Steven Horsford is living in luxury off of his donors!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
As Nevada families contemplate how they will get by this Christmas, Steven Horsford proves he is out of touch with NV-04 |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ac07ed9310&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,

Washington has forgotten the people of Nevada. A new report has revealed that while hardworking families struggle with rising costs, **Members of Congress, including Steven Horsford, are spending tens of thousands of dollars at upscale restaurants, steakhouses, and cocktail bars,** all funded by political donations. **Plenty of families in Nevada are struggling to figure out how they will stuff their children’s stockings this year, but Washington elites like Steven Horsford are living large!** Career politicians like Steven Horsford are more focused on luxury dining than on lowering costs for families, securing our border, or helping the communities they are supposed to represent.
---
| [ CLICK HERE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=81a9e6a3b8&e=273c9a71fb " CLICK HERE")
---
| [DONATE TO REMOVE WASHINGTON ELITIST STEVEN HORSFORD FROM CONGRESS](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7092e8611c&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TO REMOVE WASHINGTON ELITIST STEVEN HORSFORD FROM CONGRESS")
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=78c0efc68f&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Nevadans should not have to watch their representatives enjoy steak dinners in D.C. while our communities deal with the consequences of the radical leftism they pursue in Congress!
---
| [ CLICK HERE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c6e3f538ab&e=273c9a71fb " CLICK HERE")
---
| [READ ABOUT HORSFORD’S LAVISH LIFESTYLE ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=cbde251783&e=273c9a71fb "READ ABOUT HORSFORD’S LAVISH LIFESTYLE ")
---
| When I am in Congress, I will fight to make sure Washington serves the American people, not the other way around. **I will put Nevadans first, not lobbyists, not special interests, and not the political insiders who think taxpayer-supported luxury is part of the job.** In order to do this, we have to defeat Steven Horsford! **Will you chip in to my campaign so that NV-04 can have a Congressman who does their job in Washington?**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together.**I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=26716d26d9&e=273c9a71fb)

---
| Your support will help us take this fight to Washington and demand the transparency and integrity the American people deserve. Together, we can end the waste, restore accountability, and bring respect back to public service.
---
| David Flippo
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Trump isn’t breaking for the holidays — and neither can we.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Hi there, everyone. Before we enter the busy holiday season and take some much-needed time to unplug, I wanted to reach out with an important update: The midterm election year officially begins in 29 days — and we need to be ultra-prepared to defeat the Republican opposition. As Chair of the Democratic Senate Campaign Committee, I’m leading the charge to flip key battleground states blue and raise the resources we need to win — _but in November, we didn’t quite reach our fundraising goals._ **We can’t afford to fall further behind before the election year begins. The GOP will be looking at our fundraising numbers as soon as they go public at the end of the quarter to see if we have the momentum to take back the Senate.** [**_Will you rush $10 right now to get us back on track before the quarter ends?_ ** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120533537/586570383/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Holiday-Break_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAzMDkxZi02OGQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yA0GDKyLHAVbKTihgoYT3EDKV4kvRHJ4Gh8cBLmChK8=) | | [ DONATE $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120533538/586570384/1747702192?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Holiday-Break_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAzMDkxZi02OGQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yA0GDKyLHAVbKTihgoYT3EDKV4kvRHJ4Gh8cBLmChK8=)
---
For many folks, now is the time to take it easy and focus on spending time with loved ones. That’s why I’m reaching out before the holiday slump — because we need every grassroots Democrat to chip in what they can to end the year strong.
**But Donald Trump’s attacks on our democracy and destruction of our government won’t take a break for the holiday season — and neither can we.** Recently, Trump has doubled down on his attacks on our health care and even called for violence against esteemed members of the House and Senate. We can’t allow this to continue.
_We must keep up the fight for our majority,_ reject Trump’s extremism and deliver hope in this season of uncertainty. [**_I believe one of the best ways to do that is by chipping in $10 today:_ ** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120533539/586570385/-510661250?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Holiday-Break_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTAzMDkxZi02OGQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yA0GDKyLHAVbKTihgoYT3EDKV4kvRHJ4Gh8cBLmChK8=)

clean_body: Hi there, everyone. Before we enter the busy holiday season and take some much-needed time to unplug, I wanted to reach out with an important update: The midterm election year officially begins in 29 days — and we need to be ultra-prepared to defeat the Republican opposition. As Chair of the Democratic Senate Campaign Committee, I’m leading the charge to flip key battleground states blue and raise the resources we need to win — but in November, we didn’t quite reach our fundraising goals. We can’t afford to fall further behind before the election year begins. The GOP will be looking at our fundraising numbers as soon as they go public at the end of the quarter to see if we have the momentum to take back the Senate. = | | = For many folks, now is the time to take it easy and focus on spending time with loved ones. That’s why I’m reaching out before the holiday slump — because we need every grassroots Democrat to chip in what they can to end the year strong. But Donald Trump’s attacks on our democracy and destruction of our government won’t take a break for the holiday season — and neither can we. Recently, Trump has doubled down on his attacks on our health care and even called for violence against esteemed members of the House and Senate. We can’t allow this to continue. We must keep up the fight for our majority, reject Trump’s extremism and deliver hope in this season of uncertainty. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being by my side, and happy holidays. Sincerely, K.G. * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: James Talarico
subject: Serving others
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**How we win in 2026.**
It's going to require a candidate who can inspire and energize people all over the state and across the country.
It's also going to require a grassroots army to meet voters where they're at — a tough feat in a state as big as Texas.
It's going to take thousands of Texans stepping up and doing their part to win — including engaging with their neighbors who are not ready to vote for us yet... something that is not always easy to do.
I’m so excited that we've already had over 10,000 Texans go to our website and sign up to volunteer. This is without us asking — just people who are so fired up that they took the initiative to visit our website and sign-up.
Some have even started their own volunteer meetups across the state. And it's not just political — during the SNAP food assistance crisis, our volunteers organized visits to food banks to help others.
**Look at this:**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=1&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)
Our campaign is organizing not just to win an election, but to serve people, which we often forget is what politics is supposed to be about — helping others and loving our neighbors.
I am so thankful we are building this movement together.
But for the rest of us who either can't volunteer or it's just not your thing, I need you as well. We all have a part to play in winning this race.
So with our first, full FEC fundraising deadline bearing down on us fast, I am asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Texas? Volunteers are doing their part, now I need you with them if you're in a position to do so. Because when it all comes together, that's how we win. So please. Contribute today.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=2&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=21&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=22&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-launch.qllyRI&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=23&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-launch.UeXr9I&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=24&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-launch.457jmL&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=25&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-launch.jEYg2l&refcode=em251203-1-ak&t=26&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)**
---
****
Thank you again,
James

Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=27&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=28&refcode2=291_1347274_F_k-8X&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=291%2E1347274%2EF_k-8X).

name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Fund NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

In the wake of Trump's $1.1 BILLION funding cuts to NPR and PBS earlier
this year, public media stations across the country are struggling to stay
afloat – launching emergency fundraising appeals to try to stay on air.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1011&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Headline: PBS, NPR stations struggle with Trump-fueled government
funding cuts

Meanwhile, Trump's busy rubber stamping mega-mergers for his oligarch
media buddies – tightening their grip on what we see, hear, and read.

That's why Our Revolution is fighting back. It's not too late for Congress
to reverse these dangerous cuts – but it will only happen if enough of us
come together to show that our public outrage cannot be ignored.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1012&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]We CANNOT let Trump and his oligarchs steal our media. Will you
urgently add your name to demand Congress restore funding for PBS and NPR
NOW, before it's too late?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1013&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1014&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Photo of an Our Revolution rally to support public media

The impacts of these devastating cuts are coming fast. PBS has already
announced a devastating 15% staff cut and a budget cut of 21%.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1015&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Headline: PBS slashes 15% of its staff after federal funding cuts

In some rural areas, the local PBS channel is the ONLY place families can
get tornado warnings, school closures, or emergency weather updates. For
over 50 years, PBS has brought trusted learning into our homes. It's given
us Big Bird and Frontline. It served as the only source of local news and
safety alerts for millions – especially in rural and working-class
communities.

If Congress doesn't act now, the next generation could grow up without
Sesame Street, Mister Rogers, or even local news coverage. If we don't
rise up, Trump's oligarchs will fill the void with right-wing propaganda,
racist conspiracy theories, and corporate advertising. Trained journalists
will be replaced with cronies. The only media out there will be turned
into a megaphone for Trump and his billionaire friends.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1016&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]PBS and NPR are OUR media. And if we lose them now, we may never get
them back. Trump's billionaires are counting on us to stay silent. Let's
prove them wrong. Will you urgently add your name to overwhelm Congress
with our demand to save our public media before it's too late?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34847?source=email-20251203&t=1017&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251203.32aQTQ&t=1007&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251203.hNJy-C&t=1008&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251203.NZqS0X&t=1009&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251203.55s6J6&t=1010&akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9929%2E5885482%2E20aWwy

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

name: Angela, Angela for Congress
subject: This will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela for CA-34]()
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9a9360b0f4c1/i-want-angela-gonzales-torres-to-be-part-of-the-next-winning-cohort-of-justice-democrats-heres-why-8375729?e=1e17b803ba)
---
[|
---](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=481d043daa&e=1e17b803ba)
| | | | | |

Friend ,

[**In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to my campaign for Congress.**](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=fba7b2630c&e=1e17b803ba) But first, I want to share why this matters so much to me.
My name is Angela Gonzales-Torres. I was born and raised in North East LA, where my mom raised me and my three sisters as a single parent after my dad was deported.
We moved around a lot. We stayed with family, in shelters, and in Section 8 housing. I’ve worked minimum wage jobs. I put myself through community college. And when I saw my neighbors being pushed out by rising rents and corporate greed, I started organizing to stop evictions and to fight back when the system failed us.
Now, I’m running to represent the same community that raised me. I know what it feels like to be left out and unheard. I know what this moment calls for. I know what it means to struggle._I know that Los Angeles deserves someone who never forgot what it feels like to live on the edge._
I’m not backed by corporate PACs or billionaire donors. Our campaign is powered by people just like you: people who believe we deserve better.
[**If you’re able, please chip in today to help us build this movement from the ground up. Even $3 or $5 makes a real difference when it’s so early in this race.**](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=34e461943c&e=1e17b803ba)
---
| [DONATE](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=ddba3abf14&e=1e17b803ba)
---
| |

Thanks for being with me,Angela
---
|
---
| | | | | [DONATE](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=cf709853cf&e=1e17b803ba)
---

Angela for CA34 338 S Western Ave Ste C Los Angeles CA 90020-3890 Los Angeles, CA 900203890 USA

You can [update your preferences](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=8ca4ce5e59&e=1e17b803ba&c=515da824b9) or [unsubscribe](https://angela4congress.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=19b01a24970a7ee09dd36c641&id=8ca4ce5e59&t=b&e=1e17b803ba&c=515da824b9)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Asking for your support – but not a donation
body:
Show everyone you’re with us.
| [](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Filing-Endorse/?t=5&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1) _Peter, I wanted you to be among the first to know:_ **I just officially filed as a candidate in the 2026 U.S. Senate election here in North Carolina, and I need your endorsement to win.** The opportunity to serve the people is not one that I will ever take for granted, and it is with a great sense of gratitude for all of you who have stood with me that I seek this office. Peter, I know that I can’t win this alone. **[That’s why I’m asking for your support again — but not for a donation. Instead, I would be honored if you would endorse our campaign today.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Filing-Endorse/?t=6&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)** I am clear-eyed about the stakes of this race and our chances of victory. We’re locked in the most competitive Senate contest of 2026, facing an opponent handpicked by the national GOP to run against me. He has the whole of the Republican establishment lined up to fund his campaign through the months ahead. The only way we’ll succeed here is by building an _even stronger_ movement powered by the people. If we keep up the momentum, I know that we can succeed. Peter, I’m asking for your endorsement to help show my opponent, his allies, and _everyone_ else that we have the people on our side. In return, I can give you no greater pledge than this: **I will always do everything in my power to improve the lives of North Carolinians.** **[Please, say you’re with us. Add your name here and officially endorse our campaign for the U.S. Senate.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Filing-Endorse/?t=7&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)** | [ENDORSE ROY COOPER](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Filing-Endorse/?t=8&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
---
Thanks so much for being with me,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/Filing-Endorse/?t=9&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=1&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=3&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=4&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=92%2E124072%2El9F6M1)

subject: Arrest Mark Zuckerberg for Child Endangerment
body:
Should Mark Zuckerberg be handcuffed--literally--for endangering millions of children?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..REuK4_i8aIB40Xgb8b16tT4B9deiTm6a5TVDqcn9D5k?) for more

# [Arrest Mark Zuckerberg for Child Endangerment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=180560212&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNTYwMjEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3ODM5MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM3NTkyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oQcQVfh11S--Rpc8aIVYBFZ3MdbB5s-0mmy-02hC9HE)
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=180560212&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgwNTYwMjEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjQ3ODM5MjUsImV4cCI6MTc2NzM3NTkyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oQcQVfh11S--Rpc8aIVYBFZ3MdbB5s-0mmy-02hC9HE)
---

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/arrest-mark-zuckerberg-for-child?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Should Mark Zuckerberg be handcuffed--literally--for endangering millions of children? That's the inescapable question raised by a legal brief filed last month in a [civil case](https://substack.com/redirect/425363ba-e97c-4f4b-a702-b28cbd283dc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against major social media companies.
The litigation, which alleges that social media platforms have been purposefully cultivating addiction among adolescents, has been working its way through the courts since 2022. But the details laid out in this new court filing, and reported recently by _[Time](https://substack.com/redirect/3fa1794b-ed60-465f-9e4a-95e81fbf30e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , contain genuinely horrifying claims about Zuckerberg's Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram. And they suggest that--in addition to the tort claims being pursued by the families, school districts, and state attorneys general behind this multidistrict litigation--the corporate executives responsible for these harms could and should be criminally prosecuted for child endangerment.
The brief alleges that Meta was aware that its platforms were endangering young users, including by exacerbating adolescents' mental health issues. According to the plaintiffs, Meta frequently detected content related to eating disorders, child sexual abuse, and suicide, but refused to remove it. For example, one 2021 internal company survey found that more than 8 percent of respondents aged 13 to 15 had seen someone harm themself or threaten to harm themself on Instagram during the past week. The brief also makes clear that Meta fully understood the addictive nature of its products, with plaintiffs citing a message by one user-experience researcher at the company that Instagram "is a drug" and "We're basically pushers."
Perhaps most relevant to state child endangerment laws, the plaintiffs have alleged that Meta knew that millions of adults were using its platforms to inappropriately contact minors. According to their filing, an internal company audit found that Instagram had recommended 1.4 million potentially inappropriate adults to teenagers in a single day in 2022. The brief also details how Instagram's policy was to not take action against sexual solicitation until a user had been caught engaging in the "trafficking of humans for sex" a whopping 17 times. As Instagram's former head of safety and well-being, Vaishnavi Jayakumar, reportedly testified, "You could incur 16 violations for prostitution and sexual solicitation, and upon the 17th violation, your account would be suspended."
The decision to expose adolescents to these threats was, according to the brief, an entirely knowing one. As plaintiffs allege, by 2019 Meta researchers were recommending that Instagram shield its young users from unwanted adult contact by making all teenage accounts private by default. Meta's policy, legal, and well-being teams all echoed this recommendation, stressing that the policy would "increase teen safety." But the primary response by Meta's corporate leadership was to question how this policy would impact its profits. The company directed its growth team to analyze what a default private setting would do to engagement. They found it would have a negative effect--according to one employee quoted in the court filing, limiting "unwanted interactions" would likely cause a "potentially untenable problem with engagement and growth." As a result, Meta failed to implement this safety recommendation until 2024, allowing billions of nonconsensual interactions between teenagers and adult strangers during the intervening four years. A significant enough number of these encounters were inappropriate, according to plaintiffs, that Meta had an acronym--"IIC," short for "inappropriate interactions with children"--for them.
If your social media platform is facilitating so many inappropriate interactions between adult strangers and children that you need a shorthand to describe such encounters, then you should be liable for some of the resulting harm. But could that liability extend to the criminal sphere?
It depends, first of all, on the jurisdiction. Every state has [some form of law](https://substack.com/redirect/96dae02a-df26-4964-aac3-b31bbe7c119a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) criminalizing conduct that abuses, neglects, or endangers children. While some states limit this crime to parents or guardians, other states outlaw child endangerment more broadly. To take one example, Massachusetts' child endangerment [statute](https://substack.com/redirect/f9bd9015-6634-4624-8fc1-083df5852d2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) reads: "Whoever wantonly or recklessly engages in conduct that creates a substantial risk of serious bodily injury or sexual abuse to a child or wantonly or recklessly fails to take reasonable steps to alleviate such risk where there is a duty to act shall be punished by imprisonment in the house of correction for not more than 2.5 years." This seems like an accurate way to characterize Meta's creation of what [one state's attorney general](https://substack.com/redirect/2c780cf4-e6f7-43f5-9268-c3969329d366?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has described as a "marketplace" allowing "pedophiles, predators, and others engaged in the commerce of sex" to "hunt for, groom, sell, and buy sex with children and sexual images of children at an unprecedented scale."
While child endangerment laws were not originally written with social media companies in mind--Massachusetts' law was passed in 2002 as a response to the Catholic sex abuse scandal--that state's highest court made clear that the statute's text encompasses any and all reckless conduct that creates a substantial risk of harming a child, [noting](https://substack.com/redirect/b7484041-18fa-48fe-a894-e6bb42b89d99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "If the Legislature had intended a narrower set of protections, it readily could have drafted the statute to accomplish that more limited objective." Indeed, the threats allegedly facilitated by Meta are far more severe than many of the hazards--like [exposing](https://substack.com/redirect/e05d54b2-dd84-4580-9a3e-8216bc9dc14b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) children to marijuana smoke or [leaving](https://substack.com/redirect/52e3aadd-06f0-49a0-9744-160938fac5cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) them unsupervised in a house--that Massachusetts courts have deemed appropriately dangerous to constitute the crime of child endangerment in the past.
So in at least some jurisdictions it seems quite possible that Meta officials could be criminally prosecuted for the harmful effects they knew their platforms were having on young people. But there would need to be a lot of public utility in such a prosecution to make it worthwhile for a district attorney's office with limited resources to take on some of the wealthiest Big Tech executives in the world. Should __ a local prosecutor accept this daunting challenge? I believe the answer to this question is yes, for two important reasons.
First, there is a chance that current civil litigation against social media giants may end up failing. The biggest obstacle these lawsuits face is a 1996 federal law called the Communication Decency Act. Section 230 of this law grants digital communications platforms a broad waiver of civil liability for the user-generated content they host. While plaintiffs are seeking to get around this shield with [new litigation strategies](https://substack.com/redirect/79807e72-fcb3-4db3-b06d-d34aaf7bcd41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the suits discussed here focus on social media companies' negligence in the design of their platforms and deception about the known harms of their products, rather than the actual content itself--it's unclear whether this product-liability theory will succeed in piercing the immunity afforded thus far by Section 230.
But Section 230 only provides for civil immunity for social media companies. It doesn't say [anything](https://substack.com/redirect/93dcc9d9-5884-4fb2-952f-699015cdf440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about criminal liability. As such, criminal prosecution for child endangerment may offer a more straightforward--and, if worse comes to worst on the civil side, perhaps the sole--path to accountability for these bad actors.
Second, criminal prosecution could be a highly effective tool for forcing these companies to adopt more pro-social practices. Meta [earned](https://substack.com/redirect/64d03490-159a-48d0-9a4f-4c9dea8b3f95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over $62 billion in net profits in 2024. Even a massive, multi-billion dollar settlement or civil judgment could potentially be swallowed by the company as the price of doing business. But I can guarantee that Zuckerberg does not want to spend any time in a state prison. Even the credible threat of a multi-year sentence for these corporate executives might be enough to significantly change Meta's decision-making, in a way that few other remedies could.
Every day, in jurisdictions all across the country, people are prosecuted and incarcerated for committing the crime of child endangerment based on conduct that was far less aware, and resulted in much less harm, than what is being alleged of Meta's corporate leadership. If the claims against these companies are true, then executives like Zuckerberg have absolutely engaged in reckless conduct that has created a substantial risk of harming young people. In other words, they have committed crimes--and the mere fact that they are wealthy and powerful should not allow them to escape accountability. Local prosecutors have a chance to win justice for teenage victims who have been endangered by these profit-seeking tech titans. Here's hoping they take the opportunity.
* * *

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. subject: Spotify (Un)wrapped

body:
| | | Hi Peter, At the end of every year, Spotify releases **Wrapped** , its annual recap of each listener’s top songs and artists. It’s a moment when millions of people share their music highlights online — making it one of Spotify’s biggest cultural moments of the year. But this year, there’s something Spotify doesn’t want you to unwrap. **Spotify is running ads for ICE,** the agency responsible for tearing families apart, detaining and deporting our neighbors, and sowing fear in communities across the country. They call it “within policy.” We call it profiting from cruelty. That’s why thousands of artists, listeners, and organizations are taking action with **Spotify Unwrapped** — a nationwide push to hold Spotify accountable during their biggest cultural moment of the year. **Here’s how you can join in:**
1. [**Cancel your Spotify subscription**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWqt2Z1KOXxwj22fNvkxqYDrftyfLJ1cXv_ADWVnPaDApukNFIkKTUShC5Zkoeb9i1eBnFz0Ou-7HDYxBeTsZ6ZQQXh8pavZhmg1FySXDNAg1K7RuVFQQHkljZyCnbz21-t3Uat_zm5MyqI_-hRtbrcv-EVcSl_4LP1FmMWBoy68oG4r9Pjh8uk02NhTFsicL8Lr5d8FA11G4mQG7UUF0BkJy3OebwsbL19tCO_Xf7x3qcn-23dnyfp-8w-tp0RK-w/4m4/z62LCXrGRtGXV2FwhyxEMw/h0/h001.XlvtPX8_i_SpEvuLBa7Z0RQHCRh8ARmFTQWxkQkdFwQ) until ICE ads are gone.
2. **Download ready-made Unwrapped graphics** at [**SpotifyUnwrapped.net.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtcAIWmOA1Zek0t-uSOLKcFyxmHEXmeRiLh2wtxhVX9-jXP9g0BZ0wYregC-ITIG-QDw5QZSmLAPfEYyjj4wASfLBrAML556pKEM2bDOp2CrGHzGXoZUek7cFnSug4klPAdDE_Lrvy6YJzOluCZ6Qi-r4P4HJb0uXT_Y_07fnJo658yReiDbgVi_XBuIFyf0CS56fE_CU7m7ILnKeE3K5gdWEgSySa7iIsYw_Cu06XYtu/4m4/z62LCXrGRtGXV2FwhyxEMw/h1/h001.G3Xg8_loeOrhDSkgT8p4OpeaYH2aKSWSZGWv-tfRbSI) These are designed to replace your usual Wrapped posts and celebrate music while calling on Spotify to drop ICE ads.

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, At the end of every year, Spotify releases Wrapped , its annual recap of each listener’s top songs and artists. It’s a moment when millions of people share their music highlights online — making it one of Spotify’s biggest cultural moments of the year. But this year, there’s something Spotify doesn’t want you to unwrap. Spotify is running ads for ICE, the agency responsible for tearing families apart, detaining and deporting our neighbors, and sowing fear in communities across the country. They call it “within policy.” We call it profiting from cruelty. That’s why thousands of artists, listeners, and organizations are taking action with Spotify Unwrapped — a nationwide push to hold Spotify accountable during their biggest cultural moment of the year. Here’s how you can join in: 1. until ICE ads are gone. 2. Download ready-made Unwrapped graphics at These are designed to replace your usual Wrapped posts and celebrate music while calling on Spotify to drop ICE ads. 3. Share them on, , , or anywhere you post with the hashtag #SpotifyUnwrapped — and tag — to spread the message and amplify the outrage. Not a Spotify subscriber? You can still stand in solidarity by sharing and exposing the harm Spotify is causing to immigrant communities. Spotify built its empire on culture, creativity, and community. But you can’t claim to support community while running ads that terrorize immigrant families. This Wrapped season, let’s use our platforms to unwrap the truth and demand accountability. Make sure Spotify hears it loud and clear. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families Party and Working Families Power, please .

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: “Ilhan Omar is garbage”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251203-io.u53HjR&refcode=em20251203-37248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37248%2E1203867%2E7lkhO0 ]Tweet by Aaron Rupar: Trump on Somalis: “We’re gonna go the wrong way
if we keep taking in garbage into our country. Ilhan Omar is garbage.
She’s garbage. Her friends are garbage.”

Peter — Trump just can’t stop
attacking Ilhan.

First, Trump spent months going after Ilhan with racist conspiracies,
leading to ongoing harassment and constant threats to Ilhan’s life and
requiring us to hire our own security.

Then, Trump’s rhetoric over the last weeks has put a target on the backs
of innocent Somali-American families here in Minneapolis who already face
so much hate from the far-right.

Now, Trump is calling Ilhan “garbage” and adding that immigrants like her
are “garbage” too. It’s disgusting and dangerous.

And more so, it’s a distraction from the fact that Trump’s first year in
office has been a disaster. The cost of living continues to rise, millions
are losing their healthcare, and ICE has waged a terror campaign in our
cities. The American people are waking up to Trump’s incompetence, and he
is desperate to create a distraction.

So, Peter, we are reaching out
today to ask this grassroots team to help us show that thousands, or even
millions, of people stand with Ilhan Omar as she faces down Trump’s
attacks and continues to fight for our agenda of healthcare, housing,
education, and a safe and affordable life for all Americans, regardless of
where they were born.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251203-io.u53HjR&refcode=em20251203-37248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37248%2E1203867%2E7lkhO0 ]Split a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford
between Ilhan Omar’s campaign and Justice Democrats today. We want to
prove that this movement has Ilhan’s back and is ready to meet these
racist, hateful attacks with a powerful grassroots campaign that can
defeat Trump and the far-right.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251203-io.u53HjR&refcode=em20251203-37248&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37248%2E1203867%2E7lkhO0 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar for Congress

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251203-37248-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37248_1203867_7lkhO0&akid=37248%2E1203867%2E7lkhO0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37248%2E1203867%2E7lkhO0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: “We’re killing all the right people.” – Lindsey Graham

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120538902/586587851/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGIzODMyZi03MWQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kLhMJy-BcsPZgQJpuAlihhUe0yQI-Jlpd1vYtLbXAQ=) Lindsey Graham stood on stage and **_bragged about “killing all the right people.”_**

Who exactly are the “ _right people_ ,” Lindsey?

The child shot in their classroom because you refuse to pass common sense gun legislation? The teenage girl who was refused care while suffering a miscarriage and died because of your extreme abortion bans? The millions of Americans who can’t get the care they need because they don’t have health insurance?

As a pediatrician, I’ve spent my entire career saving lives, fighting to keep kids healthy, and advocating for families who can’t afford basic care.

So when I hear Lindsey Graham, a sitting U.S. Senator, bragging about killing “the right people,” it makes me sick to my stomach and reminds me exactly why I’m running for Senate.

**Because public service should be about compassion, not cruelty. It should be about enriching lives, not glorifying death.**

[**_But to replace Lindsey Graham and restore decency to South Carolina’s Senate seat, I need your help. Will you split a $10 donation or whatever you can between my campaign and Maggie Hassan right now to help us fight back against this cruelty and elect a Senator who actually values human life?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120538903/586587852/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGIzODMyZi03MWQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kLhMJy-BcsPZgQJpuAlihhUe0yQI-Jlpd1vYtLbXAQ=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120538904/586587853/899181852?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.03_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGIzODMyZi03MWQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kLhMJy-BcsPZgQJpuAlihhUe0yQI-Jlpd1vYtLbXAQ=)
