name: Andy Beshear
subject: Real, commonsense leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251203_1_beshear.LPbKkd&refcode=em20251203-1&t=1&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)
Hi, it’s Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear.
The Senate seat in New Hampshire is too important to be lost in the shuffle of 2026 races. Chris Pappas just got a brand-new opponent, which changes everything. **We have to do all that we can to elect Chris Pappas and bring real, commonsense leadership to the Senate.**
I support Chris Pappas because he understands that the path forward in this country is about showing up, doing the work, and delivering for all families — no matter who they voted for. **That’s the kind of leader Chris will be in the Senate.**
**[If you’re with me, you support Chris Pappas, and you’re ready to help hold this crucial swing seat, chip in any amount today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251203_1_beshear.uR4nb5&refcode=em20251203-1&t=2&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)**
Kentucky and New Hampshire may be very different states, but the challenges we face are the same. Chris knows that public service is about lifting people up, not tearing each other down — and he’ll never stop fighting for the people he represents.
I’ve seen how hard Chris works to protect health care, defend reproductive rights, and stand up for small businesses and working families. I couldn’t be prouder to support his run for the U.S. Senate — but this won’t be an easy win.
**National Republicans are targeting this race and after recruiting their dream candidate, John Sununu, they believe they can flip this seat in 2026.** Chris can win, but he will need all of us stepping up to overcome the millions of dollars that national Republicans are planning to spend against him.
**[Chris can’t win without us. So please, will you chip in any amount today to help elect Chris Pappas?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251203_1_beshear.uR4nb5&refcode=em20251203-1&t=3&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251203_1_beshear.uR4nb5&amount=5&refcode=em20251203-1&t=22&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)**
Chris’s new opponent and the GOP and Wall Street money machine that comes with him will make this one of the most competitive elections in 2026. **[Every dollar you can chip in will help make sure Chris can win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251203_1_beshear.LPbKkd&refcode=em20251203-1&t=23&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)**
Let’s do what’s necessary to get Chris across the finish line.
Thank you,
Andy Beshear
Governor of Kentucky
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251203-1&t=24&refcode2=3828_582294_zqaIJn&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3828%2E582294%2EzqaIJn)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Friend,

Thank you. With your support in November, we met our online fundraising goal -- and are meeting our next challenges with strength.

Right now, Trump’s agenda simply isn’t cutting it. Instead of fighting sky-high costs and protecting affordable healthcare, he’s chipping away at civil liberties and turning his nose at working families in need.

Americans deserve leaders who will go to bat for them, show up when it matters most, and listen to them instead of out-of-touch billionaire donors. We must keep the momentum.

It’s why I’m committed to keeping up the good fight for working families -- even when it makes me a target from those in power who would rather stick to the status quo.

Thank you for continuing to stand with me. If you’d like to help us prepare for the midterm election year ahead, please consider **[chipping in $3.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120539449/586589921/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.3.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjc5NjlmNC03MWQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGoL73ia4IOao8eNBNcM9HhPwIAApnxhOxrjidpIVzs=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Thank you. With your support in November, we met our online fundraising goal -- and are meeting our next challenges with strength. Right now, Trump’s agenda simply isn’t cutting it. Instead of fighting sky-high costs and protecting affordable healthcare, he’s chipping away at civil liberties and turning his nose at working families in need. Americans deserve leaders who will go to bat for them, show up when it matters most, and listen to them instead of out-of-touch billionaire donors. We must keep the momentum. It’s why I’m committed to keeping up the good fight for working families -- even when it makes me a target from those in power who would rather stick to the status quo. Thank you for continuing to stand with me. name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: Media Trumpets RITE Victory in Uncovering Voter Records for Illegal Alien School Superintendent
body:
RITE & AAF Forced MD County to Release Unredacted Records for Guyana native Ian Andre Roberts |
---
| |
---
| | **Media Trumpets RITE Victory in Uncovering Voter Records for Illegal Alien School Superintendent**
_RITE & AAF Forced MD County to Release Unredacted Records for Guyana native Ian Andre Roberts_
**PRINCE GEORGE’S COUNTY, MD** — The national news media took note of a victory for transparency and election integrity this week after the Prince George’s County Board of Elections reversed itself and released unredacted copies of voter registration records for an illegal alien who became the superintendent of Iowa’s largest school system. The county released the records after Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE) and the American Accountability Foundation (AAF) issued a formal demand under the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) and publicly warned of imminent federal litigation.

[Fox News covered the still-unfolding story of Ian Andre Roberts](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=bcdf474066&e=ea91f782ea), the illegal alien and Guyanese national whose voter registration records were initially released in heavily redacted form. The censored versions blacked out key information, including Roberts’ answer to the question, “Are you a U.S. citizen?” His answer was revealed to be “Yes,” which is known to be a lie.
---
|
---
| | The news was also covered by the [Washington Examiner](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=2e4afa8818&e=ea91f782ea) and [The National News Desk](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=0832b2f7ab&e=ea91f782ea).
---
| [ ](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=f0e9916b0b&e=ea91f782ea)
---
| [ ](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=cd30a29aab&e=ea91f782ea)
---
| RITE has been a national leader in advancing citizen-only voting and ensuring states properly maintain their voter rolls. RITE successfully sued Maryland last year for enacting a regulation that prohibited the public from auditing the accuracy of the state’s voter rolls. The organization has also filed briefs supporting President Trump’s Executive Order directing the EAC to require proof of citizenship on the national registration form, sued cities that extended voting rights to noncitizens in local elections, and taken legal action in North Carolina and Arizona to stop overseas noncitizen voting. RITE has also litigated to uphold laws requiring states to verify voter eligibility at the point of registration. ###
---

# American Eagle Soars on the back of Sydney Sweeney's jeans
American Eagle Outfitters **[smashed Wall Street forecasts](https://substack.com/redirect/668822ce-37cf-475a-88a7-4cde6e398ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in its fiscal third-quarter 2025 earnings, reporting $1.36 billion in revenue and 53 cents per share, fueled by soaring Aerie sales and star-powered campaigns featuring Sydney Sweeney and Travis Kelce.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/668822ce-37cf-475a-88a7-4cde6e398ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Revenue Surges Past Expectations** : Hit $1.36 billion, up 6% year-over-year, beating $1.32 billion forecast with net income climbing to $91.34 million from $80.02 million last year.
* **Aerie Drives Double-Digit Growth** : Comparable sales leaped 11%, revenue rose 13%, contrasting American Eagle brand's modest 1% comps increase amid broader 4% companywide gains.
* **Margins Expand Amid Challenges** : Operating margin hit 8.3%, topping 7.5% estimates, bolstered by marketing buzz from celebrity endorsements despite softer core brand performance.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/83a650c1-0663-4d66-ad5f-f73109331632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Guidance Soars for Holiday Peak** : Q4 comps projected at 8-9% versus 2.1% expected; full-year adjusted operating income hiked to $303-308 million from prior $255-265 million range.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/95200218-5d40-4fe8-8ecb-6cde64096ccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/95200218-5d40-4fe8-8ecb-6cde64096ccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/95200218-5d40-4fe8-8ecb-6cde64096ccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/95200218-5d40-4fe8-8ecb-6cde64096ccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **Bitcoin Blasts Past $92K - Santa Surge Incoming?**
After a horrendous start to December Bitcoin **[soared above $92,000](https://substack.com/redirect/4b407bd3-8f59-4e87-af19-78c8fc7cd421?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Wednesday, igniting hopes for a year-end "Santa rally" as institutional inflows rebound from November's 18% plunge, with analysts eyeing a swift push to $100,000 amid Fed rate cut buzz.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b407bd3-8f59-4e87-af19-78c8fc7cd421?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Price Milestone Achieved** : Bitcoin hit $92,413.68, up 1.49% intraday, signaling traders' green light for a $100,000 retest if institutional flows hold steady.
* **November Woes Reversed** : After an 18% monthly drop and record ETF outflows, December's momentum hints at a stronger recovery driven by slowing mid-month lulls.
* **Institutions Pile In** : Vanguard's launch of crypto products and Bank of America's advice to investors to have up to 4% of their portfolio allocated to Crypto is boosting bullish sentiment alongside Ethereum upgrades.
* **Fed Shakeup Looms** : 80% odds from prediction markets say that Trump will nominate pro-crypto Kevin Hassett as Fed Chair potentially fast-tracking blockchain into banking post a December 10 rate cut.

* * *
* * *
# Anthropic's $300B IPO bombshell explodes on OpenAI
In a high-stakes AI showdown, Anthropic--the creator of the Claude chatbot--has **[kicked off early talks for a blockbuster IPO](https://substack.com/redirect/2e98f969-b10d-4348-a1b4-a29c1f895907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as soon as next year, hiring elite lawyers Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati to outpace rival OpenAI's own public listing plans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e98f969-b10d-4348-a1b4-a29c1f895907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Hiring IPO Powerhouse Firm** : Anthropic enlisted the legal team behind Google and LinkedIn's landmark IPOs, signaling serious preparations for a massive market debut.
* **Chasing Sky-High Valuation** : The startup eyes a private funding round valuing it over $300 billion, bolstered by $15 billion in pledges from tech giants Microsoft and Nvidia to fuel expansion.
* **Rival OpenAI in Crosshairs** : OpenAI, fresh off a $500 billion valuation, downplays near-term IPOs, but Anthropic's aggressive move could let it claim first-mover bragging rights in the AI stock frenzy.
* **Bubble Fears Loom Large** : Investors buzz about the listings testing the appetite for cash-burning AI firms amid warnings of an overhyped bubble, while Anthropic ramps up with $50 billion in infrastructure and global hiring.

**" Alternative AI" UPRISING: OpenAI's Desperate Code Red Panic!**
In a fiery San Francisco memo leaked Tuesday, OpenAI CEO **[Sam Altman declared a"code red" emergency,](https://substack.com/redirect/c6db6729-6a3d-418c-ae25-455c3bd57e50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** rallying his team against surging rivals like Anthropic and Google that threaten ChatGPT's dominance in the cutthroat AI arms race.
* **Altman 's Urgent Battle Cry:** OpenAI's leader warns staff of "existential" threats from competitors, urging all-hands innovation to reclaim AI supremacy amid eroding market share.
* **Rivals Fueling Frenzy:** Anthropic's Claude and Google's Gemini models are eroding ChatGPT's lead, with users defecting over superior speed and specialized features in enterprise sectors.
* **Internal Overhaul Blueprint:** Altman outlines aggressive hiring sprees and R&D boosts, vowing to integrate advanced models like GPT-5 to counter rivals' rapid prototyping edges.
* **Industry-Wide Wakeup Call:** The scramble signals a maturing AI battlefield, where talent poaching and billion-dollar investments could reshape global tech power dynamics by 2026.

* * *
* * *
# Trump kills Biden's 50 MPG rule and Detroit celebrates
President Donald Trump will unveil plans Wednesday to dismantle former President Joe Biden's **[stringent 50 mpg fuel economy mandate](https://substack.com/redirect/44509cef-bb42-4436-b77e-3c5fd48f3e31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for cars and trucks by 2031, joined by top Detroit executives in a White House ceremony that signals a sharp pivot away from electric vehicles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/44509cef-bb42-4436-b77e-3c5fd48f3e31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Rollback Targets Biden Mandate** : The Administration proposes scrapping the 50 mpg efficiency goal for passenger cars and light trucks, reversing last year's push to boost vehicle fuel savings.
* **Auto Giants Join Announcement** : Ford, GM, and Stellantis CEOs will attend an Oval Office event at 2:30 p.m. ET, highlighting industry support for easing regulatory pressures on manufacturing.
* **Oil Lobby Fuels Repeal Drive** : The American Petroleum Institute aggressively pushed to kill the sky high standards, claiming they accelerated the phase-out of gasoline-powered vehicles in favor of EVs.
* **EV Incentives Face Ax Too** : The broader Trump agenda seeks to eliminate all federal backing for electric cars, potentially stalling sales growth as federal incentives were a significant factor in adoption by consumers.

* * *
* * *
# **The exotic ETF boom, Sky-High Gains or Market Meltdown?**
In a volatile market rocked by job losses and tech slumps, **[Wall Street's newest exotic ETFs](https://substack.com/redirect/2336ce30-50e6-497d-8fdf-c3fb23fe2a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--leveraged bets on single stocks and inverses--dangle "monster gains" to thrill-seeking investors, but experts warn these high-wire acts could trigger devastating wipeouts as complexity outpaces comprehension.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2336ce30-50e6-497d-8fdf-c3fb23fe2a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Leverage Lures Chasers** : Single-stock and inverse ETFs amplify returns via a "black box" of swaps, derivatives and options, promising "astronomical" profits in rising markets but demanding constant tweaks that falter amid swings.
* **Volatility Weaponizes Wagers** : Recent choppiness, like post-ADP futures slides, turns these products' built-in leverage into a "double-edged sword," eroding value faster than plain-vanilla funds.
* **Issuers Ignite Arms Race** : ETF providers compete fiercely to launch ever-more intricate strategies, fueling retail access but widening the gap between product innovation and investor savvy.
* **Education Gap Endangers Novices** : While "democratizing" advanced trades sounds empowering, mismatched understanding risks significant losses for everyday traders ill-equipped for time-sensitive complexities.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. clean_body: Derek, Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me: = In yet another unhinged and outrageous post, the president called for my colleagues and me to be jailed because he apparently doesn’t like people stating the law or Constitutional truths: the oath to the Constitution comes above all. I first raised my hand and swore an oath to the Constitution when I entered the Naval Academy at 17 years old. I swore it again when I had the honor of being elected to represent Western PA in Congress. This is a lifelong oath, and I intend to keep it. I sure as hell won’t let Donald Trump intimidate me or deter me from upholding my oath—he tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021 after LOSING an election—weak and pathetic stuff. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Pete Hegseth and Admiral Bradley must testify before Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
BREAKING NEWS: I just called on Pete Hegseth and Admiral Bradley to testify before Congress and explain their decisions to launch strikes in the Caribbean and the Pacific. These bombing campaigns were ordered without proper authorization, without consultation with Congress, and without a clear plan to protect regional stability.
As a senior member of the House Armed Services Committee, I believe the American people deserve to know what their government is doing in their name and with their money.
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1995676538906575340 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1995676538906575340]
This is not how a democracy is supposed to function.
At moments like this, oversight isn’t optional—it’s our duty. We need a bipartisan, national hearing to answer the most basic questions:
* What is the legal basis for these strikes?
* What is the strategic objective?
* What risks – to civilians, to U.S. personnel, to global stability – were weighed and by whom?
* Why was Congress kept in the dark?
The American people deserve answers, and Congress must insist on them.
Add your name to demand a full public hearing and immediate testimony from Secretary Hegseth and Admiral Bradley. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/hegseth-testimony-petition?contactdata=mYLKDhxHpwitrkEGoebwcGaVIt+NGu8+ijVxl8y0MmVgeeJ7ihdeOXtdw3LwG5vtkoR4un2pj8199Snhg7h9MLzXFqhEhupGgjRPZc0ZAzs/8Fruc7o/H8pFoVhw8ys5M2+d7QXoSrvVBzpgSw+hL4yHhQ6NJvf9Vypcfe6+yRwL+IZsXIfG94VLD2fM5v+8]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/hegseth-testimony-petition?contactdata=mYLKDhxHpwitrkEGoebwcGaVIt+NGu8+ijVxl8y0MmVgeeJ7ihdeOXtdw3LwG5vtkoR4un2pj8199Snhg7h9MLzXFqhEhupGgjRPZc0ZAzs/8Fruc7o/H8pFoVhw8ys5M2+d7QXoSrvVBzpgSw+hL4yHhQ6NJvf9Vypcfe6+yRwL+IZsXIfG94VLD2fM5v+8]
For decades, presidents of both parties have pushed the boundaries of unilateral military action. It has to stop. Congress must reassert its constitutional authority – and we must do it together, across party lines.
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251203-hegseth-testimony&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251203-hegseth-testimony]

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, do you want to turn on the TV after the midterm elections and see Democrats in Washington impeaching President Trump...for no reason? | Fellow Conservative, do you want to turn on the TV after the midterm elections and see Democrats in Washington impeaching President Trump...for no reason? We’ve seen this play out before... TWICE. In 2019 and in 2021, instead of working for the American people, the radical Left used its majority to impeach President Trump. Who’s to say they won’t do it a third time? | We can stop this from happening, Fellow Conservative. We’ve worked way too hard to allow the Left to begin their political games and wipe away everything we’ve accomplished with our Republican Majorities and Trump in the White House. Keeping South Dakota Red is the first step in maintaining our majorities and stopping the Left from enacting their political chaos. Thank you for your support, Fellow Conservative. Sincerely, Mike Rounds FOLLOW MIKE ON SOCIAL MEDIA: | | Paid for by Rounds for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We'd hate to see you go, but you can .

clean_body: They’re calling for his head... They’re calling for his head... | | | | | Peter, The shutdown has ENDED, and I am proud to say that Republicans successfully HELD THE LINE against the Democrats' extremism. But on the other side of the aisle, a civil war is breaking out within the Democrat Party... ...And the Marxist-Socialist-Communist wing of the party is calling for Chuck Schumer's head. But unless we as conservatives take IMMEDIATE action, something very bad could happen ... clean_body: Peter, we can't win this without volunteers on the ground. | | | Peter, we can't win this without volunteers on the ground. Whether you can give an hour a week or ten hours a week, we need you. Just bring your passion for making Colorado work better for working families. I've spent six years in the State House fighting for working families, and now I'm ready to take that work statewide as your next State Treasurer. But reaching voters across Colorado—from the Front Range to the Western Slope—takes people power. As we prep for 2026, we’re looking for: Door knockers Phone bankers Event volunteers And more! Let us know what you're interested in, and we'll plug you in! Thank you, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: "In This Together" isn't just a name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Grateful doesn't even begin to cover it.
Peter,

As we close out November, I want to take a moment to say **thank you.**

We stayed on pace with our fundraising this past month, _and that's because of you._

Your commitment and belief in what we're building together is what keeps this work moving forward every single day.

Now, we're heading into the final stretch of the year, and before we know it, we'll be in 2026 — now one of the most important election years in recent memory. The challenges ahead are very real, but so is our resolve.

I've seen time and time again that when we stand together, we can accomplish great things. _In This Together_ isn't just a name — it's how we win. It's how we protect our values, support our communities, and build a future that works for everyone, not just here in Kentucky, but nationwide. Peter, when we fight to elect good people who lead with common sense and pursue common ground, **_ALL of us win._**

If you like to help us keep the momentum going as we start December, you can make a donation today: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q4-2025 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120544428/586601201/1089852515?refcode=em25_251202_eomty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251202_eomty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4c055e56-77d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNTVlNTYtNzdkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4xcT58_6YbddpSJbogIWjmhrQb860a65Q68NEj0sMGc=)

With gratitude,

Andy | | **Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120544429/586601202/1089852515?refcode=em25_251202_eomty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251202_eomty_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4c055e56-77d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNTVlNTYtNzdkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4xcT58_6YbddpSJbogIWjmhrQb860a65Q68NEj0sMGc=)

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: An announcement from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)
Friend, I wanted to reach out to you all directly to share an update.
Hearing from so many people throughout Massachusetts encouraging me to run for the United States Senate was deeply humbling and a testament to the strength of our movement.
I feel heartened and encouraged by the coalition that has emerged encouraging me to take a look at this, and seeing the strong path to victory, I spent deliberate time giving a statewide run the careful consideration it deserves.
Ultimately, at this moment, I feel called to my community and my family. Our district, the Massachusetts 7th, is squarely in the crosshairs of the Trump White House. The fear and trauma felt in our communities and across the country right now is all too real — and I am resolved to continue fighting for my district.
**So I’m proud to formally share that I’m running for re-election to the House of Representatives in 2026. And as a reminder, this movement doesn’t organize for the sake of a single electoral cycle — but with an eye on generations to come.**
**[So if you’re able, will you please split a contribution between Ilhan Omar and our campaign to kick off the next phase of our work with the strongest possible momentum behind us?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.MrkWLB&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=2&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution to Ayanna Pressley and Ilhan Omar will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.4sGjbz&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=21&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.iN1AgM&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=22&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.x7SGxM&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=23&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.7r8WFN&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=24&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.V0UWs4&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=25&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.ZkpIB4&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=26&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**
---
****
In this next term, I plan to continue standing in the gap and holding the line against this hostile White House that means harm to everyone in our district and country. That means:
* Fighting back against the White House’s attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, Black and brown folks, federal workers, and our immigrant neighbors.
* Continuing to use my committee roles to conduct oversight and make progress on everything from housing affordability, AI and crypto oversight, to accountability for survivors of Epstein’s abuse.
* Leading the Reproductive Freedom Caucus to protect and expand abortion access with a House majority.
* Continuing to advance bold, comprehensive policies that meet the moment and address the affordability crisis — like lowering the cost of housing, investing in affordable childcare, ending the pushout of Black women from the workforce, closing the racial wealth gap, and more.

**These are not nice-to-haves, these are must-haves for the people I represent in Massachusetts and folks across the country.**
Now, more than ever, is the time to dig deep, to lean into mutual aid, and to use every tool available to stand in the gap in defense of our neighbors and our democracy. That’s exactly what this campaign is going to do — and we’re going to keep powering our work like we always have: with small-dollar, grassroots support.
**[So if you can today, please split a donation to support Ilhan Omar and our campaign to help kick off our 2026 campaign fighting for bold action and transformative policies in Massachusetts and across the country.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25-pressley.MrkWLB&refcode=em251203-1-180&t=27&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)
I am incredibly honored to have your support. Thank you for everything.
In solidarity,
Ayanna

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=30&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=1977_791427_WHisFm&akid=1977%2E791427%2EWHisFm)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

clean_body: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary confirmed what you and I have known for some time: Anthony Fauci orchestrated a “massive cover‐up” of the origins of COVID‐19. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, FDA Commissioner Marty Makary confirmed what you and I have known for some time: Anthony Fauci orchestrated a "massive cover‐up" of the origins of COVID‐19. According to Makary, Fauci and his former colleagues commissioned a 2020 report that dismissed the possibility that COVID leaked from a lab in Wuhan, while behind the scenes, they allegedly coerced top virologists to suppress contrary views, rewarded them financially, and misled Congress about dangerous gain‐of‐function research. This isn't just about political spin. It's about real trust. Trust in our public health institutions, trust in the science they claim to uphold, and trust that those entrusted with protecting our lives will be held accountable. So many Americans believed Dr. Fauci. So many relied on that "expertise." If those experts misled us -- whether to protect reputations, preserve power, or protect bureaucracies -- then we have a duty to demand the truth. Peter, I've spent my career fighting government overreach and demanding transparency. I've always believed that power belongs in the hands of Americans, not nameless bureaucrats and shadowy commissions, especially when that power impacts life, liberty, and property. That 's why today I'm asking you to stand with me. Your support helps uncover the truth behind this pandemic -- and ensures those responsible don't escape scrutiny. It helps support pro‐liberty lawmakers in Washington who will push for congressional investigations, reform of public‐health agencies, and protections against future abuse of power. It sends a message: Americans will never sit quietly while their health, safety, and civil liberties are treated like political chess pieces. Put on your holiday best and join the MassGOP for an evening of Christmas cheer, likeminded company, and a straw poll for Governor on Thursday, December 18 in Boston! Your personal invitation is included below.
To RSVP and secure your straw poll ballot, please use this link: https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/christmasparty25
Or, email Haley Jones to let us know you're coming at [haley@massgop.com](mailto:haley@massgop.com).
Can't wait to celebrate the season with you!
Thank you, Team MassGOP

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You’re bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=854c6f7f8c054333a3b40487b5af46b6&_e=BUI-5MBzMSwitHtYxj-gcxFvB6QVuYoM2uECtyBsPfaekkvg7Rw-8GqI3wZW3AEroNhNSxJltcyKM4dcfFeRKsdbMp4BWUcPeCALsDS6z3pjB7tGU1Qxu1bb-an-1FFok6kb5SNBXbYthw3XH8h0bGf3ScSO6KPX-6GvaZqbZUuwosuhCTiUdTA_BwQrv4cRq-6gRXFgZ7mPw5z6zS42bguKAD2oYglSx9rjgr4WoS4FUzDRdLUzL-DZ8e34tdzMbd2BjsAI9jSBv1PDgRjxJ1JYZyyv-F9v2oeteEKvV94irakDMvklZdX52RyykUAq3wD2yXB_HkSN72RTfPp0KMcXs29_0XZuVkb-yRIee44i0rALevse3ic8MXlXmkkvyFH6fHrCBAng5LWr32yXrL9yLN9EUJ4lcA3bFAh1i5DaZFDp75-Vp700wESlbdqFoepSlG2EgOhZ3lKHFTJs5WuFRGEQyDKpf0ze8yps_21VseGCLS0YMuuAPOTDUD-PYrB4Hb-uGJzRYdxf8T8jF0DoJqWMM2DYI_qzf3JzJR7ejkXp2E2jVc_37d7YzyuE4SZ3WIz-3wKdWbahw7ZW8U_h2DQdOovuyCro6ru4naKBD0KEahA8dhFxjvoLf3rkHL78174CpXsjQGq5MgAigjlN_Jbn2yyzOaxJXTK8smAJLiABQlipDBaycYCB746wMowQrw4fe3a5QgCJsJ8Pm8fzY5EpzLZM8zkYqTa3NXE%3D) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because BRAVE Books is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... Friend, BRAVE Books has introduced Mouse in the House as a Christian alternative to that other secular "Christmas" game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to "spy" on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa's gifts. My friends atBRAVE Books knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created Mouse in the House to help parents emphasize the joy of giving more than getting in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,Mouse in the House sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it's only November, but this year we don't want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand. | | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | BRAVE Books is ramping up production big-time and fast. Friend, you're one of our best supporters and I'm so grateful. | | You understand that BRAVE Books is fighting to restore our culture because we can't just give up and let the radicals erase America's Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get "See You at the Library" kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show "Iggy and Mr. Kirk." This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. "Iggy and Mr. Kirk" is our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse: " So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!" -- Jenae K. " I love the Godly service ideas!" - Susan " I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season." - Kat F. Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture. And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it. Your gift helps BRAVE Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that's why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the Mouse in the House Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. BRAVE Books is working round the clock to get enough Mouse in the House Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. BRAVE Books would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our "More Mouse in the House!" campaign. You're bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America, | | Sincerely, Kirk Cameron P.S. Friend, it's only November and we're already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our Mouse in the House Christmas bundle to counter the Left's secular interpretation of this most blessed season. And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own Mouse in the House for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|---

body:
You’ll be the first to know |
#

Peter, Tina’s making a big announcement tomorrow. We can’t reveal much more, but here’s what we _can_ tell you: **Oregon’s ability to move ahead depends on protecting our hard-won progress. ** Governor Tina Kotek has focused on tackling Oregon’s biggest challenges, including lowering costs, reducing homelessness, strengthening schools, expanding mental health care, and defending our freedoms. When Donald Trump tried to force troops into our communities and rip away food assistance, Governor Kotek was ready. With so much at stake right now, _the support of this team will make all the difference in the fights ahead. _ [_**Will you show Tina that this team is tuned in and ready to hear our big announcement? body:

name: Troy Downing
subject: ALERT: Democrat Senators Face Court-Martial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is a dangerous line they should have never crossed

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,

Democrat Senators did something that should absolutely ENRAGE every patriot: They released a video openly urging our men and women in uniform to IGNORE orders from their Commander-in-Chief.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-pcexTXVw)Let that sink in.

The same liberal elites who spent years screaming about “insurrection” and “threats to democracy” are now encouraging our troops to undermine the military’s chain of command. This is reckless and irresponsible.
These senators aren’t clueless freshmen; they’re long-time members of the Senate Armed Services and Intelligence Committees.
They know what happens when you sow doubt and disobedience inside our military. And they’re doing it on purpose.
[Peter, should these Democrat Senators be tried for TREASON?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES — LOCK THEM UP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[NO — LET THEM GET AWAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._9AB_4q5WrFrVrxt5w)America cannot afford leaders who undermine our national security. These Senators are counting on your silence, but patriots must make their voices heard NOW.
Stand up, speak out, and show that Americans will never tolerate an attack on our military or our Commander-in-Chief. [Take our 5-second poll today.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-6MOzKyihooA)

Thank you for your patriotic support,

Team Downing| |

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We must be the counterpoint to their attacks on mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120325_1&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120325_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=120325_1&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.

President Donald Trump said that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud. Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. " How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha. We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court. We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump . We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. clean_body: They’ve turned our home into a sanctuary for socialism, fraud, and foreign interests | Peter, Minnesota is under attack - not by bombs or bullets, but by corruption, globalism, and organized theft. Over $98 million stolen through fraud schemes tied to Somali immigrant networks , with deep roots in the Muslim Brotherhood , and YES, even the U.S. Department of Agriculture. All in a state with just 5 million people. And the political class has been silent, because they’re in on it. I’m not. I never will be. And that’s why I said it plainly: Mass deportations need to happen. 1000%. They call me a pariah. Good. I didn’t get into this fight to make friends. I got in to EXPOSE the rot and DESTROY the machine. Minnesota’s 200,000 Somalians are the black face of the Democrat Party — Ilhan Omar is just the tip of the spear. And they’ve turned our home into a sanctuary for socialism, fraud, and foreign interests. Enough is enough. Will you rush $25, $50, or even $100 to help me take back Minnesota? | Let’s be honest: When hundreds of thousands are stolen, they call it theft. When hundreds of millions or billions are stolen? They call it foreign policy. I call it what it is: WAR on working Americans. I’m fighting back, but I can’t do it without YOU. Let’s win this fight. Let’s send a message. Let’s clean house. —Royce White PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Laura Gillen
subject: This is why December matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
If we fall behind now, we risk losing the ability to take back the House. It’s that simple.

| Peter,

Republicans are entering the end of the year with momentum, money, and a clear plan to flip the most competitive districts in the country, including this one.

And now my opponent from last cycle, the one I narrowly defeated by 2 points, is moving toward running again.

It would be easy to feel discouraged by the money, the attacks, and the pressure. **But I’ve been through tough fights before, and I’m preparing for this one too.**

Finishing 2025 strong is how we build the momentum we need to win in 2026. [_**Every contribution we raise right now helps us show strength, push back against attacks, and reach voters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120546939/586608917/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-12-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGEwZDczOC03Y2QwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r98RhI3xNlpzY2Gfvpks60GgHoZSEM4S8NDwAhrpjuI=)

name: Jon Ossoff via Heartland Patriots
subject: I am MAGA’s #1 target without a doubt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251203-9792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9792%2E614464%2EXwRCee)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — **[please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251203-9792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9792%2E614464%2EXwRCee)**
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251203-9792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9792%2E614464%2EXwRCee)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251203-9792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9792%2E614464%2EXwRCee)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251203-9792&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9792%2E614464%2EXwRCee)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

clean_body: This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream Let me lay this out, clear as day: I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation. If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent. Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation. Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning. I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible. I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is. Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history: He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf. Purged independent watchdogs across government. Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents. Defied and threatened federal judges. Undermined the press. Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government. This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes. In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority. Now we must win again. And we will win again. Just like last time, I can’t do it alone. So I’m asking: The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today. ** Thanks for being part of this team. As always, Jon Ossoff | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: We just won Round One. But Round Two is just around the corner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me first

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120547365/586609464/1700306063?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-12-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2M4NDAzNy03ZGQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7pL5KPcRD2YOT-IfgIpuUpgmH2IkqETbyUmEbDsMU0=)
---
This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas — and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **We just won the first round in this gerrymandering fight. But round two is just around the corner.**

After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans failed to gather the necessary signatures to force a special legislative session on redistricting.

Our grassroots campaign is having an impact.

**However, it’s likely they’ll make another attempt to gerrymander Kansas during the regular legislative session that begins in January.** The Kansas House Speaker even made an explicit promise: Republicans will continue the “conversation about redistricting.”

Look, this is a big victory for the people of Kansas, and our democracy as a whole. But it could turn into a _temporary_ victory if we don’t spend every second between now and January keeping up the hard work.

[_**Their plan to cheat the system isn’t over — so we can’t slow down either. Please, can you chip in a split donation between Hillary Scholten and my campaign to help us keep up the pressure campaign all the way through the new year? For weeks, Republican legislators were circulating a petition to call for a special session. The sole purpose of that special session? Gerrymandering Kansas’ maps by splitting up Johnson County — something Republicans promised to never do during their last gerrymandering push in 2021.

After that gerrymander, which was designed to make Kansas’ 3rd as Republican-friendly as possible, Republicans thought they had my number. The former Senate Majority Leader even said at the time: _“I guarantee you we can draw four Republican congressional maps.”_

**But they were wrong. In the next election, I won by even _more._**

Kansas Republicans have made it clear they’ll do anything to hold onto power — even silencing their own constituents at the ballot box. But I’ve been just as clear: **Voters should choose their representatives, not the other way around.**

clean_body: I wanted you to hear it from me first | = This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas — and I wanted you to hear it from me first: We just won the first round in this gerrymandering fight. But round two is just around the corner. After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans failed to gather the necessary signatures to force a special legislative session on redistricting. Our grassroots campaign is having an impact. However, it’s likely they’ll make another attempt to gerrymander Kansas during the regular legislative session that begins in January. The Kansas House Speaker even made an explicit promise: Republicans will continue the “conversation about redistricting.” Look, this is a big victory for the people of Kansas, and our democracy as a whole. But it could turn into a temporary victory if we don’t spend every second between now and January keeping up the hard work. = | = For weeks, Republican legislators were circulating a petition to call for a special session. The sole purpose of that special session? Gerrymandering Kansas’ maps by splitting up Johnson County — something Republicans promised to never do during their last gerrymandering push in 2021. After that gerrymander, which was designed to make Kansas’ 3rd as Republican-friendly as possible, Republicans thought they had my number. The former Senate Majority Leader even said at the time: “I guarantee you we can draw four Republican congressional maps.” But they were wrong. In the next election, I won by even more. Kansas Republicans have made it clear they’ll do anything to hold onto power — even silencing their own constituents at the ballot box. But I’ve been just as clear: Voters should choose their representatives, not the other way around. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Sharice * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: George Whitesides
subject: A few things I’m concerned about
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header]
Thank you, Peter.

I’m grateful to report that with your continued support in November, we met our online fundraising goal.

As this year in Congress draws to a close, I want to share a few of the issues weighing most heavily on me right now:

- Prices are continuing to climb and thousands of families in CA-27 are struggling to make ends meet. Trump’s volatile tariffs are driving costs higher, and this Administration is doing nothing to curb food costs and inflation.

- There are just 30 days until health insurance premiums are set to rise -- doubling, tripling, or even quadrupling for families across our community and nationwide. This is a direct consequence of the GOP shutdown and their inability to work with us to protect affordable healthcare options.

- Trump is calling for violence against Senator Mark Kelly and other Democrats for speaking out about the military’s ability to turn down illegal orders. Now, his Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is illegally striking boats in international waters.

I’m doing everything I can to stand up to these abuses of power -- through oversight, legislation, and every tool available to me in Congress -- and I’m deeply grateful to have you with me as we prepare for what’s ahead.

Thank you,

George
