name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT Call to Action: Secure Our Elections
body:
Tell the Senate it’s time to safeguard our elections and pass the SAVE Act!
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/PuzZ_3JETR1Ksf51LWziJJseAXNym-_VZuVMl569-tQ=434)Patriot–**We need your help to safeguard American elections!** The right to vote in the United States is sacred to all of us, and allowing non-citizens to participate dilutes the voices of American citizens.The Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act, _which has already passed the House of Representatives,_ mandates proof of citizenship at the time of voter registration—closing loopholes that currently allow noncitizens to register and vote in our elections. Yet, shockingly, the U.S. Senate continues to stall, refusing to bring this essential legislation to the floor for a vote and leaving our electoral system at risk.[_**Call your senators to tell them that it’s past time they bring the SAVE Act to the floor for a vote.**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F/1/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/HV3ZRk-cEsmmI_AWAq-J99pksUY3hvpRlcu77MTsJ4s=434)[ CALL YOUR SENATORS](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F/2/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/v5wXw0nLS_4ez3IrVqXCqB6XeUS0gqpgwnnxWe8YoM4=434)Americans will not sit back and watch as our votes continue to be diluted by noncitizens due to loopholes in the National Voter Registration Act and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act.Stand up and make your voice heard, today![_**Call your senators now and tell them to bring the SAVE Act to vote on the floor of the Senate—and to vote YES!**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F/3/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/Vt9qXLnmDph1lf6MmvzLl98dKwYZkUqlG6mZn94wmsk=434) In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/Nxa2do8QfsBcXvBFtUMT9Rl28lm_uymyx0UnEndoXf8=434) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/gh6YBxPiObb8adwov--1PgBS3RJY0n24aNml4Ywp9-I=434)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/rBdbmNkLkm0kz6LsF-kPPQbgNNCaNbPA23ywZJPUwoU=434) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019ae5ae4fee-8010c691-769b-4398-a5b2-3ea08ef96b39-000000/bELdCM_se1ovBwmsDkeF7rmmKXO3oFl3FcxRHTPoxQo=434).

subject: $7 for 7

body:
We just endorsed...
#

Team —
GIFFORDS PAC just endorsed a slate of 7 gun safety champions running to flip key battleground House districts from red to blue!
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251203-1-b&t=1&akid=11080%2E3935704%2ERX5nze)
Less than a month ago, you helped us flip key statewide and legislative races across the country. Our next challenge is here:
**If we can flip these 7 seats, then we can help secure a gun safety majority in the U.S. House and once again put public safety ahead of politics.**
But election experts rank these as some of the most competitive elections in the country. The gun lobby and their allies will spend whatever it takes to retain their majority, so we can’t take anything for granted.
[**Will you please chip in $7 to help GIFFORDS PAC elect gun safety champions like these right now?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251203-1-b&t=2&akid=11080%2E3935704%2ERX5nze)

name: Heidi Hall
subject: When the Republican cares more about the ACA than the Doctor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, when the Republican in this race cares more about the ACA than the Democratic doctor, you know you have a problem.
After voting for the budget that put us in this mess, our Republican opponent finally listened to his constituents and proposed a bipartisan bill to extend ACA tax credits for 2 years.
It took him this long to realize that our district's residents were going to see their healthcare costs skyrocket, with some seeing their premiums increasing by over $24,000 if these tax credits weren't extended— but better late than never.
The question I have is, why isn't our other opponent supporting this too?
The doctor, who for some reason doesn't support Medicare for All, isn't voicing his full support for this rare but welcome bipartisan bill and is instead sitting in Congress twiddling his thumbs.
Friend, we deserve a leader who will take their responsibilities seriously and fight tooth and nail to make sure that our district has access to affordable healthcare. Will you help me fight for you in Congress by donating what you can to our grassroots campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Thank you so much,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251203_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump +22 district shifts 15 POINTS to the left - Republicans are PANICKING
body:
Peter, voters have put the GOP on notice:
THE BLUE WAVE IS COMING.
The GOP dumped over FOUR MILLION DOLLARS into the special election in Tennessee. This is a RUBY RED district that Donald Trump won by 22 points.
Last night, that district shifted 15 POINTS LEFT
Democrats aren’t just overperforming in swing districts anymore. We’re overperforming in places Republicans once considered untouchable. And if that trend holds, states like Texas suddenly look a whole lot more competitive than the GOP wants to admit.
A fifteen point swing like we just saw in Tennessee puts 35 Republican held House seats into play. We intend to go all in on every single one of these opportunities - but it's going to take resources. Chip in now to help us scale up and contest every winnable seat on the map. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-bluewave?refcode=120325_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

Fellow Conservative,

It’s hard to believe the incompetence in Minnesota right now.

While Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan are auditioning for jobs, Somali immigrants in my state are stealing money from **American taxpayers and likely funneling it to terrorists in Africa.**

I know this is nuanced, but things have gotten so out of control in Minnesota that the New York Times wrote an article titled **“How Fraud Swamped Minnesota’s Social Services System on Tim Walz’s Watch”**
**_
It’s caught my attention as a Republican U.S. Senate candidate.

It’s caught President Trump’s attention. _**

body:
Republicans can’t govern. The path to retaking control of the House hinges on this district—and defeating Lauren Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fo8J7VHx16594ld3BhcVKyIFw6SkBn1W4aSR_yHLzu75XVWHp91LJCY65q3tWCN8p_Jk-HCYFZGxNMBywJvvCW29xdj3nAhYe4_UmhDaT2H_lTqcoVos8fXaE2zxuaUVG2Vny2_8U33ej4dGmHOby_MPL7uNPl3GBirMeX4bKGIUxQ-o45SlJrj1DAv9Ub9Y2HAythRJR6xkgyRjou5GVLnG4EzCHUux&c=yHSJEWI25ZIHEZXHOQ1cA9F-11AFjgWduwxHnqi__f6bebrbRvGQug==&ch=6Nk1-UfUBzrhDdb-Dwp4vqYRbNFqnnOZYAYQoRWgv50c4URP8qBvXw==)
---
|

Peter,
Republicans can't govern.
They have shown the voters time and again that they have no interest in finding consensus or making sure that the federal government can perform basic functions like passing a budget.
GOP leaders like Lauren Boebert belong on reality TV and not voting in the House of Representatives.
When Boebert and MAGA lunatics like Marjorie Taylor Greene mix, insanity and chaos is the result--and now Boebert is laying the groundwork for yet another lengthy government shutdown as Congress faces its January deadline to extend funding:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fo8J7VHx16594ld3BhcVKyIFw6SkBn1W4aSR_yHLzu75XVWHp91LJCY65q3tWCN8p_Jk-HCYFZGxNMBywJvvCW29xdj3nAhYe4_UmhDaT2H_lTqcoVos8fXaE2zxuaUVG2Vny2_8U33ej4dGmHOby_MPL7uNPl3GBirMeX4bKGIUxQ-o45SlJrj1DAv9Ub9Y2HAythRJR6xf5kFCPp9JCtij1267LQ2P&c=yHSJEWI25ZIHEZXHOQ1cA9F-11AFjgWduwxHnqi__f6bebrbRvGQug==&ch=6Nk1-UfUBzrhDdb-Dwp4vqYRbNFqnnOZYAYQoRWgv50c4URP8qBvXw==)
---

Americans are sick and tired of this nonsense. People like Lauren Boebert and MTG should never have been given positions of authority and power.
Boebert should be kept as far away as humanly possible from any kind of budget, not directly influencing federal spending and policy.
That's why defeating Lauren Boebert is of immense national importance: the path for Democrats to retake control of the House hinges on this district--and defeating Boebert.
Keep in mind: Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And in 2024, Boebert's Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese had the single best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Meanwhile, Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
[Tuesday's Tennessee special election resulted in a 13 point swing toward Democrats in a deep red district. Boebert's district is much less red than TN-07. Trisha can beat Boebert this Midterm, but only if we all come together to support her. Peter,
Republicans can't govern.
They have shown the voters time and again that they have no interest in finding consensus or making sure that the federal government can perform basic functions like passing a budget.
GOP leaders like Lauren Boebert belong on reality TV and not voting in the House of Representatives.
When Boebert and MAGA lunatics like Marjorie Taylor Greene mix, insanity and chaos is the result--and now Boebert is laying the groundwork for yet another lengthy government shutdown as Congress faces its January deadline to extend funding:

That's why defeating Lauren Boebert is of immense national importance: the path for Democrats to retake control of the House hinges on this district--and defeating Boebert.

| | Hi Friend, Let me break a campaign rule and talk politics directly for a moment, because something real is shifting in races across the country, and it matters for NC-11. Democrats who stay focused on the basics–affordable healthcare, lowering costs, defending fundamental rights, restoring due process, and passing common-sense immigration legislation–are beating expectations everywhere. New Jersey. Virginia. New York City. Tennessee’s 7th District. Even races the pundits wrote off are suddenly competitive because voters are responding to candidates who meet them where they are. Win or lose, the pattern is clear: Democrats are overperforming because they’re talking about what actually matters. Some candidates in districts like ours think the path forward is to run to the right and mimic Republican messaging. Others have stopped investing in rural communities entirely because they assume folks there won’t give Democrats a fair hearing. Both approaches miss what this moment is telling us. What’s working is simple: Show up everywhere.
Be honest.
Stand on principle.
Deliver for people, not billionaires. That’s the campaign we’re building here.

I’m running as myself: someone who has served all parts of Western North Carolina. Someone committed to rights for all, fair process for everyone, and a government that finally works for the people who keep this region moving.I believe rural communities are worth showing up for.
I believe folks in all communities deserve to be energized and supported fully, not just managed.
And I believe authenticity still wins elections.If we get this right, NC-11 won’t just be another data point. It will be proof that when Democrats lead with clarity, common sense, and respect for every voter, we overperform too.Let’s make it happen.**Dr. Richard Hudspeth**
Democrat for Congress, NC-11

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hi Friend, Let me break a campaign rule and talk politics directly for a moment, because something real is shifting in races across the country, and it matters for NC-11. Democrats who stay focused on the basics–affordable healthcare, lowering costs, defending fundamental rights, restoring due process, and passing common-sense immigration legislation–are beating expectations everywhere. New Jersey. Virginia. New York City. Tennessee’s 7th District. Even races the pundits wrote off are suddenly competitive because voters are responding to candidates who meet them where they are. Win or lose, the pattern is clear: Democrats are overperforming because they’re talking about what actually matters. Some candidates in districts like ours think the path forward is to run to the right and mimic Republican messaging. Others have stopped investing in rural communities entirely because they assume folks there won’t give Democrats a fair hearing. Both approaches miss what this moment is telling us. What’s working is simple: Show up everywhere. Be honest. Stand on principle. Deliver for people, not billionaires. That’s the campaign we’re building here. I’m running as myself: someone who has served all parts of Western North Carolina. Someone committed to rights for all, fair process for everyone, and a government that finally works for the people who keep this region moving.I believe rural communities are worth showing up for. I believe folks in all communities deserve to be energized and supported fully, not just managed. And I believe authenticity still wins elections.If we get this right, NC-11 won’t just be another data point. It will be proof that when Democrats lead with clarity, common sense, and respect for every voter, we overperform too.Let’s make it happen.Dr. Richard Hudspeth Democrat for Congress, NC-11 = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2025. Paid for by Richard Hudspeth for Congress. All Rights Reserved. Hudspeth for Congress P.O. Box 1101 Skyland, NC 28776 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Trump says he’s “entitled” to rigged maps

body:
The only thing he’s entitled to is to be impeached and removed from office...
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PJDkQZ2RUa1W3TSJBfPMOVVI50GYoyt78gYTTBrSIxYqyqo0LcTrolsTgafimUraejG94zGI3b7xV_59NbabtcNPJocjPLgGP9FPkalcOuLoCaeXO-Zm7867VfWVJARS7rrGfs38SM46e1rq1q3ON7vtSjKgYgF2bit7kr-vnf7KE9RM5nZHI7qRvA0OIfd6cTQO6OPFUF7B59Hp_xQ2cLfMu_B2He3O01OGyhoEcoI=&c=lVzGbaZaFWCrtkCcSZI9KjaI6cgFNq36bLV-SatC6s4Al5M2m6n9DQ==&ch=g0PO4uq3L7_Jy27Z0dJ52aHvFXVgfab1mKGoxcEygHQ8wMhx0XtzvA==)
---
| Peter,
Let's face it: we owe it to Trump to let him tilt the rules of politics in his favor.
Trump has had a tough life. His father didn't love him and because of that he only gave young Donny a meager $61 million to "build an empire" with. That's barely enough to cover a penthouse suite in gold!
And because the rules of capitalism are so unfair and casinos are historically extremely hard to make profitable, poor Donald had to declare bankruptcy--six times!
Then, because criminal laws are biased against rich white men, as we all know, Don was martyred for a few small lies about his businesses and falsifying just a couple records to defraud some investors who had it coming anyway.
That's why Donald Trump is entitled to win any election he wants any way he wants, including rigging the maps by drawing insane congressional districts that will only elect MAGA loyalists:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PJDkQZ2RUa1W3TSJBfPMOVVI50GYoyt78gYTTBrSIxYqyqo0LcTrolsTgafimUraejG94zGI3b7xV_59NbabtcNPJocjPLgGP9FPkalcOuLoCaeXO-Zm7867VfWVJARS7rrGfs38SM46e1rq1q3ON7vtSjKgYgF2bit7kr-vnf7KE9RM5nZHI7qRvA0OIfd6cTQO6OPFUF7B59Hp_xQ2cNetWxoKhUkJd6Kial3YyBw=&c=lVzGbaZaFWCrtkCcSZI9KjaI6cgFNq36bLV-SatC6s4Al5M2m6n9DQ==&ch=g0PO4uq3L7_Jy27Z0dJ52aHvFXVgfab1mKGoxcEygHQ8wMhx0XtzvA==)
---

Donald Trump expects you to let him do what he wants. Roll over like a good dog and bark when he says bark.
If that sounds good to you, then Fair Fight Colorado is definitely not your cup of tea.
However, if all of the above pisses you off beyond belief -- we want to talk with you.
Trump and MAGA Republicans think they can steal the 2026 election before it has even begun. They think they are entitled to break the rules, violate the law, and take what they want whenever they want it.
It's time for us to take the gloves off and fight MAGA head-on.
Fair Fight Colorado is fighting to make sure that another blue state enters the fray to beat Republicans at their own redistricting game. We are pushing forward with a ballot initiative that will let Coloradans decide on a new Congressional map that will fight back against MAGA election rigging.
[But victory is far from assured. To make this happen, we need an outpouring of grassroots support to show that we have the backing of millions of Democrats and patriots who refuse to hand over our democracy because Baby Trump demanded it. Help us fight fire with fire by making a contribution of $50, $25, $5 or whatever you can give right now:](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PJDkQZ2RUa1W3TSJBfPMOVVI50GYoyt78gYTTBrSIxYqyqo0LcTrolsTgafimUraJsIk7GQnR04CF9GL87ELKiKAH3e-cosSLUd8KQa3IFy7G0Spm7FyAVUKiKzvZh5KE6nU4G4JbHoqlYOcBLiRHbWh-mgUJAusbAnGD-D0ZXDNI6oIfvt1W16n9_2HRzXTihsQ57z0oCmUJ9fZ_bFPfbZ9WvnA-kfaujuuam2wPJXGWlSCxooWEg==&c=lVzGbaZaFWCrtkCcSZI9KjaI6cgFNq36bLV-SatC6s4Al5M2m6n9DQ==&ch=g0PO4uq3L7_Jy27Z0dJ52aHvFXVgfab1mKGoxcEygHQ8wMhx0XtzvA==)

clean_body: Take the 2026 Survey Now → | Peter, A new Reuters/Ipsos poll reveals a significant warning sign: Democrats are far more energized for the 2026 elections than Republicans. Their base is waking up early—and if we don’t match that intensity, we risk losing the Senate. We’re laying the groundwork now for the toughest map we’ve faced in years. Before we finalize our 2026 strategy, we need quick input from top grassroots conservatives. That’s why you, Peter, have been selected to take our official: Your answers will help us understand enthusiasm levels, set priorities, and identify where we need to mobilize to win next year. This early feedback is critical. Democrats already think the momentum is theirs. We’re not giving them an inch. Public service means serving the public

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120550365/586618350/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGE1ZmRjNi04M2QwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mNc0bHLdgZKTvwMJi9_9hEaJ1qjVkAuXKJjRxj7Q9A=)

_**Iowa Capital Dispatch:**_
President Donald Trump endorses U.S. Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks
Peter,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks has received the endorsement of the ultimate Republican party boss. And it didn't come because Mariannette Miller-Meeks is fighting for Iowa families. It came because party leadership knows she'll fall in line with them _every single time_ , no matter how much it hurts the people she's supposed to represent.

**But we shouldn't be shocked.**

Miller-Meeks has actively backed reckless tariffs that are squeezing our farmers and small businesses. She voted to kick more than 100,000 Iowans off their health insurance. She's fought against lowering costs and making life even a little easier for working families here at home. **Every time she's had the chance to stand up to party bosses and stand with us, she's picked D.C. power brokers instead.**

And now, she's getting rewarded for it, with endorsements and even money. Speaker Mike Johnson just announced he's preparing to funnel $6 MILLION to Miller-Meeks and other vulnerable Republican candidates just like her. **Party bosses will do whatever it takes to keep Miller-Meeks in office, working just for them.**

Christina is running because she believes public service means actually serving the public, even when that means standing up to Washington. Next November, we have the chance to replace Miller-Meeks with someone who will fight for the people of this district every single day. But we can't do it without you.

**[If you are ready to help defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and elect a representative who works for Iowans, not party bosses, chip in to support Christina today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120550366/586618351/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251203_endors_fndd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251203_endors_fndd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c4a5fdc6-83d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGE1ZmRjNi04M2QwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mNc0bHLdgZKTvwMJi9_9hEaJ1qjVkAuXKJjRxj7Q9A=)**

clean_body: Public service means serving the public | = Iowa Capital Dispatch: President Donald Trump endorses U.S. Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks Peter, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has received the endorsement of the ultimate Republican party boss. And it didn't come because Mariannette Miller-Meeks is fighting for Iowa families. It came because party leadership knows she'll fall in line with them every single time , no matter how much it hurts the people she's supposed to represent. But we shouldn't be shocked. Miller-Meeks has actively backed reckless tariffs that are squeezing our farmers and small businesses. She voted to kick more than 100,000 Iowans off their health insurance. She's fought against lowering costs and making life even a little easier for working families here at home. Every time she's had the chance to stand up to party bosses and stand with us, she's picked D.C. power brokers instead. And now, she's getting rewarded for it, with endorsements and even money. Speaker Mike Johnson just announced he's preparing to funnel $6 MILLION to Miller-Meeks and other vulnerable Republican candidates just like her. Party bosses will do whatever it takes to keep Miller-Meeks in office, working just for them. Christina is running because she believes public service means actually serving the public, even when that means standing up to Washington. Next November, we have the chance to replace Miller-Meeks with someone who will fight for the people of this district every single day. But we can't do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Hi Peter,

I wanted to reach out and say **thank you!**

Because of supporters like you, we hit our fundraising goal last month. That kind of grassroots strength is what powers our work, and I’m truly grateful.

But as we turn the calendar to December, I need to be honest: We can’t slow down now.

At the end of this month, we face a major FEC filing deadline, and the numbers we report will be public for everyone to see. National Republicans would love nothing more than to see Democrats post low numbers, and we can’t let that happen.

And as Chair of BOLD PAC, the pressure is even higher. The communities we represent and the candidates we’re working hard to elect are counting on us to show strong, early support going into 2026. All eyes will be on this report.

That’s why every donation this month matters so much. We must show that we have the momentum to win big.

So thank you again for everything you’ve already done. I’m energized by your support and I’m ready to keep pushing.

Peter,
If 2025 has taught us anything, it's this: The Democrats are back.
Trump's approval is crashing. Even deep red districts are shifting blue by historic margins. The mandate is clear: voters want leaders who make life affordable, not chaotic.
Democrats have a rare opportunity right now: not just to take back the House from MAGA control, but to elect a new wave of Democratic leaders--a new generation ready to turn the page on the Trump era and begin to actually fix the issues facing our nation.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SK59B4-TNDp8IKFL0Vyl2Da6KX9wIZPuynTxZL4gpbvPSLJL5Up2vR-oJYshlVfMlfZPdamUVoelQBVnegFSyRMQXGlnosz6_VY2j6Lq7VGJBMcDCrfcc2ENyuZUa6n2pd0fekvNYooTK5_K2Y3VA-TWNkD8OoDETvHwaP1ww-Bap17qRMuh2itKdMPvm0dYo9gxX-uFtE_owWF3k2PfbnjvdR-PhFnM&c=EvhUvn_50KBr46g1VWTJtCQ43NqygRNADvJG7aHjU7L0IYEHTlCIMQ==&ch=i9zYPS5Qvm_LufEfULvYaE-PXWLYq-6GACO8qLOxyJhhGDKUaSvFEQ==)
---
|
It starts in Illinois' 9th District with Bushra Amiwala.
Bushra is running to succeed Democrat Jan Schakowsky in one of the bluest seats in the country. But she isn't just looking to fill a seat; she's building a movement. At age 27, Bushra brings a rare combination of youth and experience. She was the first woman of her generation to be elected to public office and has served on the school board for one of Chicago's largest school districts for 7 years.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SK59B4-TNDp8IKFL0Vyl2Da6KX9wIZPuynTxZL4gpbvPSLJL5Up2vR-oJYshlVfMlfZPdamUVoelQBVnegFSyRMQXGlnosz6_VY2j6Lq7VGJBMcDCrfcc2ENyuZUa6n2pd0fekvNYooTK5_K2Y3VA-TWNkD8OoDETvHwaP1ww-Bap17qRMuh2itKdMPvm0dYo9gxX-uFtE8bf2CoQIrt6yobSBlBoNS8&c=EvhUvn_50KBr46g1VWTJtCQ43NqygRNADvJG7aHjU7L0IYEHTlCIMQ==&ch=i9zYPS5Qvm_LufEfULvYaE-PXWLYq-6GACO8qLOxyJhhGDKUaSvFEQ==)
---
|
Bushra knows politics as usual is failing our neighbors, which is why she is fighting for universal health care, tuition-free college, debt forgiveness, and affordable housing.
But because she refuses corporate and special interest money, she has a target on her back.
Our campaign is facing down MAGA billionaires and AIPAC who have jumped into this race to try and prevent Bushra from winning. They are terrified of a young, progressive woman they can't buy.
While they have deep pockets, our campaign has something more powerful: the people. [Please, can we count on you to chip in $25, $10, or whatever is meaningful to you to help elect Bushra and help Democrats seize on this rare opportunity?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SK59B4-TNDp8IKFL0Vyl2Da6KX9wIZPuynTxZL4gpbvPSLJL5Up2vR-oJYshlVfMvJI2SE5SvUOLQMZ-_etv8x3EUxI06p9_RTjzrWrVH2wLOHXVWt11Os8EFZWCHhFvRLc2iUUTszz2zLNG8lha-PY9R6FPIXgumiAxoDw8WxJ-VUCOiFn_8F8JNxbFhw9g5BNJEfBdkpgt0UVYPLuapAsTXFChCC5bmW-MGPfGQ_g=&c=EvhUvn_50KBr46g1VWTJtCQ43NqygRNADvJG7aHjU7L0IYEHTlCIMQ==&ch=i9zYPS5Qvm_LufEfULvYaE-PXWLYq-6GACO8qLOxyJhhGDKUaSvFEQ==)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: When prosecutors are overworked, everyone is less safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley for Wake**
body:
This campaign is about standing up for law enforcement, ensuring justice for victims, and building a safer Wake County for everyone. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120551229/586620643/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk4Y2M3Yi04NmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PI52rlmBRSI_y8gk0HsZD3u8-cN-MOtF2_wSoNKgeU8=&emci=045ad532-65d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5a98cc7b-86d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)
---
Peter, When prosecutors are overworked and under-resourced, everyone in our community is less safe. That’s exactly what’s happening here in Wake County, and the numbers tell the story: Mecklenburg County — a smaller county than Wake — has _twice_ as many prosecutors as we do. They have 94. **We only have 43.** When you factor in that Wake County has grown by more than 30% over the past 15 years, but our DA’s office hasn’t grown with it, it's clear why victims are having to wait years rather than months for justice. We simply cannot make our community safer if we don’t expand the team that prosecutes violent crime and protects our families. The incredible public servants in Wake County deserve a DA who will have their back and fight to ensure they have the resources to get the job done. **That’s why, as Wake County’s next District Attorney, I’ll fight to double the size of our DA’s office, support law enforcement, and make sure justice is delivered fairly and efficiently.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120551233/586620647/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk4Y2M3Yi04NmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PI52rlmBRSI_y8gk0HsZD3u8-cN-MOtF2_wSoNKgeU8=&emci=045ad532-65d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5a98cc7b-86d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) [**This campaign is about standing up for law enforcement, ensuring justice for victims, and building a safer Wake County for everyone. If you support this vision, please consider getting involved by volunteering with our campaign today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120551236/586620651/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk4Y2M3Yi04NmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PI52rlmBRSI_y8gk0HsZD3u8-cN-MOtF2_wSoNKgeU8=&emci=045ad532-65d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5a98cc7b-86d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) | [GET INVOLVED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120551239/586620653/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTk4Y2M3Yi04NmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PI52rlmBRSI_y8gk0HsZD3u8-cN-MOtF2_wSoNKgeU8=&emci=045ad532-65d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5a98cc7b-86d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)

clean_body: This campaign is about standing up for law enforcement, ensuring justice for victims, and building a safer Wake County for everyone. | Peter, When prosecutors are overworked and under-resourced, everyone in our community is less safe. That’s exactly what’s happening here in Wake County, and the numbers tell the story: Mecklenburg County — a smaller county than Wake — has twice as many prosecutors as we do. They have 94. We only have 43. When you factor in that Wake County has grown by more than 30% over the past 15 years, but our DA’s office hasn’t grown with it, it's clear why victims are having to wait years rather than months for justice. We simply cannot make our community safer if we don’t expand the team that prosecutes violent crime and protects our families. The incredible public servants in Wake County deserve a DA who will have their back and fight to ensure they have the resources to get the job done. That’s why, as Wake County’s next District Attorney, I’ll fight to double the size of our DA’s office, support law enforcement, and make sure justice is delivered fairly and efficiently. | Thank you, Wiley Wiley for Wake PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley for Wake

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/3/2025
body:
Inside the story Colorado rarely hears: Trauma, transition and the path back to truth
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Douglas County’s new progressive school board sparked controversy by [swearing in early and ousting conservatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ahead of schedule. RMV published a [major detransitioner story](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) exposing rushed gender-medicine practices. Retail theft surged past 27,000 reports—[likely over 200,000 real incidents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—driving billions in losses and job cuts. A judge refused to dismiss claims [Polis violated state limits on ICE cooperation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and the governor [extended deep budget cuts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to close a major fiscal gap. A companion study warned Colorado’s [high felony-theft threshold](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is fueling organized retail crime, while the Copper Creek wolf pack was tied to [another livestock kill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Minnesota came under fire as 480+ DHS employees accused Gov. Tim Walz of [covering up a billion-dollar Somali-led fraud ring](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and retaliating against whistleblowers. Prosecutors continue unraveling schemes—including COVID meal fraud and a $120,000 juror-bribe attempt—while Walz deflected responsibility in a national interview.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Hunter Rivera spotlights [Gabe Evans' “all-of-the-above” energy strategy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), highlighting the 8th District’s booming mix of oil, gas, renewables, manufacturing, and emerging nuclear. Another commentary also challenged the County Clerks Association for [urging Polis to block Tina Peters’ federal transfer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling their claims unconstitutional.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, December 3, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Inside the story Colorado rarely hears: Trauma, transition and the path back to truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
“It took me almost two decades to realize the error,” Antoinette De La Cruz told a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “Transitioning didn’t fix anything. It delayed the inevitable. Healing.”
It was the first time many Coloradans had heard a detransitioner describe her path into transition, what it cost her and what brought her back.
Read RMV’s reporting on the event [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
Here she shared the fuller account of her story.
De La Cruz said her transition began long before hormones or surgery. “I learned very young as a little girl that I was not valued as a woman, and I definitely was not safe as one,” she said. When she was seventeen she met someone who told her she could become a man. “I had no idea you could even do that,” she said. “Once I learned you could become a man I thought, now I could become valuable and now I’ll be safe.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Clerks vs. the Constitution: Why the CCCA’s Letter to Polis Gets It Wrong](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY A. L. GOODWIN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **CCCA’s letter to Polis rests on false claims:** The commentary argues the Colorado County Clerks Association misrepresented Tina Peters as a “flight risk” despite her perfect 31-month bond compliance record and no evidence supporting the accusation.
* **Clerks urged Polis to suppress protected speech:** The piece says CCCA’s request to block Peters’ federal transfer is rooted in fear of what she might say, amounting to unconstitutional censorship and a violation of First Amendment rights.
* **CCCA’s broader claims collapse under scrutiny:** The article disputes clerks’ assertions that Peters incited threats, debunks their technical critiques of the Mesa forensic reports, and criticizes the taxpayer-funded association for engaging in partisan advocacy.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado theft crisis: More crime, fewer inmates, and mounting economic fallout](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Retail theft is surging statewide:** Colorado logged over 27,000 shoplifting reports in 2024, a 22% jump, with real incidents likely exceeding 200,000 due to chronic under-reporting.
* **Crime rising as inmate numbers fall:** Property crime has climbed even as Colorado’s jail and prison population has dropped by several thousand over the past decade, leaving many repeat offenders facing minimal consequences.
* **Economic fallout is mounting:** Retail losses are driving job cuts, store closures, and billions in statewide economic impact; CSI warns Colorado could lose 8,485 jobs by 2026 unless laws—like the $2,000 felony-theft threshold—are tightened.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Rep. Gabe Evans is a Colorado Energy Champion**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY HUNTER RIVERA | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 2** _As the seventh-largest energy-producing state in the nation, Colorado has established itself as a leader in not only traditional energy, but renewable and next-generation sources as well. That’s why new, all-of-the-above energy legislation moving through Congress is so important for the Centennial State._
__
[**Fort Collins event connects youth gender care concerns to upcoming Colorado ballot measures**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | DECEMBER 1** _“Is it really true that when a confused hurting kid goes to the doctor the doctor turns the knife around and puts it on them and profits from it,” Colorado physician Dr. Travis Morrell asked a Fort Collins audience on November 20. “It is true.”_
__
[**Standing Firm — The Full Armor of God**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 30** _There’s a moment in every spiritual battle when you realize that the goal isn’t to fight harder—it’s to stand stronger. When Paul wrote, “after you have done everything, to stand,” he wasn’t calling for passive endurance; he was calling for a posture of steadfast faith, hope, and perseverance— anchored, alert, and armored in Christ. Your faith is the rock on which you stand, unwavering and secure._

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
💵**DID YOU KNOW?** Benjamin Franklin and Alexander Hamilton are the **only non-presidents on U.S. paper currency**.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Right is still right, even if you stand by yourself." – Clarence Thomas
|

subject: [SIGN]: They’re looting the country in secret. We must stop them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Peter — _This is urgent._ The Trump administration is handing out **secret tax breaks to billionaires and giant corporations**. This is a five alarm fire. And if we don’t act _right now_ , working families will pay the price. These backroom giveaways would **drain our communities** , strip funding from schools and services, and deepen the power imbalance that already rigs our democracy against us. This is how inequality hardens—quietly, secretly, without our consent. **_And we cannot let them get away with it._** If we don’t push back right now, they’ll get away with funneling billions to the wealthiest few while our communities fall further behind — while schools crumble, hospitals close, and local budgets get gutted. **[Add your name now and demand Congress stop this corruption in its tracks.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39IeVqcoR70jmgUHDcMs-Ok1l4UFcTsCtPGI5E_58dNt9RFfKwI6GJef0bcNt9iXX5utM1o4bF_efpkamdpIxvKBHTU7aUiQ8qKa420Q0VBjjK1PsPC6PGc46DTmGbi5k1cN4ss3296zHytcFbDnFMT8KDwLjKWMH9tfo9vPAqy00ZkR7siIDE5wOXlXtS2RWFIqcDo1YrJMXiryMEaKFnYimf9jv7Y3bN5VvDYCxWayyP4NUEi_7uGaOwAIJ1K12WyPL6eOH92vLnOdCsL8xrprYyBWTafku1xhsHuGglwu8E6y_boBpCyb7OGizw6jkYI-7U0HIk7X8YUImMQzQgW69JlwdLaaYiDDAgMiAVzg9E85fin5O7RnHjjfX12Z1lyz2WjMGT6GOCTWLwgtc67OKJNygOP6-REtfjUvaqA_Osz4TO_FeIenJL__at2Ti7J-CVVV0lb3ahlpdPlf6LwJSnyKMHqbFDTJtEKF9nSkXx8_knrJH_4ThOpRcLbJ13ob54wX6kyWIaoK2W8Z0tUxhJwgN2q1izc15r3wxO3B70m8HMFOyKNphI5jFqe5jU/4m4/cP7QPZk-TTO7ZTqKHZvefA/h0/h001.axT2kUDPa36SOxuqa5perFVNwTQkNP80lItXZdMdf_c)** **** [SIGN THE PETITION TODAY

clean_body: | | | Peter — This is urgent. The Trump administration is handing out secret tax breaks to billionaires and giant corporations. This is a five alarm fire. And if we don’t act right now , working families will pay the price. These backroom giveaways would drain our communities , strip funding from schools and services, and deepen the power imbalance that already rigs our democracy against us. This is how inequality hardens—quietly, secretly, without our consent. And we cannot let them get away with it. If we don’t push back right now, they’ll get away with funneling billions to the wealthiest few while our communities fall further behind — while schools crumble, hospitals close, and local budgets get gutted. ** These secret giveaways are a deliberate attack on working people. A slap in the face to every family that pays their fair share. A reminder that the powerful think they can do anything, so long as they do it quietly. ** Thanks for joining us. — Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . As we head into the election year, we want to touch base with the people powering this campaign, including _you_.
How are you feeling heading into 2026? What issues matter most to you right now? What do you want to see candidates talk about on the campaign trail?
Hearing your thoughts on questions like these will help us shape our campaign into one that you’re proud to be a part of.

Team Taylor

name: Abdul for U.S. Senate
subject: Abdul 🤝Bernie 🤝Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

In case you missed it, Abdul and Senator Bernie Sanders hosted a virtual
town hall last night focused on the future of our healthcare.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251203-1-ak.1zzXl_&amount=10&refcode=em20251203-1392&t=1004&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Abdul and Bernie

Their message was clear: Healthcare is a human right, and Abdul is the
only candidate in this race fighting for Medicare for All.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251203-1-ak.1zzXl_&amount=10&refcode=em20251203-1392&t=1005&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Before we say more, can you chip in to fuel our campaign? Earning your
support is the only way we’ll be able to defeat the entrenched, corporate
PAC-backed opposition:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251203-1-ak.1zzXl_&amount=10&refcode=em20251203-1392&t=1024&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Donate $10 ››

Peter, health
insurance PACs are gearing up to spend whatever it takes to stop Abdul
because, unlike other candidates in this race, he refuses to take their
money in exchange for loyalty.

They know that if Abdul wins this primary, he’ll join Bernie in the U.S.
Senate as one of the strongest voices for Medicare for All in the entire
country.

And here’s the part they don’t want you to know: We can win.

Abdul is polling competitively, he’s meeting voters in every corner of the
state, and he represents what working people want from their elected
officials.

The only thing that could drag our chances down is money.

If we let health insurance PAC money dominate this race and drown out our
message, we could very well lose. That’s why we need your
support, Peter.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251203-1-ak.1zzXl_&amount=10&refcode=em20251203-1392&t=1025&akid=1393%2E251025%2EMHr17S ]Pitch in $10 or any amount today to help us host more
town halls, reach even more voters, and build an unstoppable movement.

Thank you,

Team Abdul

name: Sarah McBride HQ
subject: Building coalitions in unlikely places
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The urgency of this legislation is real.
#
Hi,
Sarah recently reintroduced the **Global Respect Act** , a human rights bill that finally holds accountable those who torture, imprison, or commit violence against LGBTQ+ people worldwide.
_And she did it with something Washington rarely sees anymore: real bipartisanship._
[__](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251203-1.QSk07Q&refcode=em20251203-2557&amount=5&t=1&akid=2557%2E21716%2ECxaDNR)
**[No one should be targeted for who they love. If you agree, will you chip in $5 to keep Sarah fighting for our LGBTQ+ communities here and abroad?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251203-1.QSk07Q&refcode=em20251203-2557&amount=5&t=2&akid=2557%2E21716%2ECxaDNR)**
**The urgency of this legislation is real:**

→ Nearly a third of countries still criminalize LGBTQ+ people
→ A dozen still impose the death penalty
→ Authoritarian crackdowns are escalating worldwide
And here at home, anti-LGBTQ hate is rising too.
More than 1,000 anti-trans bills were introduced in state legislatures this year alone. Some of Sarah’s own colleagues in Congress have attacked her, not because of her work, but because of who she is.
**But Sarah refuses to back down, be intimidated, or give up.** She’s proving what real leadership looks like: courage, conviction, and a willingness to build coalitions — _even in unlikely places_ — because people under attack matter more than political comfort.
**This is why Sarah’s leadership matters. And it’s why your support matters.** None of this work happens without people like you standing by her side.
And right now, she needs your support more than ever because MAGA extremists see Sarah’s impact, and they’re doing everything they can to stop her.

clean_body: The urgency of this legislation is real. Hi, Sarah recently reintroduced the Global Respect Act , a human rights bill that finally holds accountable those who torture, imprison, or commit violence against LGBTQ+ people worldwide. And she did it with something Washington rarely sees anymore: real bipartisanship. The urgency of this legislation is real: → Nearly a third of countries still criminalize LGBTQ+ people → A dozen still impose the death penalty → Authoritarian crackdowns are escalating worldwide And here at home, anti-LGBTQ hate is rising too. More than 1,000 anti-trans bills were introduced in state legislatures this year alone. Some of Sarah’s own colleagues in Congress have attacked her, not because of her work, but because of who she is. But Sarah refuses to back down, be intimidated, or give up. She’s proving what real leadership looks like: courage, conviction, and a willingness to build coalitions — even in unlikely places — because people under attack matter more than political comfort. This is why Sarah’s leadership matters. And it’s why your support matters. None of this work happens without people like you standing by her side. And right now, she needs your support more than ever because MAGA extremists see Sarah’s impact, and they’re doing everything they can to stop her. Thank you for standing with Sarah and with LGBTQ+ people everywhere. In solidarity, Sarah McBride HQ

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | Folks, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: **[Split a donation between The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State and me. clean_body: It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. | Folks, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI wants to talk to me and other members of Congress. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mark Kelly and DASS will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Mark | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. name: Tim Walz
subject: Keeping Minnesota safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia and Tim Walz for Governor

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120553674/586627751/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJjMTJiMDAtOGNkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZHtLBHtABYCphcbc3rlLOpeTjs3Ze8clhfy-Zts9n1o=)
---
Team — Eli Crane and his MAGA allies just showed you exactly where they stand on the rule of law. **When Mark Kelly made a video reminding U.S. service members that they can refuse illegal orders, Crane went on Fox News and called it "foolish and cowardly."** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120553675/586627752/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJjMTJiMDAtOGNkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZHtLBHtABYCphcbc3rlLOpeTjs3Ze8clhfy-Zts9n1o=) Let that sink in: _A sitting congressman called it "foolish and cowardly" to defend the rule of law._ This is the same Eli Crane who co-sponsored articles to impeach federal judges for ruling against Trump. The same Crane who voted to slash food assistance to 900,000 Arizonans. The same Crane who enabled the 43-day government shutdown that hurt working families. Now he's attacking Mark Kelly — a Navy captain, NASA astronaut, and U.S. Senator — for defending the rule of law. **The people of Arizona’s second district deserve better.**[**Chip in to help us flip Crane's seat and elect a representative who will stand up for the rule of law.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120553676/586627753/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJjMTJiMDAtOGNkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZHtLBHtABYCphcbc3rlLOpeTjs3Ze8clhfy-Zts9n1o=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120553677/586627754/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJjMTJiMDAtOGNkMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZHtLBHtABYCphcbc3rlLOpeTjs3Ze8clhfy-Zts9n1o=)

name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: toss-up race in North Carolina
body:
This is why we need your help.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
| **[<<< Donate $2 to Roy Cooper’s U.S. Senate Campaign >>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2120?amount=2&t=6&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)**
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2120?t=7&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
_We’re asking for $2 today, Peter. Here are 2 reasons why:_
→ Democrats have the advantage going into 2026. Voters are getting fed up with the GOP’s corruption & chaos. **We cannot afford to get complacent now.**
→ Any path to retaking the Senate majority runs through North Carolina. We have to win here — but our race is rated a TOSS-UP, and our victory isn’t a guarantee.
**[Stopping the GOP starts in North Carolina. If we can win here, we can turn the tide. Donate $2 to send Roy to the U.S. Senate to fight for us.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2120?amount=2&t=8&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)**
Thanks,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=90%2E124072%2EbTTYD2)

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: We promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

[**Peter, if you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to make your first online contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251203-2-subs-b&t=1&akid=1200%2E5691347%2Ecd31Q0)
Sorry to be so direct, but we can’t afford to fall behind on our December goals. GOP-aligned Super PACs have already spent millions of dollars attacking Jon, and hitting our goals is how we make sure we can compete and set the record straight.
The GOP and their Super PACs are going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to replace Jon with a MAGA acolyte. **We either fight back now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**
That’s the situation we’re facing here in Georgia. And it’s why we have to ask:
[**Can you please chip in $5 or more to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today? Every donation makes a difference, and $5 adds up fast when we’re all chipping in >>>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251203-2-subs-b&t=2&akid=1200%2E5691347%2Ecd31Q0)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251203-2-subs-b&t=3&akid=1200%2E5691347%2Ecd31Q0)**
Thanks so much for pitching in, especially ahead of our critical FEC reporting deadline at the end of the month.
We promise, if we all do our part, it will pay off with a landslide victory on Election Day.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=1200%2E5691347%2Ecd31Q0) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1200%2E5691347%2Ecd31Q0) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thanks — but this isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I can’t begin to tell you just how grateful I am for your support. My whole life, I’ve been lucky to be on some really incredible teams, but this one is special.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here.
I can’t begin to tell you just how grateful I am for your support. My whole life, I’ve been lucky to be on some really incredible teams, but this one is special.
The number of people who have signed up, chipped in, or just spoken out in my support over the last couple of weeks is truly humbling. Thank you.
Unfortunately, this isn’t over.
Pete Hegseth ordered the Secretary of the Navy to deliver a report on me by December 10th. The subject of that report, from what I can tell, is whether they have cause to recall me to active duty and court-martial me.
A recall and court-martial like that is unprecedented.
Honestly, I don’t know what Hegseth and Trump are going to try to pull with that report. What I do know is we’ve got to be ready for it, and for anything that comes afterwards.
So today, I am launching an emergency fundraising drive. And I am humbly asking you to make a contribution.
[**Please. If you’ve got my back, and if you’re ready to fight back against Trump, Hegseth, and everybody else trying to take me down: Chip in $5.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25-dod/.FHtwNx&refcode=em251203-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6276%2E6688874%2E-e1RT1)

name: Wes Moore
subject: This is a longer email about saying goodbye.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)
This is a longer email about saying goodbye, Peter, but if you don’t have time to read through, I would deeply appreciate **[a contribution to power our campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251203-1.Zm3jvu&refcode=em-20251203-1&t=2&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)**
After nearly a century of operation, Valley Forge Military Academy — the place where I went to school and grew from an angry, complicated child to a confident young man — will be closing.
When my mother first sent me to the Forge, she saw military school as a last resort in response to a seemingly endless chain of misbehavior, both at home and at school. At age 11, I’d already felt handcuffs on my wrists. **I was not on a path to success.**
There was no overnight miracle when I started school there, but slowly, things changed. I learned about honor, code, and service. I started to take an interest in campus life, academics, and leadership positions — and I rose up the ranks and became a first captain in command of around 800 cadets.
After graduation, I went on to study at Johns Hopkins and Oxford, deployed to Afghanistan with the 82nd Airborne Division, ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, and now, I serve as the 63rd governor of Maryland _and the first Black governor in the history of my state._
What saddens me most isn’t losing a place I once called home. My memories will forever live on with me.
**It saddens me that other young men like me will have one fewer avenue to challenge themselves and build their own pathway to success.**
Peter, at a time where our young men and boys are falling behind and feeling isolated, we have to offer more paths for connection and engagement.
I know Valley Forge Military Academy did that for me, and I’m determined to find ways to do that for young Marylanders today.
That includes the **Maryland Corps and Service Year Option** — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service on the path to college or a career.
We have to help young Marylanders find the thing that guides them on a pathway to success and that inspires them to serve. **[If you support that mission, I would appreciate a donation to keep me in the fight as Maryland's governor today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251203-1.Zm3jvu&refcode=em-20251203-1&t=3&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251203-1.Zm3jvu&refcode=em-20251203-1&t=4&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)
_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense._

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251203-1&t=5&refcode2=1009_1086043_7jzOaT&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1009%2E1086043%2E7jzOaT)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Katie Porter
subject: My conversation with Californians barely getting by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)
Peter,
I sat down recently with a group of Californians barely making ends meet to discuss the cost crisis.
Let me share their stories with you—but first: **[Donate $5 to our campaign today to help me fight to lower costs.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251203_1_ak.44vYEt&refcode=em20251203-40521&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)**
**Pedro** , a warehouse operator, told me half of his paycheck goes to utilities and groceries.
**Carol** , a distribution center worker, said that nearly three full paychecks are going to rent in her two-bedroom, one-bathroom apartment—and that cost is rising. She needs the space to raise her two sons, but rent is cutting into their food budget.
As a single parent myself, I know how expensive it is to live in nearly every part and pocket of California, and how stressful it can be when bills keep piling up.
**Joel** , a forklift operator, talked about the struggles many face in the Inland Empire. Despite living in a supposedly affordable area, and having a “classic” good paying union job, he still struggles to make ends meet.
**These stories represent what millions of Californians are experiencing.** I’m running for governor to fight for Pedro, Carol, Joel, and every other person barely getting by in the Golden State.
But winning this race won’t be easy. Republicans are surging, and a billionaire just started rolling out massive ad buys. **Simply put, I need your support right now.**
**[Can you donate $5 to our campaign today? I am the candidate that will fight for working people, and I need your help to win.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251203_1_ak.44vYEt&refcode=em20251203-40521&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251203_1_ak.44vYEt&refcode=em20251203-40521&t=23&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)
Thank you,
Katie Porter
P.S. **[Click here to watch more of our conversation on the cost crisis.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251203_1_ak.44vYEt&refcode=em20251203-40521&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)**

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251203-40521&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=40521_3422442_MS80jV&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40521&t=26&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40521)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40521&t=27&akid=40521%2E3422442%2EMS80jV)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

clean_body: Sign now: Demand the FULL Epstein files — no more hiding. = The American people deserve the FULL Epstein files. Not the redactions. Not the parts Republicans cherry-pick. My team and I spent six days combing through over 20,000 documents, and the emails we uncovered raised serious, serious questions about Donald Trump’s relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. So what happened? We released the emails. Republicans erupted. Trumpworld panicked. And suddenly — magically — they decided they did want to release the files they fought for years to bury. Here’s why: They only move when we force them to. It’s not because they care about survivors or justice. It’s because they fear public pressure. So let's give them more of it. This isn’t about partisanship. It’s about transparency and refusing to let powerful men hide behind power structures ever again. Republicans call my approach “sensational.” They say I’m doing this for attention. They say I “should stick to TikTok.” You know what I say? When the people in charge refuse to tell the truth, it’s our job to force it out of them. Add your name. Stand with survivors. Demand the truth. clean_body: I'm too busy to search far & wide for you AGAIN! | | | | I have ONE spot left on the official 2025 MAGA Honor Roll ... and I’m holding it for YOU. Your name has come across my desk over and over this year — more than once, more than twice — which is exactly why I told my team: “Save the final spot for Fellow American do NOT give it to anyone else.” I’m personally compiling the permanent 2025 MAGA Honor Roll , the exclusive list of my strongest, most loyal patriots from this historic year. This list is going straight to my desk in the Oval Office. I will be reviewing every single name myself tonight. Please don’t make me stay up all night wondering why you weren’t there when I looked for you. Thank you, President Donald J. Trump P.S. When I don’t see your name tonight, I’ll know you let the last spot go to someone else. Don’t do that to me. Confirm now and make my night. | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Ending 2025 with new U.S. House endorsements |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120554926/586632387/-1510725204?refcode=WUEFEL06_20251203_NewEndos_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIwMWYyMC05MmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXX6Wglc2oZ1wvqYy64ziFzPO4Osqp50ouLnFkm-i5Y=) Hi Peter, I have some exciting news to share with you:

Today, EMILYs List is endorsing THREE powerhouse Democratic pro-choice women running to flip Republican-held U.S. House seats.

[**Before I tell you more about these women's races, will you donate now to invest early in their campaigns?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120554927/586632388/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL06_20251203_NewEndos_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIwMWYyMC05MmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXX6Wglc2oZ1wvqYy64ziFzPO4Osqp50ouLnFkm-i5Y=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120554928/586632389/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL06_20251203_NewEndos_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIwMWYyMC05MmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXX6Wglc2oZ1wvqYy64ziFzPO4Osqp50ouLnFkm-i5Y=)
---
These three women are stepping up to flip critical seats and protect our rights in some of the toughest battlegrounds in the country:

In Colorado's 5th Congressional District, **Jessica Killin** is running to be a fierce advocate for Colorado families. A fourth-generation Coloradan raised by two public school educators, Jessica served as a captain and paratrooper in the U.S. Army. She's dedicated her career to improving the livelihoods of everyday Americans, military families, and veterans.

In Iowa's 2nd Congressional District, **Lindsay James** is running to level the playing field for all Iowans. As a chaplain, she sat beside people in their hardest hours, and as a state representative, she has fought for them. Lindsay is focused on building a future where every Iowa family can build the life they deserve.

And in Kentucky's 6th Congressional District, **Cherlynn Stevenson** is running to fight for a brighter future for working Kentuckians. Growing up in Eastern Kentucky, Cherlynn saw firsthand how hard folks were working to make ends meet and the challenges rural families face every day. As a state representative, she’s worked successfully to put Kentucky workers first and protect access to health care.

Winning these races won' be easy. National Republican groups will invest HEAVILY to keep these seats red — and if we're going to help Jessica, Lindsay, and Cherlynn build the campaigns they need, we have to move quickly.

[**So please, will you donate now to help power these women to victory and flip the House next November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120554929/586632390/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEL06_20251203_NewEndos_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1057402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTIwMWYyMC05MmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JXX6Wglc2oZ1wvqYy64ziFzPO4Osqp50ouLnFkm-i5Y=)

clean_body: Ending 2025 with new U.S. House endorsements | = Hi Peter, I have some exciting news to share with you: Today, EMILYs List is endorsing THREE powerhouse Democratic pro-choice women running to flip Republican-held U.S. House seats. = | = These three women are stepping up to flip critical seats and protect our rights in some of the toughest battlegrounds in the country: In Colorado's 5th Congressional District, Jessica Killin is running to be a fierce advocate for Colorado families. A fourth-generation Coloradan raised by two public school educators, Jessica served as a captain and paratrooper in the U.S. Army. She's dedicated her career to improving the livelihoods of everyday Americans, military families, and veterans. In Iowa's 2nd Congressional District, Lindsay James is running to level the playing field for all Iowans. As a chaplain, she sat beside people in their hardest hours, and as a state representative, she has fought for them. Lindsay is focused on building a future where every Iowa family can build the life they deserve. And in Kentucky's 6th Congressional District, Cherlynn Stevenson is running to fight for a brighter future for working Kentuckians. Growing up in Eastern Kentucky, Cherlynn saw firsthand how hard folks were working to make ends meet and the challenges rural families face every day. As a state representative, she’s worked successfully to put Kentucky workers first and protect access to health care. Winning these races won' be easy. National Republican groups will invest HEAVILY to keep these seats red — and if we're going to help Jessica, Lindsay, and Cherlynn build the campaigns they need, we have to move quickly. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your help, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List.
