name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: An announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
I wanted to reach out to you all directly to share an update. Hearing from so many people throughout Massachusetts encouraging me to run for the United States Senate was deeply humbling and a testament to the strength of our movement. I feel heartened and encouraged by the coalition that has emerged encouraging me to take a look at this, and seeing the strong path to victory, I spent deliberate time giving a statewide run the careful consideration it deserves. Ultimately, at this moment, I feel called to my community and my family. Our district, the Massachusetts 7th, is squarely in the crosshairs of the Trump White House. The fear and trauma felt in our communities and across the country right now is all too real — and I am resolved to continue fighting for my district. **So I’m proud to formally share that I’m running for re-election to the House of Representatives in 2026. And as a reminder, this movement doesn’t organize for the sake of a single electoral cycle — but with an eye on generations to come.** [**So if you’re able, will you please split a contribution between Elizabeth Warren and our campaign to kick off the next phase of our work with the strongest possible momentum behind us?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=8&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---

---
In this next term, I plan to continue standing in the gap and holding the line against this hostile White House that means harm to everyone in our district and country. That means:
* Fighting back against the White House’s attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, Black and brown folks, federal workers, and our immigrant neighbors.
* Continuing to use my committee roles to conduct oversight and make progress on everything from housing affordability, AI and crypto oversight, to accountability for survivors of Epstein’s abuse.
* Leading the Reproductive Freedom Caucus to protect and expand abortion access with a House majority.
* Continuing to advance bold, comprehensive policies that meet the moment and address the affordability crisis — like lowering the cost of housing, investing in affordable childcare, ending the pushout of Black women from the workforce, closing the racial wealth gap, and more.

**These are not nice-to-haves, these are must-haves for the people I represent in Massachusetts and folks across the country.** Now, more than ever, is the time to dig deep, to lean into mutual aid, and to use every tool available to stand in the gap in defense of our neighbors and our democracy. That’s exactly what this campaign is going to do — and we’re going to keep powering our work like we always have: with small-dollar, grassroots support. [**So if you can today, please split a donation to support Elizabeth Warren and our campaign to help kick off our 2026 campaign fighting for bold action and transformative policies in Massachusetts and across the country.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=14&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8) I am incredibly honored to have your support. Thank you for everything. In solidarity, Ayanna
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3243?t=12&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2719%2E4032634%2EjGJdE8)

---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: The clock is ticking for Republicans to do their job.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Healthcare premiums are set to skyrocket.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120558402/586644239/1438484806?refcode=EM_F_251203HC_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzdmYWRjZS05YmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NkKAsaNQz8Jz4fn1sk_98ap3quJ858dM7HTQOWqeEk=) It’s officially December, and you know what that means: _**Republicans are running out of time to protect health care.**_

Affordable Care Act subsidies are going to expire in a matter of weeks, which will cause premiums to skyrocket for millions of Americans, and Republicans are openly admitting that it’s not a priority for them.

**Healthcare should not be a partisan issue.** Period. However, it seems like anything outside of giving massive tax handouts to billionaires is not deemed important enough for Republicans to do their jobs.

**Americans deserve better – and I vow to continue fighting to ensure the hardworking people of our nation aren’t forced to choose between having healthcare and paying their mortgage or rent.**

[**Peter – it cannot be more clear. When Republicans hold the majority, it only leads to pain and chaos. Help Democrats take back the House and hold Republicans accountable for their destruction by chipping in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120558403/586644241/1438484806?refcode=EM_F_251203HC_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzdmYWRjZS05YmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1NkKAsaNQz8Jz4fn1sk_98ap3quJ858dM7HTQOWqeEk=)

In solidarity,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Deb Haaland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I will never be bought by outside interests.

| | |
---
Hi friend – Deb Haaland here.
A lot of campaigns say they are grassroots, but when you dig a little deeper, you’ll see **they’re being bankrolled into office by billionaire megadonors.**
_That’s not what we do here._
Since day one, this campaign has been and continues to be powered entirely by everyday people – neighbors, family, and working people who believe in moving New Mexico forward.
In fact, our average donation amount is just **$21.31**. And that’s _exactly_ what grassroots power looks like.
**Unfortunately, we’re up against opponents who play by a different set of rules. **To compete with any billionaire-backed opponents that come our way, I need your help.
[**Will you chip in $21.31 today to keep our grassroots momentum going?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1371?t=1&akid=6044%2E400544%2E8iopKk)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1388?t=2&akid=6044%2E400544%2E8iopKk)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1389?t=3&akid=6044%2E400544%2E8iopKk)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1390?t=4&akid=6044%2E400544%2E8iopKk)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1366?t=5&akid=6044%2E400544%2E8iopKk)

From the bottom of my heart, thank you, friend.

Be fierce,

Deb

name: Rob Bonta
subject: This. Is. Illegal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth have a disturbing vision of a militarized America.
The Department of War, as they call it, sending troops to our cities with no legal basis.
Masked ICE agents conducting unannounced raids, snatching people from their daily lives without the slightest suspicion of wrongdoing.
The National Guard — illegally federalized — patrolling our communities.
I will not stand by while this administration tramples our state sovereignty and bulldozes our rights.
Today I want to give you a quick update on our National Guard lawsuit, filed back in June when Trump used an illegal scheme to federalize the CA National Guard and deploy troops to LA.
As of today, Angelenos are still living under an unnecessary military presence — with no end in sight.
This. Is. Illegal.
So we took Trump to court, and these are our demands:
→ End the extended and needless federalization of California National Guard troops.
→ Send our hardworking servicemembers back to their regular duty and regular lives.
→ Free Los Angeles from a completely unjustified military occupation.
Trump and Hegseth can’t be allowed to unlawfully infringe on Californians’ rights with impunity — and I’ll keep fighting until they’re held accountable.
Please join me today with a donation of any amount. Your support helps us keep pressure on this administration and defend Californians’ rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25?express_lane=true&amount=250] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Thanks for being a part of this movement.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: Disgusting and dangerous.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251203-1678-foote&t=1001&akid=1678%2E342411%2EjebWOv ]Squad Victory Fund

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251203-omar-split-movement.mTO3Y8&refcode=em20251203-1678&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1678%2E342411%2EjebWOv ]Trump on Somalis: 'We're gonna go the wrong way if we keep taking in
garbage into our country. Ilhan Omar is garbage. She's garbage. Her
friends are garbage.'

Peter — Trump just
can’t stop attacking Ilhan.

First, Trump spent months going after Ilhan with racist conspiracies,
leading to ongoing harassment and constant threats to Ilhan’s life and
requiring us to hire our own security.

Then, Trump’s rhetoric over the last weeks has put a target on the backs
of innocent Somali-American families here in Minneapolis who already face
so much hate from the far-right.

Now, Trump is calling Ilhan “garbage” and adding that immigrants like her
are “garbage” too. It’s disgusting and dangerous.

And more so, it’s a distraction from the fact that Trump’s first year in
office has been a disaster. The cost of living continues to rise, millions
are losing their healthcare, and ICE has waged a terror campaign in our
cities. The American people are waking up to Trump’s incompetence, and he
is desperate to create a distraction.

So, Peter, we
are reaching out today to ask this grassroots team to help us show that
thousands, or even millions, of people stand with Ilhan Omar as she faces
down Trump’s attacks and continues to fight for our agenda of healthcare,
housing, education, and a safe and affordable life for all Americans,
regardless of where they were born.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251203-omar-split-movement.mTO3Y8&refcode=em20251203-1678&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1678%2E342411%2EjebWOv ]Split a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford
between Ilhan Omar’s campaign and the Squad Victory Fund today. We want to
prove that this movement has Ilhan’s back and is ready to meet these
racist, hateful attacks with a powerful grassroots campaign that can
defeat Trump and the far-right.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251203-omar-split-movement.mTO3Y8&refcode=em20251203-1678&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1678%2E342411%2EjebWOv ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar for Congress

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1678%2E342411%2EjebWOv

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
Millions could lose SNAP benefits permanently unless we act. |
Please read this entire message. [**Then, add your name and be one of 25,000 signatures on our petition to protect SNAP benefits immediately.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120559200/586647128/46651883?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.03_OTS-Snap-Cuts_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmY1MTZmZi05ZmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvajUVYA3R1128DXU-MeDeEdmkp05eSuaKIZcCimRJ4=&emci=835dadd2-52d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8ff516ff-9fd0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029) Millions of people could **permanently lose their SNAP food benefits** in the next few months because of Republicans’ tax and spending law. SNAP benefits provide food for nearly 42 million people each day — over 40% of whom are children. This benefit is a lifeline for working families across the country. Now, states are facing pressure from Trump and his extremist majority to kick people off of their food assistance. Some families — including refugees — are already being notified that their SNAP benefits will stop right away. Food banks are trying to help, but they cannot replace the billions in government funding for SNAP. We cannot stay silent. [**Will you please be one of the 25,000 emergency signatures on our petition to say NO to SNAP cuts?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120559202/586647135/46651883?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.03_OTS-Snap-Cuts_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmY1MTZmZi05ZmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvajUVYA3R1128DXU-MeDeEdmkp05eSuaKIZcCimRJ4=&emci=835dadd2-52d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8ff516ff-9fd0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029) | | [ SIGN THE PETITION >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120559207/586647137/46651883?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.12.03_OTS-Snap-Cuts_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmY1MTZmZi05ZmQwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FvajUVYA3R1128DXU-MeDeEdmkp05eSuaKIZcCimRJ4=&emci=835dadd2-52d0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=8ff516ff-9fd0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)

clean_body: Millions could lose SNAP benefits permanently unless we act. | Please read this entire message. Millions of people could permanently lose their SNAP food benefits in the next few months because of Republicans’ tax and spending law. SNAP benefits provide food for nearly 42 million people each day — over 40% of whom are children. This benefit is a lifeline for working families across the country. Now, states are facing pressure from Trump and his extremist majority to kick people off of their food assistance. Some families — including refugees — are already being notified that their SNAP benefits will stop right away. Food banks are trying to help, but they cannot replace the billions in government funding for SNAP. We cannot stay silent. | | SNAP keeps families steady during hard times. When people lose food help, whole communities feel the impact — schools, food banks and local businesses all struggle to keep up. Your name can help show leaders how important this support is for families everywhere. – Off the Sidelines PAC | © 2025 | Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC

name: JB Pritzker
subject: This race could decide the U.S. Senate, Peter

body:
Please let me cut to the chase.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98389?refcode=em20251203-9798&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9798%2E614464%2E-Ai4LY)
Peter — JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in, Peter:
**[If you can, please split a $15 donation right now between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98390?refcode=em20251203-9798&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=2&akid=9798%2E614464%2E-Ai4LY)**

body:
We said it back then, and we’re saying it again now: Pete Hegseth should be FIRED before he endangers the lives or integrity of anyone else.
#
Peter —
Way back in March, after the first reports that Hegseth shared classified information in an unsecured Signal thread broke, we called for him to be fired. Rank incompetence, brazen disregard for the safety of the men and women under his command, and a crystal clear violation of operational security.
Today, the Department of Defense Inspector General released a report on that very incident. Funnily enough, they arrived at the same conclusion we did in March:
**_Hegseth violated military regulations by sharing classified information in an unsecured Signal thread.**_
We said it back then, and we’re saying it again now: Pete Hegseth should be FIRED before he endangers the lives or integrity of anyone else.
[**If you agree, add your name and tell Donald Trump:
FIRE PETE HEGSETH NOW. **](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251203_vv_em_hegseth/?source=em251203-1-160&akid=34802%2E3013755%2EC39jel)
| [SIGN ON](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251203_vv_em_hegseth/?refcode=em251203-1-160&akid=34802%2E3013755%2EC39jel)
---
Thank you.
The team at VoteVets

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: New Air Marshal Asst. Dir. Started Wasteful Congressional VIP Service, Oversaw Scandalous Quiet Skies
body:
In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service
(FAMS), an agency veteran who created a wasteful VIP Congressional
Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put
Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi
Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist has been
promoted to assistant director.

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 03, 2025

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78088&L=36619&F=T&&hash=25fe19e16e901a0a2e9cd0e676ba5ce64e13a3ff1878fcbd76dd06e4c1f98259]

In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service
(FAMS), an agency veteran who created a wasteful VIP Congressional
Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put
Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi
Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist has been
promoted to assistant director. His name is Serge V. Potapov, and he
has risen through the ranks at FAMS despite playing a key role in
highly questionable programs and a documented history of misconduct
that put him at the center of various investigations over the years,
according to agency documents reviewed by Judicial Watch.

clean_body: In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service (FAMS), an agency veteran who created a wasteful VIP Congressional Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist has been promoted to assistant director. [alt_text] [*****] December 03, 2025 [article-image] [] In the latest controversy to rock the Federal Air Marshal Service (FAMS), an agency veteran who created a wasteful VIP Congressional Concierge and oversaw a surveillance program that put Americans—including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard—with opposing political views on a terror watchlist has been promoted to assistant director. His name is Serge V. Potapov, and he has risen through the ranks at FAMS despite playing a key role in highly questionable programs and a documented history of misconduct that put him at the center of various investigations over the years, according to agency documents reviewed by Judicial Watch.
